title: Web design & maintenance
description:
About us

The Design Forums connects architects, interior designers and property developers across the UK and Ireland through a portfolio of industry events including The Architects Forums, The Design Forums and Design Soiree. We organise RIBA-accredited CPD seminars, product showcases and networking events in over 12 cities.

We're building a paid job board for the architecture and design sector — a new revenue stream leveraging our existing industry audience. We need a WordPress developer to build it, launch it, and maintain it ongoing.



The role

:



Set up and configure a WordPress job board using WP Job Manager (or recommend a better plugin if you can justify it)

Build a clean, professional front-end that matches our existing brand and site design

Configure paid job posting with payment gateway integration (Stripe or PayPal)

Set up tiered pricing packages (e.g. single listing, featured listing, bulk packages)

Build employer dashboard — account creation, job submission, payment, listing management

Build candidate-facing search and filter functionality (by role type, location, salary, sector)

Ensure full mobile responsiveness

Set up
 notifications (new listings, application confirmations, expiry reminders)

Testing, bug fixing, and launch



Phase 2 — Ongoing maintenance and improvement (post-launch):



Monitor site performance, uptime, and fix issues as they arise

Plugin and theme updates, security patches, backups

Implement improvements based on user feedback and analytics

Add new features as the board grows (e.g. CV database, employer branding profiles, job alerts)

General website maintenance across our other pages (event listings, landing pages, content updates)

Basic SEO housekeeping — meta descriptions, page titles, site speed





Working pattern



10 hours per week, Monday to Friday

Core hours: 1pm–8pm Manila time — flexible within that window, but must be reachable during these hours

Weekly check-in call (day/time to be agreed)

Short daily update on tasks completed and anything blocked

Additional calls as and when required





Tools & systems



WordPress with Elementor

WP Job Manager (or equivalent — open to recommendations)

Stripe/PayPal for payment processing

Google Analytics and Google Search Console

Training provided on our specific site structure, but you must be confident building independently from day one





Equipment & setup required



Dedicated home office or quiet workspace

Stable, reliable internet connection

Working computer with webcam for video calls

Professional headset for calls





Who we're looking for



3+ years' WordPress development experience — not just page building, actual development (custom templates, plugin configuration, payment integration)

Proven experience building or maintaining a job board, marketplace, or directory site on WordPress

Strong with WP Job Manager or similar plugins (WPJobBoard, JBoard, Jeeves)

Comfortable with payment gateway setup and troubleshooting (Stripe, PayPal)

Strong eye for design — this board needs to look premium, not like a generic template

Able to work independently, solve problems without hand-holding, and communicate clearly when stuck

Strong written English — you'll be configuring user-facing copy, notifications, and system
s

Detail-oriented and thorough with testing



Bonus if you have:



Experience with WooCommerce

Basic graphic design skills (Canva, Figma, or Photoshop)

SEO knowledge beyond the basics

Experience with membership or subscription plugins

Experience in the architecture, design, or events sector

Knowledge of GDPR requirements for job boards handling EU applicant data

title: Ecommerce SEO Architect: Maximize the Potential of Google Merchant Center & Schema Markup
description:
Join our cutting-edge ecommerce SEO agency and lead the digital transformation of our clients. As a key strategist, you will be the visionary behind online visibility, optimizing Google Merchant Center and deploying high-impact schema markup implementations. Your mission: skyrocket organic traffic, enhance search performance, and ensure our clients not only meet but exceed standards of excellence in the competitive world of ecommerce.



Lantern Sol 

offers a unique opportunity to be part of an innovative team with a global impact, having generated over $100 million in online sales and developed 500+ custom websites and applications. Our culture fosters creativity and collaboration in an environment that provides total flexibility and autonomy to define your workspace and manage your time while participating in strategic international meetings.



We are looking for a passionate, results-driven leader with deep expertise in ecommerce SEO and exceptional mastery of Google Merchant Center and schema markup. This role offers exponential professional growth alongside industry experts in an environment that values continuous learning.



Competencies:   Ecommerce SEO Expert:



Extensive experience with Shopify, WooCommerce, and Magento.

Advanced optimization of product feeds in Google Merchant Center—ensuring data quality, precise categorization, and attribute mapping.

Proactive resolution of feed errors, guaranteeing strict compliance with Google Shopping policies.

Advanced Technical SEO Mastery:



Implementation and optimization of schema markup (JSON-LD) for product and collection pages, focusing on maximizing visibility.

Deep knowledge of 
 vocabulary (Product, Offer, AggregateRating) and its strategic application.

Expert use of tools such as Google Rich Results Test, Schema Markup Validator, and Google Search Console for continuous analysis and optimization.

Strategic Analyst & Problem Solver:



In-depth analysis of Google Merchant Center performance data and organic traffic, identifying key trends and opportunities.

Proven experience in A/B testing, CTR optimization, and conversion rate improvement, with a focus on measurable results.

Ability to resolve complex technical SEO challenges and optimize site crawlability and indexing.

Influential Communicator & Collaborator:



Exceptional communication skills to engage with clients and internal teams, delivering clear and persuasive insights.

Ability to explain complex technical concepts to non-technical audiences, fostering understanding and collaboration.

Autonomy and the ability to lead multiple projects simultaneously, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines.

Bonus Skills (Preferred):

Deep understanding of international SEO and multilingual/multi-currency ecommerce setups.

Advanced experience with tools like Screaming Frog, Ahrefs, and SEMrush for in-depth analysis and optimization.





If you are an Ecommerce SEO Architect driven by excellence and innovation, we invite you to join our elite team. Together, we will shape the future of ecommerce and propel our clients toward digital success.

title: B2B Lead Generation Specialist & Digital Marketer
description:
# Job Description: B2B Lead Generation Specialist & Digital Marketer



**Position Title:** B2B Lead Generation Specialist & Digital Marketer  

**Location:** 100% Remote  

**Employment Type:** Full-time  



---



## About the Company



We are an innovative B2B solutions provider specializing in digital transformation for modern businesses. We help companies streamline their operations by offering advanced e-invoicing, accounting, and financial solutions, all supported by powerful marketing and automation tools like GoHighLevel. We are looking for an ambitious, tech-savvy, and results-driven **B2B Lead Generation Specialist & Digital Marketer** to spearhead our online presence and drive lead generation across key Southeast Asian markets, specifically Singapore and Malaysia.



---



## Role Overview



In this fully remote role, you will be the engine behind our B2B pipeline growth and digital footprint. You will act as the digital voice and the first point of contact for our company. You will be responsible for creating and executing outbound lead generation strategies, managing our professional brand on LinkedIn, and taking care of our company website. 



Because you will be marketing technical financial and workflow solutions, you must be IT-savvy, able to understand diverse business models, and highly proficient in written and spoken English.



---



## Key Responsibilities



### 1. Lead Generation & Customer Outreach

* **Outbound Lead Generation:** Design and execute B2B outreach campaigns targeting decision-makers (CFOs, Finance Directors, and Operations Managers) on LinkedIn and
.

* **First Point of Contact:** Act as the initial point of interaction for potential customers, qualify leads, and determine their business needs.

* **Customer Enquiries:** Act as the first responder to incoming queries, providing clear, value-driven communication.

* **Regional Focus:** Leverage an understanding of the Singapore and Malaysian business markets to tailor messaging and drive targeted acquisition.



### 2. Digital Marketing,
 Marketing & Content Creation

* *
 Marketing:** Plan, set up, and execute bulk
 campaigns, automated nurture sequences, and newsletters using GHL (or related
ing tools) to turn prospects into qualified leads.

* **LinkedIn Management:** Build and elevate the company’s presence on LinkedIn, including managing the company page and posting industry-relevant content.

* **Content Writing:** Write compelling, high-converting marketing materials, short-form posts, and professional correspondence in English.

* **Website Management:** Manage and update the company website to ensure messaging remains accurate and aligned with our service offerings.



### 3. Workflow Automation & Technical Consulting

* **Understand the Tech Stack:** Master our digital offerings, specifically e-invoicing and financial solutions, and translate their value to prospects across diverse industries.

* **Automation & Strategy:** Utilize **GoHighLevel** (or similar CRM/automation platforms) to build, manage, and optimize lead-nurturing workflows and customer journeys.



---



## Performance Metrics (KPIs) & Targets



To measure success in your first few months, you will be evaluated against the following key onboarding targets:



* **Customer Acquisition Target:** Successfully onboard a minimum of **4 customers** to take up our Free-of-Charge (FOC) or Paid solution.

* **Enterprise Milestone:** Secure at least **1 Enterprise Customer** out of the required minimum customer acquisitions.



---



## Qualifications & Attributes



* **Experience:** Proven track record in B2B marketing, lead generation, or outbound sales.

* **Market Knowledge:** Past experience serving the Singapore or Malaysian markets is highly desirable.

* **Tech Savviness:** Comfortable discussing and demonstrating IT, accounting, finance, and e-invoicing solutions.

* **Platform Knowledge:** Hands-on experience or familiarity with **GoHighLevel (GHL)** or similar all-in-one marketing automation tools, including
 marketing modules, campaign creation, and list segmentation.

* **Communication Skills:** Exceptional proficiency in English, both written and verbal, with a knack for writing engaging business content.

* **Adaptability:** A fast learner with the ability to quickly understand the core nature of a prospect’s business and propose relevant solutions.



---



## What We Offer



* Competitive base salary with an attractive performance-based commission/bonus structure.

* Completely remote working arrangement with flexible hours.

* Opportunity to work with modern technologies and a dynamic team across the APAC region.



---



Would you like to explore tips on how to use LinkedIn automation to hit your enterprise customer KPI faster?

description:
We operate several high-volume fashion ecommerce stores using a dropshipping model across multiple markets.



This role is not a basic customer support position. We are looking for someone who understands how dropshipping operations work and who can manage customer issues, payment disputes, supplier communication and online reputation across several stores.



You will work directly with the founder and will play a critical role in maintaining operational stability and customer satisfaction.



MAIN RESPONSABILITIES: 



##Customer Support Operations

- Handle customer tickets related to orders, shipping delays, returns, exchanges and refunds.

- Maintain clear, professional communication with customers and resolve issues efficiently.



##Dispute & Chargeback Management

- Handle PayPal disputes and Shopify Payments chargebacks.

- Prepare and submit appropriate evidence through the resolution centers.

- Follow up on cases until resolution.



##Trustpilot & Reputation Management

- Monitor Trustpilot reviews.

- Respond to negative reviews in a professional and strategic way.

- Help maintain a strong reputation score across our stores.



##Supplier Coordination

- Communicate daily with multiple suppliers.

- Follow up on orders and shipping issues.

- Resolve operational problems such as stock shortages or shipping delays.

- Negotiate pricing and escalate issues when necessary.



##Operational Coordination

- Identify recurring operational problems.

- Escalate issues to management and suggest improvements to operational processes.



REQUIREMENTS:



##Mandatory Experience



- Minimum 2 years experience working with Shopify stores

- Experience working in ecommerce or dropshipping operations

- Experience handling PayPal disputes or payment chargebacks

- Experience managing customer support tickets

- Experience communicating with suppliers



##Preferred Experience



- Fashion ecommerce experience

- Trustpilot management experience

- Experience with ticket systems such as Gorgias, Zendesk or Freshdesk



##Skills



- Strong written English

- Highly organized and detail oriented

- Ability to manage multiple tasks simultaneously

- Strong problem solving ability



##Salary



$800 – $1200 per month depending on experience.



Full-time position.



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (Important)



To apply for this position, please follow these instructions carefully. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



Step 1 —
 Subject



Send your application with the following subject line:



Fashion Operations Manager Application – [Your First Name]



Step 2 — Answer the Questions



Include answers to the following questions in your application:

 1. How many Shopify stores have you worked with?

 2. Describe your experience handling PayPal disputes or chargebacks.

 3. Have you ever managed a Trustpilot account? If yes, explain what you did.

 4. Describe your experience communicating with suppliers.

 5. What customer support systems or ticket systems have you used?

 6. Describe your experience in ecommerce or dropshipping operations.

 7. What is your expected monthly salary?



Step 3 — Loom Video (Required)



Record a Loom video (maximum 5 minutes) answering the following question.



Scenario:



A supplier informs you that 200 orders will be delayed by 10 days due to stock issues. At the same time, customers start contacting support and some open PayPal disputes.



In the video, explain step-by-step what actions you would take to manage this situation.



Please include the Loom link in your application.



Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.



We are looking for someone who understands how ecommerce operations work and can think clearly when solving operational problems.

title: Ecommerce Operations Assistant
description:

We run multiple Shopify ecommerce brands and are looking for a reliable operations specialist.



Your role is simple:

Make sure everything runs smoothly and gets executed properly.



You will work directly with a senior operator and take over daily execution so he can focus on high-value tasks.



This is a full-time, long-term position.



---



Main responsibilities



Check Shopify stores (orders, issues)

Update Google Sheets (finance, tracking)

Handle basic PayPal / payouts

Add products to Shopify

Respond to simple messages (DMs / 
)

Comfortable with Google Sheets

Fast, organized, detail-oriented

Reliable and consistent



---



Compensation

Full-time

Long-term

HOW TO APPLY (VERY IMPORTANT)

Applications without Loom will be ignored.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Looking for a talented VA with past experience working for US based companies. We are seeking a long term employee that is good at problem solving.

- Using indeed to post ads and set interviews via phone call. 



Preferred Experience

- Canva (Preferred)

Schedule 



- This schedule for this role is Mon-Thurs 8am-2pm CST. 



Benefits



- Bi-Weekly payment 

- Flexible time off if requested 

- Opportunity for growth with the company 



 If you feel you are right for the job, please put the following in your response:

3. Your favorite animal and why



Look forward to hearing from you and hope to work together soon.

title: Personal Operations Manager (Executive Assistant + AI Execution Partner)
description:
This is not a basic assistant job.



We are looking for someone to work directly with the founder to:



Stay organized



Execute daily priorities



Ensure nothing falls through the cracks





You will help turn ideas into action and keep the business moving forward.



Your success = things get done faster, cleaner, and more consistently.





---



Our Values (Important)



We are a faith-based firm. Our work is rooted in:



Serving others with excellence



Operating with integrity and honesty



Building long-term relationships





The founder’s relationship with Jesus Christ is a core part of how the business is led and how decisions are made.



This is a professional environment. You do not need to share the same beliefs, but you must be respectful of them and aligned with our values of integrity, service, and purpose.





---



What a Typical Day Looks Like



Reviewing priorities with the founder



Organizing tasks across multiple tools



Following up with tea
mbers and clients



Turning new ideas into clear action steps



Keeping projects moving forward





Some days will be fast-paced and require quick thinking.

Your ability to stay organized and proactive is critical.





---



What You’ll Be Doing



1. Daily Focus & Priority Management



Help identify the Top 3 priorities each day



Keep tasks clear and organized



Help the founder stay focused







---



2. Turn Ideas Into Action (Very Important)



Take high-level ideas and break them into:



Step-by-step tasks



Clear next actions





Use AI tools to help structure tasks quickly







---



3. Follow-Up & Task Tracking



Assign tasks and track progress



Follow up with:



Tea
mbers



Leads



Clients (light communication)





Make sure nothing gets stuck







---



4. Communication & Coordination



You will help manage communication across:



Slack



GoHighLevel



TaxDome







---



5. Use AI to Work Smarter



You’ll use tools like ChatGPT to:



Break down tasks



Draft messages



Summarize conversations



Create daily action plans





Training will be provided if needed.





---



6. Systems & Organization



Maintain task systems (ClickUp, Asana, or similar)



Keep workflows organized and clean



Suggest improvements when you see inefficiencies







---



Who This Is For



You are:



Highly organized



Proactive (you don’t wait to be told)



Comfortable following up with people



A clear and confident communicator



Detail-oriented and reliable





You enjoy bringing order to chaos and take pride in doing meaningful work.





---



Not a Good Fit If



You wait for instructions



You do not like following up



You prefer simple, repetitive tasks only



You do not like fast-paced environments







---



Tools (Experience is a Plus)



Slack



GoHighLevel



TaxDome



ClickUp



ChatGPT







---



Schedule



Full-time preferred



Must overlap with U.S. Central Time (CST)







---



Pay & Trial Period



$800 – $2,000 per month (based on experience)(Post-trial)



90-day paid trial period





During the 90-day trial, you will be evaluated on:



Speed of execution



Ability to follow instructions exactly



Proactive communication and consistent follow-up



Ability to stay organized under pressure



Willingness to take ownership of tasks





Successful completion of the trial leads to a long-term role with growth opportunities and increased compensation.





---



Growth Opportunity



This role can grow into:



Operations Manager



Chief of Staff



Leadership position





We promote from within based on performance and ownership.





---



How to Apply (Important — Read Carefully)



To be considered, you must complete all steps:



1. Include this at the top of your application:



Harvest Execution AI





---



2. Send a short video (2–3 minutes) answering:



How do you stay organized with multiple tasks?



How do you follow up with someone who is not responding?



Have you used AI tools like ChatGPT? How?







---



3. Bonus (Optional but recommended)



Share an example where you:



Organized a messy situation

or



Used AI to improve your workflow







---



Applications that do not follow instructions exactly will not be considered.





---



Final Note



We are actively hiring and reviewing applications daily.

This position will be filled quickly.



If you are serious about this opportunity, apply now and follow the instructions carefully.





---



What We’re Looking For (Quick Checklist)



Follows instructions exactly



Communicates clearly



Takes initiative



Follows up without being told

title: Senior IT Support Engineer
description:
Location: Remote (Must work 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM in US Pacific Time Business Hours)



Type: Full-Time



About the Role

We are a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) seeking a skilled and motivated IT Systems Engineer to join our dynamic team. This role is a unique blend of high-impact project implementation and advanced technical support. You won't just be "fixing PC’s"—you’ll be building environments, automating workflows, and ensuring our clients’ infrastructure is rock solid.



If you are a proactive problem-solver who thrives on documentation, automation, and delivering "white-glove" service, we want to meet you.



What Success Looks Like

-In this role, you aren’t just closing tickets; you’re improving the ecosystem. Success in the first 6 months looks like:

-Precision Execution: Escalated tickets are resolved permanently with "zero-leak" documentation, ensuring the issue never -returns.

-Standardization: Server builds and workstation deployments follow consistent, repeatable SOPs every single time.

-Automation First: You leverage PowerShell and RMM automation to eliminate "reactive noise" and recurring manual tasks.

-Quiet Confidence: After-hours support and high-pressure outages are handled with a calm, professional, and controlled -demeanor.

-Knowledge Sharing: Other technicians resolve tickets faster because of the documentation and tools you built.



Key Responsibilities

-Advanced Support: Provide L2 technical support for complex hardware, software, and network issues.

-Project Delivery: Plan and implement IT projects (migrations, server refreshes, network overhauls) on time and within scope.

-Infrastructure Management: Maintain and optimize desktops, Windows Servers, and cloud environments.

-System Maintenance: Proactively manage user equipment, security patches, and backups.

-Documentation: Maintain a "documentation-first" mindset, ensuring our PSA/Knowledge Base is always the single source of truth.



Technical Requirements

-Experience: 4–5 years in a dedicated L2 Support or Systems Administration role (MSP experience preferred).

-Microsoft Stack: Deep knowledge of M365 Administration (Azure AD/Entra ID, Intune, Exchange).

-Infrastructure: Windows Server, Active Directory, Group Policy, and Hyper-V virtualization.

-Networking: Strong grasp of VLANs, routing, switching, VPNs, and DNS/DHCP.

-Security: Experience with Firewalls (SonicWall, Fortinet, or Ubiquiti) and EDR/MDR platforms (SentinelOne, Huntress, etc.).

-Scripting: Strong PowerShell ability (you should be comfortable writing scripts, not just running them).

-Tools: Experience with PSA/RMM tools (SyncroMSP/Addigy) and Backup platforms (iDrive/E2).



Mindset & Qualities

-The "AI-Forward" Engineer: Comfortable using tools like ChatGPT to accelerate documentation, coding, and communication.

-Ownership: You don't wait for permission to fix a glaring process gap.

-Communication: Ability to translate "tech-speak" into plain English for our clients.

-Organization: You thrive in a structured environment and hate messy ticket queues.



Why Join Us?

-100% Remote: Work from wherever you are most productive.

-Career Growth: We pay for your certifications and provide structured training to keep your skills sharp.

-Innovation-Driven: We value automation over manual labor. If you find a better way to do something, we’ll listen.

-Supportive Culture: Join a team that values your input and prioritizes work-life balance.



Work Schedule

Hours: Monday – Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM PST. 1-hour lunch break included.



How to Apply

Ready to take the next step? Please send your updated resume (or a link to your CV) to

title: Virtual Assistant who #Believes in Entrepreneurs | Flexible Schedule
description:
We're trying to solve the world's biggest problem: People don't #Believe in themselves enough. For over 22 years, Evan Carmichael has been dedicated to this mission. The way we're approaching this problem is producing inspirational content at scale. The right video at the right time can completely change someone's life and we want to touch as many lives as possible. People may not have a supportive family or community around them, but our content can help give them the belief they need to chase their dreams and make the world a better place. We want to work with people who also want to make an impact and touch people's lives. In your application, please put ‘I am your next awesome VA!’ in the subject line. We’re looking for someone who’s curious, kind, takes initiative, wants to grow, and cares about being part of something meaningful. Please also share the link to your resume and portfolio, what your hourly salary expectations are, and in the first line of your message tell us how many YouTube subscribers Evan Carmichael has, followed by who your favorite entrepreneur of all time is and why. Please make sure to send your job application here on OnlineJobs and not via
. The job is full time (40 hours per week) with a flexible schedule. We would start off with a small project for now and we'd pay you for your ideas and research. We also like to work with people over a long period of time, not just short contracts, and give them opportunities to succeed and do more based on what they want to learn. Hopefully that will be you! Thank you for reading and good luck! Sending lots of love! Irish #Believe

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant Long Term role
description:
We’re looking for a detail-oriented and proactive Virtual Assistant to support a fast-paced real estate operation. Your primary focus will be generating leads, managing follow-ups, and keeping our pipeline organized so no opportunity slips through the cracks.



You will manage and update the CRM daily including tagging, notes, and pipeline tracking, follow up with leads through text,
, and calls using provided scripts, research property owners and assist with skip tracing, pull and organize property data from sources like MLS and public records, help execute
 and SMS campaigns, schedule appointments, maintain calendars, and track key performance metrics.



You should have strong written and spoken English, be highly organized, comfortable using CRM systems, and able to manage multiple tasks while thinking independently and following systems.



Compensation is hourly with performance bonuses tied to qualified leads and deals closed.



To apply, send a short introduction, your experience, and a voice recording explaining how you would handle a cold lead that has not responded in two weeks. Include the word “pipeline” in your subject line.

title: We are hiring a B2B Cold Caller / Lead Generation VA to help grow our commercial energy savings business.
description:
Our company helps businesses and commercial properties save money through:



- HVAC grants and rebates in New Jersey

- Small business grants in New Jersey

- Utility bill auditing nationwide

- Water conservation programs



We work with commercial property owners, property managers, HVAC contractors, boiler contractors, supply houses, accountants, real estate agents, small business owners, and referral partners.



This role is for someone who can help us find the right leads, contact decision makers, qualify opportunities, book calls, and keep everything organized in the CRM.



This is not just a basic VA/admin job. We are looking for someone who can help create real sales opportunities.



Main responsibilities:



- Build and clean lead lists

- Research companies and decision makers

- Call commercial property owners, contractors, property managers, accountants, and business owners

- Find the right decision maker

- Explain our services in a simple and professional way

- Ask basic qualification questions

- Book appointments or follow-up calls

- Send follow-up
s or texts when needed

- Update HubSpot or our CRM with notes, statuses, and next steps

- Follow up consistently so opportunities do not fall through the cracks

- Help organize prospects by service type: HVAC grants, small business grants, utility bill auditing, or water conservation

- Give daily updates on calls, conversations, appointments, and follow-ups



We are looking for someone who is:



- Comfortable making outbound B2B calls

- Good at speaking with business owners and decision makers

- Organized and detail-oriented

- Reliable with follow-up

- Able to follow a script but also think naturally during a conversation

- Good at asking questions and qualifying leads

- Comfortable using a CRM

- Willing to learn our business and improve over time

- Proactive and able to suggest ways to improve the sales process

title: Transaction Coordinator
description:
Listing Coordinator / Transaction Coordinator Application



_____________________________________________________________



We’re hiring a highly organized, systems-minded Real Estate Transaction Coordinator.

This role is for someone who lives in the details, obsesses over contract deadlines, and can manage a complex transaction pipeline without a single ball being dropped. You aren't just "checking boxes"—you proactively identifies gaps in the contract-to-close process, automates repetitive tasks, and ensures our clients and partners experience a seamless, "magic 
nt" closing every single time.





IMPORTANT: Please read the entire job listing carefully. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



===============

ABOUT THE TEAM

===============



Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and are dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!  

Why should you partner with us? WE ARE NOT YOUR ORDINARY CLIENT! 
 



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM! 



===============

Our Core Values:

===============





DELIGHT THE CLIENT: We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

MASTER YOUR CRAFT: We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS: When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.

We are building an exceptional place to work with strong systems and high standards, not just managing tasks for a real estate business.



===============

ABOUT YOU

===============



Do you think in priorities, timelines, and dependencies? Do you enjoy turning a ratified purchase contract or listing agreements into a structured project plan with clear deadlines? Are you the type of person who catches a missing signature or a math error on a Closing Disclosure (CD) before anyone else sees it? Do you take pride in building clean systems, documenting SOPs, and keeping a team aligned without needing constant supervision? Do you love to communicate quickly and help keep the project on track?

If you are a high-level operator who wants to own the "engine room" of a high-volume real estate team, keep reading.



===============

RESPONSIBILITIES

===============



Transaction & Listing Management



Contract-to-Close Ownership: Manage every aspect of buyer and seller transactions from signed purchase agreement to closing using Skyslope and GoHighLevel.

Strategic Preparation: Execute comprehensive pre-listing and pre-offer checklists to ensure every property and offer is positioned for success.



Technical Research Briefs: Develop detailed research briefs including property mechanicals and a verified timeline of large home system replacement dates

Market Intelligence: Prepare listing agent comps and pricing directives to support senior brokers in high-level strategic positioning.

Offer Packet Coordination: Prepare an offer packet draft with precise signature blocks and routing, and submit to the broker for review. 

Compliance & Auditing: Submit all required documentation to the office broker; ensure 100% file compliance at direction of the responsible broker by monitoring for no missing disclosures.

Closing Logistics: Coordinate with Attorneys, Lenders, Title officers and brokers; collect CD/ALTA statements for broker accuracy review against the commission agreement.

Project & Operations Management

 & Communication Prep: Draft
 prep templates for senior brokers to streamline high-level communication with clients and high-stakes partners

System Building: Spot inefficiencies in the workflow and design/implement improvements or automations to reduce manual effort.

SOP Documentation: Document workflows and create step-by-step guides so the process is repeatable and scalable.

KPI Reporting: Maintain and update the "Deal Tracker" G-Sheet and GHL Opportunity values to ensure leadership has accurate data at all times.

The "Connective Tissue": Act as the bridge between leadership, agents, and clients to ensure no ball is ever dropped.







===============

REQUIREMENTS

===============



Experience & Capability

Must have extensive experience in real estate transaction coordination, transaction management, or as a high-level operations associat

Preferred BPO Experience: Previous background in BPO Customer Service is highly preferred.

Project Management Experience: Comfortable managing 20+ active files simultaneously with varying deadlines.

Automation Mindset: Experience automating workflows (or a deep understanding of how to design them) is highly preferred.

Technical Proficiency: Working knowledge of Skyslope and GoHighLevel (GHL) is strongly preferred but not required. Fluent in AI tools (Gemini/Claude/OpenClaw) to improve output speed.

Work Style & Standards

Extremely Detail-Oriented: You find the needle in the haystack every time.

Near-Native English: Exceptional written and spoken communication skills.

Proactive Ownership: You don’t wait to be told something is broken; you anticipate it and fix it before it breaks.

Speed & Urgency: You move with a sense of purpose and meet every deadline, no excuses

Technical Requirements

A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION is required (at least 150mbps).

Must be available to respond to messages within a 12-hour daily window (standard core hours 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM EST).

Must be flexible to work 2–4 hours on weekends as needed for urgent business requirements



APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS

STEP 1: Application



Please submit your application 





To ensure you have read through the requirements, please write the phrase "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field of the application.



STEP 2: Initial Interview

If your application indicates you might be a great fit, you will be invited to participate in a quick, 10- to 15-minute initial screening interview.



STEP 3: Case Interview

Candidates who pass the initial screening will be invited to a 1-hour case interview. A case interview is an interactive session where we present you with a real-world scenario or business challenge relevant to the role. Rather than just talking about your past experience, this allows us to see your problem-solving process, technical logic, and how you tackle practical situations in real-time.



STEP 4: Reference Check

This is the final step before an official offer is extended. The final candidate(s) must provide one former employer/lead reference and one character reference.



STEP 5: The 90-Day Trial Period

If an offer is made and accepted, your employment will begin with a 90-day PAID trial period. This period is dedicated to ensuring a strong mutual fit—both for the responsibilities of the role and alignment with our core values. 

During these 90 days, we will provide you with all the necessary training, onboarding, and support you need to succeed and thrive on our team. You will be expected to master the Skyslope/GHL workflow, meet all transaction deadlines, and begin documenting/improving our internal systems. A successful trial results in a permanent invitation to the team.

title: Facebook Ads Manager
description:
Virtual Assistant — Meta Ads (Syncova)

Type: Full-time, remote

Hiring company: Syncova — a marketing agency running Meta ads, AI-assisted creative, and sales funnels for Australian allied-health practices.



About the role

We're looking for a VA to own the day-to-day execution of Meta ad campaigns for our clients. You won't need to invent strategy — we hand you a Standard Ad Process (SAP) for every angle, and your job is to execute it cleanly, fast, and at volume.

You'll be the link between our creative system, our editor, and Ads Manager. If we ship 10 new ads a week for a client, you're the reason that happens on time.

You won't talk to clients. You'll work directly with the founders.



What you'll actually do

Day-to-day, the loop looks like this:



Script ads from our SAPs. We give you the framework, the angle, the proof points. You write the script.

Generate voiceovers in ElevenLabs. Pick the right voice, render the audio, QA it.

Hand off to our editor. We already have an assigned editor — you brief them and send the assets. No editing on your end.

Download the finished ad once the editor sends it back.

Write ad copy using our AI prompt (we'll give it to you), then upload the creative + copy into Meta Ads Manager and ship it.



Beyond the ad loop, you'll also handle:



Building and maintaining Go High Level assets — funnels, automations, calendars, landing pages.

Wiring up booking calendars and the automations that run behind them.

Light landing-page work in GHL.





What we need from you

Hard requirements:



Minimum 1 year of hands-on Meta ads experience. This is non-negotiable. If you've never been inside Ads Manager building campaigns, this isn't the role for you.

Previous marketing agency or in-house marketing experience. You should already understand what a funnel is, what a hook is, and why CTR matters.

C2 English proficiency. You're writing scripts and ad copy in English. Anything below C2 won't cut it.

Working knowledge of Go High Level — funnels, automations, calendar systems, landing pages. You should be able to open GHL and build without hand-holding.

Detail-oriented. Ad accounts punish sloppy work — wrong UTMs, missed pixel events, unpaused test budgets. We need someone who actually checks their work.



Nice to have:



ElevenLabs experience (we'll train you if not).

Experience working with Australian or US-based agencies.

Familiarity with info-product / coaching-business marketing.





How we work



Async-first. Clear briefs, clear deliverables, clear deadlines.

We document everything. You'll inherit SOPs for every recurring task.

We use AI tools heavily — ElevenLabs, Claude, custom prompts. You should be comfortable using AI as part of your workflow, not afraid of it.

We ship fast. If you like fiddling with one ad for three days, you'll hate it here.





How to apply

Send us:



A short note on your Meta ads experience — which accounts you've worked on, monthly spend you've managed, and the kind of offers you've run ads for.

One example of an ad script or ad copy you've written that performed well (and the numbers, if you have them).

A quick rundown of your GHL experience — what you've built, what automations you've wired up.



We respond to every application that includes all three.

title: YouTube Thumbnail Artist
description:
==============================

YouTube Thumbnail Artist Application

==============================



We’re looking for a visual storyteller who knows how to stop the scroll.

The "Living in Charlotte" team is growing, and we need a designer who understands that a thumbnail isn't just a "pretty picture"—it’s the front door to our business. We’re looking for someone who obsesses over click-through rates (CTR), understands human psychology, and can turn a real estate topic into a "must-click" visual.



If you’re the type of person who spends your free time analyzing why certain creators dominate the homepage, we want to talk to you.





IMPORTANT: Please read this entire listing. We’re big on the details here. The final step of our process involves a portfolio review and a reference check from a former client or team lead.



==============

ABOUT THE TEAM

===============





We operate like a fast-paced startup. We’re high-energy, high-standard, and we care deeply about the people we serve. If you have a growth mindset and love seeing your work directly impact a channel's success, you’ll fit right in.



What’s it like here? Check out this video to meet the crew. 



=============

Our Core Values:

=============



Delight the Client: We go beyond "good enough" to create visual 
nts that stick.



Master Your Craft: You aren't just using templates. You’re staying ahead of design trends and YouTube's ever-changing algorithm.



Follow Through, Always: Deadlines matter. When a video is ready to go live, the thumbnail needs to be ready to perform.





==========

ABOUT YOU

==========





Do you look at a boring Thumbnail and immediately see three different ways to make it visual? Do you understand how to use color, contrast, and facial expressions to create curiosity? Are you the person who catches a weird shadow or a messy crop that everyone else missed?

We need a high-level creative who wants to own the "packaging" of our brand. You should be comfortable taking raw ideas and turning them into high-performing assets without needing someone to hold your hand through the process.



====================

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

====================





Design & Strategy



The "Hook": Create 3 - 7 main thumbnails with different variations. High-performing thumbnails per week that drive clicks.



Psychology-Based Design: Use depth, lighting, and "the gap" (creating a question only the video can answer) to increase CTR.



A/B Testing: Design variations to see which colors or layouts the audience prefers.

Photo Editing: Clean up property photos, color-grade portraits, and make every asset look premium.







Operations & Growth



Performance Tracking: Look at the data. If a thumbnail isn't clicking, you’re the first to suggest a pivot.

Asset Management: Keep our library of headshots and Charlotte-specific b-roll organized and ready to use.

Collaboration: Jump into brainstorming sessions to help us title videos before we film them so the visuals and words work together perfectly.





======================

WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

======================



A Killer Portfolio: You’ve done this before. You have examples of thumbnails that actually worked.



The Tools: You’re a pro in Photoshop or similar high-end design software. You also know how to use AI (like Midjourney or Generative Fill) to speed up your workflow, not replace your creativity.



Speed & Communication: We move fast. You need to be able to handle revisions quickly and keep us updated on Slack.



Charlotte Vibes: You don't have to live here, but you need to be able to capture the "vibe" of our city through your designs.



============

HOW TO APPLY

============





STEP 1: The Application Submit your info 
. 



To show us you’re paying attention to the details, please include the phrase "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.



STEP 2: Quick Chat If your portfolio blows us away, we’ll hop on a 15-minute intro call.



STEP 3: The Design Challenge We’ll give you a title and some raw assets and ask you to show us your magic. This is a paid trial task.



STEP 4: Reference Check We’ll chat with one person you’ve worked with in the past.



STEP 5: 90-Day Trial If we’re a match, we’ll start with a 90-day trial period. We’ll give you the training and support you need to master our systems. If you crush it, you’ll be a permanent part of the team.





Application form here

We are in search of a skilled and creative Real Estate Video Editor to join our team. As a freelance editor for Rex Visual Services, you will be responsible for creating compelling and visually engaging video content that aligns with our media services. You’ll handle standard profile and log footage, as well as both ground-level and aerial footage, delivering a range of video types, such as:



• Home-tour highlight videos

• Agent home walkthroughs (on/off-camera)

• Closing day reels

• Client testimonials

• Realtors' event recaps

• Interview-style videos for social media

• Short-form content tailored for platforms such as Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING



• Coordinate with the Team Manager to follow project requirements, objectives, and target delivery.

• Meet project deadlines and manage editing projects simultaneously, as needed.

• Submit edited footage to the Team Manager for review and approval.

• Incorporate feedback and finalize the video with any necessary revisions.

• Collaborate with the team to brainstorm and contribute innovative ideas to develop our video content strategy.



COMPENSATION & WORK SETUP



• This is a remote (WFH) position offering a rate of $40-$90 per project, with the expectation to turnaround 1-2 videos a day.

• Work hours will be from 2 PM-10 PM, Monday-Friday (weekends if needed), Philippine Time.

• Potential for a full-time role based on performance.



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS



We’re looking for someone who is friendly, organized, creative, and able to communicate well with our team. Please place the word "orange" in the subject line of your
. In terms of skills, we are seeking someone with the following:



• Proven work experience as a Video Editor or similar role.

• A portfolio or demo reel showcasing previous video editing works is highly desirable.

• Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro (Adobe After Effects skills would be a plus). Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve can also be considered.

• Must have a computer system with technical specifications that can handle 1080p up to 4K footage and render projects with motion graphics & animation.

• Sufficient English skills to read, understand, and craft appropriate responses to our team.

• Familiarity with a Project Management System like Tonomo, Dropbox, and a Communication App such as Slack is also preferred, but not mandatory.



You can also find examples here of the type of work we’d be looking for you to produce:

» 



Project-Based Payment Guidelines:

» 



READY TO JOIN?



To apply, please
 
 with your resumé and portfolio, along with any relevant work samples and experience you may have. A portfolio is a MUST. We can't wait to see what you can bring to the table!

title: Real Estate Transaction Coordinator / Listing Coordinator (2)
description:
What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM! 

Why should you partner with us? WE ARE NOT YOUR ORDINARY CLIENT! (aka #NotYourOrdinaryAFAM lol) 



We’re hiring a highly organized, systems-minded Real Estate Transaction Coordinator.

This role is for someone who lives in the details, obsesses over contract deadlines, and can manage a complex transaction pipeline without a single ball being dropped. You aren't just "checking boxes"—you proactively identifies gaps in the contract-to-close process, automates repetitive tasks, and ensures our clients and partners experience a seamless, "magic 
nt" closing every single time.



IMPORTANT: Please read the entire job listing carefully. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



ABOUT THE TEAM

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and are dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



Our Core Values:



DELIGHT THE CLIENT: We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.



MASTER YOUR CRAFT: We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.



FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS: When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.

We are building an exceptional place to work with strong systems and high standards, not just managing tasks for a real estate business.



ABOUT YOU

Do you think in priorities, timelines, and dependencies? Do you enjoy turning a ratified purchase contract or listing agreements into a structured project plan with clear deadlines? Are you the type of person who catches a missing signature or a math error on a Closing Disclosure (CD) before anyone else sees it? Do you take pride in building clean systems, documenting SOPs, and keeping a team aligned without needing constant supervision? Do you love to communicate quickly and help keep the project on track?

If you are a high-level operator who wants to own the "engine room" of a high-volume real estate team, keep reading.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Transaction & Listing Management

Contract-to-Close Ownership: Manage every aspect of buyer and seller transactions from signed purchase agreement to closing using Skyslope and GoHighLevel.

Offer Packet Coordination: Prepare an offer packet draft with precise signature blocks and routing, and submit to the broker for review. 



Compliance & Auditing: Submit all required documentation to the office broker; ensure 100% file compliance at direction of the responsible broker by monitoring for no missing disclosures.

Closing Logistics: Coordinate with Attorneys, Lenders, Title officers and brokers; collect CD/ALTA statements for broker accuracy review against the commission agreement.



Project & Operations Management

System Building: Spot inefficiencies in the workflow and design/implement improvements or automations to reduce manual effort.



SOP Documentation: Document workflows and create step-by-step guides so the process is repeatable and scalable.

KPI Reporting: Maintain and update the "Deal Tracker" G-Sheet and GHL Opportunity values to ensure leadership has accurate data at all times.



The "Connective Tissue": Act as the bridge between leadership, agents, and clients to ensure no ball is ever dropped.



REQUIREMENTS



Experience & Capability



1. Must have extensive experience in real estate transaction coordination, transaction management, or as a high-level operations associate.

2. Preferred BPO Experience: Previous background in BPO Customer Service is highly preferred.

3. Project Management Experience: Comfortable managing 20+ active files simultaneously with varying deadlines.

4. Automation Mindset: Experience automating workflows (or a deep understanding of how to design them) is highly preferred.

5. Technical Proficiency: Working knowledge of Skyslope and GoHighLevel (GHL) is strongly preferred but not required. Fluent in AI tools (Gemini/Claude/OpenClaw) to improve output speed.



Work Style & Standards

Extremely Detail-Oriented: You find the needle in the haystack every time.

Near-Native English: Exceptional written and spoken communication skills.

Proactive Ownership: You don’t wait to be told something is broken; you anticipate it and fix it before it breaks.

Speed & Urgency: You move with a sense of purpose and meet every deadline, no excuses.



Technical Requirements

A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION is required (at least 150mbps).

Must be available to respond to messages within a 12-hour daily window (standard core hours 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM EST).

Must be flexible to work 2–4 hours on weekends as needed for urgent business requirements



APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS



STEP 1: Application

Please submit your application HERE 

To ensure you have read through the requirements, please write the phrase "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field of the application.



STEP 2: Initial Interview

If your application indicates you might be a great fit, you will be invited to participate in a quick, 10- to 15-minute initial screening interview.



STEP 3: Case Interview

Candidates who pass the initial screening will be invited to a 1-hour case interview. A case interview is an interactive session where we present you with a real-world scenario or business challenge relevant to the role. Rather than just talking about your past experience, this allows us to see your problem-solving process, technical logic, and how you tackle practical situations in real-time.



STEP 4: Reference Check

This is the final step before an official offer is extended. The final candidate(s) must provide one former employer/lead reference and one character reference.



STEP 5: The 90-Day Trial Period

If an offer is made and accepted, your employment will begin with a 90-day PAID trial period. This period is dedicated to ensuring a strong mutual fit—both for the responsibilities of the role and alignment with our core values. 

During these 90 days, we will provide you with all the necessary training, onboarding, and support you need to succeed and thrive on our team. You will be expected to master the Skyslope/GHL workflow, meet all transaction deadlines, and begin documenting/improving our internal systems. A successful trial results in a permanent invitation to the team.



Please submit your application HERE >>

title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Flexible Work Schedule
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: AI Automation & Systems Specialist
description:
We're looking for a technically curious, systems-oriented operator who's comfortable inside automation tools and AI workflows — someone who can take ownership of a complex marketing setup, fix what's broken, and improve what's already there.                



This is not a software engineering role. Most of your work will involve improving and maintaining existing systems, not building from scratch. You'll work directly with the founder of a small operations agency. Our main client is an established US business that sells turnkey businesses to investors and runs 400–500 sales appointments per month through a heavily automated funnel. You'll own and improve that funnel — and over time, help us bring the same capability to other clients.





What We Care About Most                                                               

   

1. Strong communication. You write clearly, explain technical things in plain language, and raise issues early.

2. Problem-solving instinct. When something breaks, you investigate — trace the workflow, find the root cause, and propose the fix.                                   

3. Comfort with complexity. You're not put off by unfamiliar systems or messy problems. You lean in and figure things out.                                          





What You'll Do                                                                        



- Own our GoHighLevel setup — a sub-account with complex workflows, pipelines, AI caller handoffs, and rebooking sequences. You'll bring order, document it, and keep it running smoothly.

- Maintain and extend our Make automations that move data between the CRM, AI callers, and other tools.                                                                     

- Support our AI voice callers (Vapi) — update scripts, refine the assistant prompts, and keep the booking flow connected to our calendar.

- Use AI tools to analyse and generate marketing funnel reports — turning raw CRM data into clear insights we can act on.                                                   

- Build lightweight tools and automations using Claude Code, Cursor, or similar AI tools.                                                                                

- Troubleshoot independently — when something breaks, you find the cause and fix it without needing to be walked through.





Who You Are



- Proactive, high-level English communicator. You don't go quiet for a day.

- Detail-oriented. You name things properly, document as you go, and leave systems cleaner than you found them.

- Comfortable with APIs, webhooks, and integrations — you don't need to be a developer, but you understand how data flows between tools.                           

- You use AI tools daily — ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor — they're a core part of how we work.                                                                                 

- You take ownership and move things forward without constant direction.





Required Experience



- GoHighLevel — building workflows, pipelines, and multi-channel sequences. Show us a 

portal you've worked on.

- 
 (or Zapier / n8n) — multi-step scenarios, webhooks, and connecting tools

via APIs. Show us a scenario you've built.                                            

- Practical experience troubleshooting automations in real systems (not just tutorials).                                                                           

- Confident implementing AI tools and automations (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, or similar) to maximise efficiency and output.



Nice to have: AI voice platforms (Vapi, Retell, Bland), experience with custom AI agents, OpenAI / Anthropic API, marketing instincts for reviewing copy.





Hours



- Full-time, 40 hrs/week.

- US East Coast overlap required — realistically a ~5pm Manila start.

- Not on-call. If something breaks at 2am, we fix it the next day.





Compensation



- $1,800–$2,000 USD/month, depending on experience. Flexible above range for the right candidate.

- 3-month probation at full rate, or a paid 2–4 week trial first depending on portfolio and interview.                                                              

- Long-term role with rate reviews and growth into broader AI agency work as we onboard more clients.                                                                 





Why It's Worth Taking



- Real ownership — you'll be the systems person.

- Modern stack and varied work — including new projects with Claude Code and AI Agents.

- Direct line to the founder, fast decisions.

- We want to invest in you long-term.





How to Apply                                                                          



Subject line: Automation Specialist — PURPLE COMPASS — [Your Name]                    



Include:



1. Short intro in your own words - videos are welcome!

2. Evidence of work - screenshots or short videos of real GHL workflows, Make

scenarios, or tools you've built. (CV or Portfolio)                                                                                                                   

3. Expected monthly rate (USD) and earliest start date.

4. Confirmation you can work the night-shift hours.

5. Please include the keyword “PURPLE COMPASS” in your application.

title: Sales & Social Media Manager
description:
ABOUT PRESTIGIOUS CRAFT

Prestigious Craft is a boutique product studio based in Los Angeles. We build MVPs, prototypes, AI-powered products, and custom digital tools for founders, local businesses, startup teams, and corporate innovators. Our clients come to us with an idea — we turn it into a working product.

We are growing fast and looking for a driven, polished Sales & Social Media Manager to help us find clients and grow our brand presence online. This is a 100% commission role with strong earning potential — the right person can earn $1,500–$4,000+ per month based on performance. Opportunity for base salary in future DOP.





THE ROLE

This is a dual role. On the sales side, you will identify leads, conduct outreach, qualify prospects, and book discovery calls. On the social side, you will manage and grow our LinkedIn presence — writing posts, engaging with our audience, and building the Prestigious Craft brand in front of the right people.

This is not an order-taking role. We need someone who is proactive, creative, and genuinely excited about technology and business. You should be comfortable talking to founders and executives AND writing compelling content that stops people mid-scroll.





WHAT YOU'LL DO — SALES

Research and identify ideal client prospects using LinkedIn, directories, and social platforms

Conduct personalized outreach via LinkedIn,
, and other channels

Follow up consistently with leads — 5 to 7 touch point sequences

Qualify prospects by understanding their needs, timeline, and budget

Conduct initial discovery calls to uncover pain points and project requirements

Book qualified discovery calls onto the founder's calendar

Maintain and update the CRM (Google Sheets or similar) daily

Report weekly on outreach activity, pipeline status, and conversion metrics





WHAT YOU'LL DO — LINKEDIN & SOCIAL MEDIA

Manage the Prestigious Craft 
pany page and founder's personal LinkedIn profile

Write and publish 3 posts per week — educational content, case studies, behind-the-scenes, and direct offers

Engage with comments, respond to DMs, and grow our follower base organically

Identify trending topics in tech, AI, and startups and create timely content around them

Monitor LinkedIn analytics and adjust content strategy based on what performs

Repurpose content across other platforms (Instagram,
/X) as needed

Collaborate with the founder on content ideas, brand voice, and messaging





WHO YOU ARE

Fluent in English — written and spoken — with excellent communication skills

Experienced in B2B sales, business development, or lead generation (2+ years preferred)

Comfortable conducting discovery calls and asking qualifying questions

Familiar with ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) development and targeted outreach

Experienced managing LinkedIn pages and writing professional content that drives engagement

A strong writer — you can match a brand voice and write posts that feel human, not corporate

Self-motivated and able to work independently without daily supervision

Persistent and resilient — you don't give up after one "no"

Tech-savvy and comfortable discussing apps, software, and digital products at a high level

Organized and detail-oriented — you keep accurate records and follow through

Coachable — you take feedback and apply it quickly





NICE TO HAVE

Experience selling tech, software, or creative services

Familiarity with tools like LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, or similar

Experience with social media scheduling tools like Buffer, Hootsuite, or Later

Previous experience in a startup or agency environment

Understanding of MVP development, app builds, or AI products

Basic graphic design skills for creating social content (Canva is fine)





COMPENSATION STRUCTURE

This is a 100% commission role. Here is how you earn:

Referral / Warm Intro Only

10% of the closed project value, paid 30 days after the client deposit clears.

Active Sales (Discovery Call Through Close)

20% of the closed project value. Paid in two installments: 10% at client deposit, 10% at project delivery.

Example Earnings

Close one $5,000 Proof of Concept project ? you earn $1,000

Close one $12,000 MVP project ? you earn $2,400

Close two projects per month at $10,000 average ? you earn $4,000/month

There is no cap on earnings. The more you close, the more you make.





HOW WE WORK

We are a fully remote team. You will communicate with the founder via Slack, WhatsApp, or
. Weekly check-ins are required. You set your own schedule — we care about results, not hours.

We will provide you with: a clear ICP, outreach scripts and templates, a service deck and one-pager, objection handling guides, and access to our CRM. You bring the hustle.





HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, please send the following to 
 with the subject line: SDR Application – [Your Name]



A short video introduction (2–3 minutes) — tell us who you are, your sales and social media background, and why you want this role. Loom or Google Drive link is fine.

Your resume or a brief summary of your relevant experience

One example of a cold outreach message you have written or would write to a potential client of Prestigious Craft

One example LinkedIn post you have written or would write for Prestigious Craft — show us your content voice



Applications without a video introduction will not be reviewed.



We review applications on a rolling basis. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for a 20-minute video interview with the founder.

Work directly with the founder
