title: AI Content Creator - Short form Instagram Reels
description:
Ilic Group LLC · Full-time · Work from home



About the role



Hey! We're Ilic Group, and we run a large-scale short-form content operation across Instagram and
 — multiple accounts, multiple avatars, and a seriously organized production system. We're growing fast and looking for a creative, detail-oriented person from the Philippines to join our content team as an AI Content Creator.



This isn't a traditional video editing role. You'll be working with cutting-edge AI tools to produce short-form videos — mainly avatar-led recipe and wellness remedy content — by recreating and adapting viral video formats we provide. Everything is structured: you'll get daily tasks through our platform, so you always know exactly what to do and when.



What you'll do



- Receive daily content tasks through our internal platform (InstaFlow) — no guesswork involved

- Use AI video tools to produce short-form avatar-led videos based on proven viral formats

- Recreate recipe and wellness remedy videos with our character avatars speaking on screen

- Follow simple creative briefs to match the style, tone, and format of each avatar

- Submit completed videos through the platform for review — clean, consistent, on time



Tools you'll use



- NanoBananaPro

- Veo 3.1

- InstaFlow (our platform)

+ new tools as they launch



Don't worry if you haven't used these before — we'll walk you through everything. What matters most is that you're comfortable learning new AI tools quickly and following a process.



What we're looking for



- Based in the Philippines with reliable internet and a decent computer setup

- Comfortable using AI-powered tools — or excited to learn them fast

- Detail-oriented and able to follow creative briefs closely

- Reliable, consistent, and communicates well in English

- Previous content creation or video editing experience is a plus, but not required



What we provide



- All accounts provided

- All tools provided

- Platform access (InstaFlow)

- Daily tasks & clear briefs



We're a serious, established operation — not a side project. You'll have structure, support, and access to professional tools from day one. As we grow, new tools get added and you'll grow with us. If you're someone who likes knowing what's expected, works independently, and genuinely enjoys creating content, this is a great fit.





- Fill this form to apply properly:




/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScgUlMrSlSApv4gsMTgujqEp5zeXjzhit-LLpOH00pZsVbasQ/viewform?usp=sharing&ouid=

title: Video Ads Editor
description:
Novantro is a Reddit Marketing Agency helping B2B companies and agencies generate revenue from Reddit. We're founder-led, lean by design, and currently at $50K/month. Our goal is simple: hit $100K/month, and we're moving fast to get there.



Why We're Hiring



This role is for us, not our clients. We need a dedicated video editor to own all of Novantro's
 and Instagram ad creative the ads that bring new B2B clients to us.



We're looking for a video editor who lives and breathes
 and Instagram ads. This is not a general video editing role your primary focus will be cutting high-performing ad creative for Meta platforms (Feed, Reels, Stories) that stops the scroll, holds attention, and drives conversions. If you understand the difference between an ad that gets ignored and one that prints money, we want to talk to you.



What You'll Do



Edit short-form video ads (30-120 seconds) optimized for
 and Instagram placements (9:16, 1:1, 4:5).

Craft strong hooks within the first 3 seconds to maximize rate.

Add captions, text overlays, motion graphics, and sound design that work with sound off (and on).

Produce multiple variations of the same ad for A/B and creative testing (different hooks, CTAs, pacing, thumbnails).

Edit UGC-style content, talking-head videos, product demos, and mixed-format creatives.

Iterate quickly based on performance data if an ad is winning, cut more like it; if it's losing, diagnose why.

Stay current with Meta ad trends, formats, and policy requirements.



Must-Have Experience



2+ years editing video ads specifically for
 and Instagram (please share examples).

Strong portfolio of Meta ads you've edited, ideally with performance metrics (CTR, ROAS, hook rate) where possible.

Proficiency in Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, or equivalent.

Deep understanding of vertical/square video, native captioning, and Meta's ad specs.

Sense for direct-response pacing fast cuts, pattern interrupts, clear CTAs.

Ability to edit and deliver ads quickly without sacrificing quality (often multiple variations per concept).



Nice to Have



Experience editing for YouTube (long-form, YouTube Shorts, or YouTube ads).

Experience working directly with media buyers or performance marketers.



What We're NOT Looking For



Cinematic/narrative editors with no paid social experience.

Editors who need a polished brief for every project you should be able to look at raw footage and a product and know what to do.



Application Priority



To be considered first, fill out this application form with your Reddit experience and examples:

title: Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist (Remote)
description:
***MUST SUBMIT DISC SCORES AND VOICE RECORDING IN ORDER TO BE CONSIDERED***

We are hiring an Inbound Real Estate Lead Follow-Up & Qualification Specialist to handle warm inbound homeowner leads from people actively searching online to sell their homes.



This role exists to filter, qualify, or disqualify leads before they ever reach our acquisition team.



This is not sales, not cold calling, and not persuasion.



If you are comfortable asking direct questions, enforcing clear criteria, and ending calls professionally when a lead is not a fit, this role may be right for you.



What You’ll Be Doing



Respond to warm inbound homeowner inquiries (no cold calling)



Conduct structured qualification calls using a clear scorecard



Ask direct questions about:



motivation



timeline



property condition



decision-maker status



price expectations



Apply qualification rules consistently



Disqualify early when criteria are not met (this is considered success)



Transfer only clean, well-qualified opportunities to acquisitions



Document outcomes clearly in the CRM



You are evaluated on decision quality and discipline, not call volume.



Work Schedule & Availability (Important)



This role requires full-day availability, not just total hours.



Typical schedule:



4–5 hours work



2-hour break



4–5 hours work



Leads come in throughout the day and require timely follow-up.



This role is not suitable if you need a fragmented or flexible schedule.



Who This Role Is For



You may be a strong fit if you:



Are comfortable asking direct questions



Can say “no” calmly and professionally



Prefer clear rules over improvisation



Stay emotionally steady on calls



Document accurately and follow SOPs



Work well independently in a remote environment



Who This Role Is NOT For



This role is likely not a fit if you:



Are looking for a sales or commission-heavy role



Prefer persuasion over qualification



Dislike enforcing rules



Want flexibility instead of structure



Feel uncomfortable disqualifying friendly sellers



Preferred DISC Tendencies (Not Required, but Helpful)



Moderate Dominance (comfortable leading conversations)



Low–moderate Influence (professional, not sales-driven)



Moderate Steadiness (calm, patient)



Moderate Compliance (respects rules and processes)



High-pressure sales personalities are not a fit.



What We Offer



100% remote role



Consistent warm inbound leads



Clear SOPs, scorecards, and expectations



Stable, long-term opportunity for the right fit



Professional, process-driven team environment



How to Apply



Please include a short answer to this question with your application:



“When would you disqualify a seller who sounds friendly but does not meet your criteria?”

title: Wholesale Product Sourcing VA (Walmart & Amazon)
description:
Job Overview:

We are a US-based wholesale business selling on Amazon and Walmart marketplaces.

We work with established suppliers and product catalogs, focusing on sourcing and scaling proven products.

We are currently expanding our Walmart store, so experience with Walmart wholesale sourcing and listings is important for this role.



Responsibilities

- Work with new and existing supplier catalogs to identify products for Walmart (primary) and Amazon (secondary)

- Source and map products to Walmart listings first, then support Amazon sourcing as needed

- Create new listings and edit existing listings on Walmart Seller Central

- Upload images, update titles/descriptions, and fix listing issues

- Cross-check products between Amazon and Walmart

- Request pricing from suppliers (RFQs) when needed

- Analyze profitability (cost, fees, margins) using Google Sheets

- Support overall growth of Walmart (primary) and Amazon (secondary) channels



Requirements

- Minimum 2+ years of wholesale product sourcing experience (US marketplace)

- Experience with Walmart Seller Central (listing creation, editing, and issue resolution)

- Experience with Amazon Seller Central (US marketplace)

- Strong understanding of wholesale sourcing (not online arbitrage or dropshipping)

- Comfortable working with supplier catalogs, manual sourcing, and RFQs

- Ability to analyze profitability (cost, fees, margins, ROI)

- Familiar with Keepa and AZ Insight

- Good working knowledge of Google Sheets



Preferred:

- Experience with Sellify



To APPLY:

Please answer all of the following:



1. How many years of wholesale sourcing experience do you have? (US marketplace only wholesale experience, not online arbitrage or dropshipping. Also mention which product categories you worked on.)

2. Do you have Walmart sourcing and listing experience? If yes, how many years? Briefly explain your experience.

3. How many years of experience do you have using the following tools? Keepa, AZ Insight, Sellify (if any)

4. How many years of experience do you have working with supplier catalogs and RFQs? Brief explanation.

5. How many years of experience do you have with Amazon Seller Central (US marketplace)?



Please reply with detailed answers to all of the above questions and include your resume link.



DO NOT SEND AI-GENERATED RESPONSES.

title: Google Ads Media Buyer for E-Commerce Brands ($50K–$100K+/Month Budgets)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Google Ads Media Buyer to manage and scale campaigns for e-commerce brands.



This role is for someone who has real experience managing large budgets and driving profitable growth. You must have experience managing at least $50,000–$100,000+ per month in Google Ads spend for e-commerce brands.



This will start with one project for now, with the opportunity to manage additional projects as we grow.



This is a long-term opportunity with consistent work and growth.



Responsibilities



• Manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns across Search, Shopping, Performance Max, and YouTube

• Handle monthly budgets of $50,000–$100,000+

• Improve ROAS, CPA, and overall account performance

• Scale profitable campaigns and reduce wasted spend

• Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis

• Optimize Shopping feeds and campaign structure

• Monitor performance daily and make ongoing optimizations



Requirements



• Proven experience managing Google Ads for e-commerce brands

• Experience managing $50K–$100K+/month in ad spend

• Strong experience with Shopping and Performance Max campaigns

• Strong understanding of ROAS, CPA, and scaling strategies

• Detail-oriented and reliable

• Strong English communication



Nice to Have



• Experience with Shopify brands

• Agency experience

• Experience with Meta Ads



Position Details



• Starts with one project, with opportunity for more as we grow

• Long-term opportunity

• Competitive pay based on experience



To apply, please include your experience, monthly budgets managed, example results, and e-commerce brands you have worked with. When you reply to this post, add the word "grape" at the end of the title of your reply.

title: Meta Ads Specialist – B2B Lead Generation (Marketing Agency)
description:
We’re a growth-focused marketing agency looking for a Meta Ads Specialist with hands-on experience running
 and Instagram ad campaigns for B2B lead generation. This role is focused on driving qualified leads to landing page funnels for service-based businesses, not e-commerce.



We are currently running Meta ads, and performance is not where it needs to be. We’re looking for someone who can diagnose what’s not working and clearly outline how to improve results.



You will own campaigns end-to-end, from strategy and setup to optimization and reporting, with a strong emphasis on performance, cost efficiency, and lead quality.



Key Responsibilities

• Plan, build, and manage Meta 
 & Instagram) ad campaigns for B2B lead generation

• Audit existing campaigns and funnels to identify performance issues and improvement opportunities

• Drive traffic to landing page funnels (not instant forms only) and optimize for conversions

• Develop, test, and iterate ad creatives (copy, angles, hooks) in collaboration with the creative team

• Set up and manage audiences, including cold, retargeting, and lookalikes

• Monitor daily performance metrics (CPL, CTR, CVR, spend pacing, lead quality)

• Optimize campaigns through creative testing, audience refinement, and budget adjustments

• Ensure proper tracking and attribution (Meta Pixel, CAPI, GA, CRM integrations)

• Provide clear reporting, insights, and recommendations based on performance data



Required Experience

• 2+ years managing Meta Ads for B2B lead generation

• Proven experience running ads to landing page funnels for service-based businesses or agencies

• Strong understanding of funnel-based lead gen 

• Demonstrated ability to audit and turn around underperforming ad accounts

• Experience optimizing for CPL and lead quality, not just lead volume



Audit as Part of the Hiring Process

As part of the interview process, qualified candidates will be asked to complete a short audit of our current Meta ad setup to demonstrate how they think and approach optimization.



Compensation & Growth Opportunity

• Remote role

• Contract or full-time depending on fit

• Compensation is flexible and based on experience

• There is upside for strong performance and the opportunity to earn more over time



How to Apply

Please include:

• A brief overview of your Meta Ads experience

• Examples of B2B lead gen campaigns you’ve managed (industries, budgets, results)

• If you read the entire post, include the word “banana” somewhere in your reply

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant
description:
Hi, my name is Cameron. I’m a real estate agent based in Florida, and I run a fast-paced, growing business. I’m looking to hire a part time Real Estate Virtual Assistant who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and dependable. This is a long-term role with room to grow.



Introduction Video -  



You’ll be helping manage the backend of my business so I can stay focused on clients and growth. If you’re someone who takes initiative, thrives with structure, and enjoys supporting a team behind the scenes, this could be a great fit for you.



Communication Expectations

I value open and efficient communication. You can reach me via
, text, call, or WhatsApp, whichever is most convenient. I would like to receive a weekly
 update every Monday to review the previous week’s accomplishments and activities. Additionally, we will meet for 15-20 minutes every Monday to review your prior weeks performance, answer any questions and discuss upcoming tasks and priorities.



Working Hours

It is important that work is conducted during business hours (9AM - 5PM Eastern Time M-F) to ensure alignment with client and business needs.



Our Values and Mission

Integrity, honesty, professionalism, problem-solving, knowledge, and a commitment to excellence are the values that drive this business. Our mission is to provide exceptional real estate services that address the unique needs and concerns of each client, ensuring smooth and successful transactions through professionalism, responsiveness, and strong advocacy.



At the same time, we believe in taking care of each other as much as we care for our clients. This business represents three years of dedication, hard work, and passion, and your role will be instrumental in helping us continue to deliver exceptional service and grow to new heights.





Core Responsibilities

This role includes, but is not limited to:



Data Entry 



Sending weekly seller updates and collecting showing feedback

 

Scheduling and coordinating open houses



Marketing & Content Support



Managing Instagram,
, and YouTube uploads

Creating Canva flyers using provided templates



Clipping short-form videos from long-form content (training provided)



Ordering marketing materials, closing gifts, and print items



Calendar & Communication Management



Maintaining clean records and tracking communications



Admin & Back-End Support



Paying invoices and organizing receipts



Assisting with QuickBooks (training available if needed)



Organizing digital files and documents (Google Drive, AppFiles)



Supporting automation setup via Zapier and system improvement



Tools You'll Be Using

Follow Up Boss (CRM)



Canva



QuickBooks



Google Workspace (Drive, Docs, Sheets, Calendar)



Asana



Slack



Zoom



Loom



Vulcan7, Fello, Constant Contact



ShowingTime



Screenshot Monitor



RPR & Florida MLS systems



What I'm Looking For

Strong written and verbal English communication



1+ year experience as a VA or administrative assistant (real estate is a plus)



Proficiency with tools like Canva, Google Suite, and Slack



Attention-to-detail, Highly organized, reliable, and proactive



Ability to problem-solve independently and meet deadlines



Comfortable working during U.S. business hours



Coachable and committed to long-term growth



Bonus If You Have Experience With

MLS input (especially in Florida markets)



Real estate marketing



Zapier or workflow automation



QuickBooks or expense tracking



How to Apply



If this sounds like a good fit, please complete the application using the link provided. Please specifically mention this is for the Florida Real Estate VA Position. We will only review applicants who follow all instructions and complete the full form. Selected applicants may be asked to complete a short paid trial task and a Zoom interview.

title: Shopify Website Specialist - Project Based
description:
Project Scope: 

We are looking for someone who can quickly and efficiently:

- Update the Shopify template to a newer, on-trend look

- Create homepage banners and featured sections that link with Shopify

- Upload and organize products

- Optimize product pages (descriptions, layout, formatting)

- Create or refine collections

- Ensure the site reflects current promotions and campaigns

- Improve overall user experience (mobile + desktop)

- Identify and fix small issues (layout, spacing, broken links, etc.)



What We’re Looking For:

- Proven experience working with Shopify websites (required)

- Strong understanding of eCommerce best practices

- Experience with fashion or retail brands (highly preferred)

- Ability to work quickly without sacrificing quality

- Strong attention to detail

- Good English communication

- Ability to follow directions AND suggest improvements



Ideal Candidate:

- Has worked on live Shopify stores (not just test/demo sites)

- Understands how to make a site feel on-brand and conversion-focused

- Comfortable making updates without constant supervision

- Can spot issues and proactively fix them



Available for quick turnaround: Goal to launch the new site within 30-days from hire. 



Deliverables:

1. Updated and optimized the Shopify website aligned with the current brand direction

2. Clean, functional, and mobile-friendly pages

3. Clear communication on what was completed and any recommendations



Opportunity for Ongoing Work:

If the project goes well, we are open to continuing with:

 - Hourly support for weekly/monthly updates

- Ongoing product uploads and merchandising

- Campaign and promotion updates



How to Apply (Required)

Please include:

1. A short introduction

2. Links to Shopify websites you have worked on (REQUIRED)

3. A brief description of what you specifically did on each site

4. Your experience with fashion or eCommerce brands (if applicable)



Your hourly rate (USD) and/or project rate - $400–$800 based on experience



Your availability and estimated turnaround time - Can you commit to a 30-day turnaround?



Applications without Shopify examples will not be considered.



Bonus (Optional but Strongly Recommended)

Briefly answer:

After visiting our website, 
, what are 2–3 things you would change first? 



About Prestige:

Prestige is a Los Angeles–based women’s fashion brand, family-owned and operating since 2006. We specialize in trend-forward, fast-moving styles and are continuously updating our online store to reflect new arrivals, promotions, and seasonal campaigns.



We’re looking for a skilled Shopify Website Specialist to support a focused website update project with a fast but detail-oriented turnaround—with the opportunity for ongoing work.



Company: Prestige

Website: 

Industry: Women’s Fast Fashion (Los Angeles–based)

Founded: 2006 (Family-run business)

title: Marketing/Sales/Advertising for a hostel brand
description:
I have never hired someone for marketing, so I am trying something new to see if there is an ROI:



I operate PodShare, a shared housing hospitality concept with multiple California locations. I am looking for someone highly proactive, analytical, and execution-focused who can help increase bookings and partnerships.



This is not a passive content role. I am looking for someone who takes ownership of results and is obsessed with improving occupancy.

 

I am looking for someone to 



1) Create lists of schools, organizations, non profits, wedding planners, event promotoers etc. to cold call and setup tours of our facility, buyout for sports teams, pitch intern housing - with follow ups by
 and social media messages.

title: Customer Support Specialist Application – Fashion E-commerce
description:
Customer Support Specialist Application – Fashion E-commerce



Thank you for your interest in joining our customer support team. We are a fast-growing fashion e-commerce brand and are looking for an experienced Customer Support Specialist who can handle high volumes of inquiries while maintaining a friendly, professional tone.



Role Overview

As part of our support team, you will be responsible for handling customer inquiries via Zendesk, assisting with order-related questions, managing returns and refunds, and ensuring a smooth customer experience. You will also communicate internally via 
 and occasionally coordinate with suppliers when needed.



Required Experience



* Strong experience with Zendesk (ticket handling, macros, automation)

* Good understanding of Shopify (orders, tracking, product info, customer data)

* Experience in fashion e-commerce and/or dropshipping stores

* Comfortable working in a remote team environment using 

* Ability to handle high ticket volumes efficiently



Application Questions



Please answer the following questions in detail:



1. Zendesk Experience

   Are you familiar with Zendesk?

   After responding to a customer
, do you usually set the ticket to Open, Pending, or Solved? Please explain your workflow.



2. Shopify Knowledge

   How well are you familiar with Shopify?

   What kind of tasks have you handled within Shopify (e.g., order management, refunds, tracking, product info)?



3. 
 Communication

   Our team communicates entirely through 
, including supplier contact.

   Are you familiar with 
, and have you used it in a work environment before?



4. Dropshipping / Fashion Experience

   With how many fashion or dropshipping stores have you worked?

   If possible, please share reference websites or brands you have supported.



5. Current Work Situation

   Are you currently working as a customer support agent for other stores?

   If not, why did you stop working with your previous employer?



6. Return Handling (Practical Question)

   What would your response be to a customer who wants to return a fashion item?

   Please write out the exact message you would send.



7. Wrong Size Scenario (Practical Question)

   What would your response be to a customer who says the size they ordered does not fit correctly?

   Please write out the exact message you would send.



We are looking for someone reliable, detail-oriented, and proactive, who can think along with the business and maintain a high level of customer satisfaction.



We look forward to your application.



Kind regards,

Kelvin

title: Property Ops Lead – Guest Experience + Refurb Coordination
description:
We are a UK-based property investment and serviced accommodation (SA) management company. We operate seven serviced accommodation units and focus on delivering a consistent, high-standard guest experience through strong operational systems and quality control. Alongside SA operations, we run two to three active refurbishment/development projects at any given time, coordinating contractors, procurement, documentation, and stakeholder communication to deliver projects efficiently and to a high standard.



This is a hands-on Operations Lead role responsible for execution across our serviced accommodation portfolio and coordination support across refurbishment/development projects. Your core focus is proactive quality control and consistent delivery: you’ll enforce standards through checklists and evidence, ensure guests have a smooth end-to-end experience, and reduce recurring issues by continuously improving SOPs. In parallel, you’ll support project coordination for refurbishments by running follow-ups with contractors and suppliers, managing documentation, and scheduling appointments to keep workstreams moving without drift.



We’re hiring an Operations Lead who can run a cadence, enforce quality standards, and coordinate delivery across both serviced accommodation and active refurb projects.



Monday- Sunday:10:00-18:00 ( with 1 hour break) UK time, Saturday or Sunday off for one day.

Salary :700 USD Per month+ KPI bonus



Core responsibilities

Serviced Accommodation operations (delivery + standards)

- Enforce unit standards using checklists, photo evidence, and “definition of done” quality bars.

- Manage guest communications: fast responses, professional tone, calm resolution, and proactive updates.

- Maintain an issues/defects log and ensure issues are fully closed with root-cause prevention (not just “ticket closed”).

- Coordinate cleaners and operational VAs: confirm turnovers, verify quality, and drive consistent performance.

- Monitor pricing and availability: check pricing rules are being applied, flag risks/opportunities, and escalate recommendations.

- Create and update listings: listing setup, copy accuracy, amenities, house rules, photo requirements, and platform compliance ( ---------- as applicable).

- Maintain and improve SOPs: update processes based on recurring issues, guest feedback, and operational learnings.

Property project coordination (admin execution)

- Maintain a project tracker for tasks, owners, due dates, and blockers.

- Source and compare quotes: produce a quote comparison table and recommendation.

- Follow-up with contractors, suppliers, utilities, council, other professional, keep reference numbers, paper trail, and next-step ownership.

- Documentation: build/format/update project packs, submissions, and version control.

- Appointment scheduling: inspections, contractor visits, deliveries, surveys, and access coordination.

Reporting directly to company CEO



Tools and working style

- We use Lark for communication, tracking, and internal workflows.

- Google Drive for document storage and document control.

- PMS/pricing tools as applicable (Hostaway/PriceLabs or similar).



Must-have experience

- Evidence-based quality control: Create and used checklists/audits/photo evidence used to enforce standards and reduce recurring issues.

- Serviced accommodation or hospitality ops: guest comms + turnover coordination + issue resolution.

- Property management working experience

- Vendor/contractor coordination: proactive follow-up, scheduling, and timeline control.

- Strong written English: crisp guest messaging and concise leadership updates.

- SOP ownership: has maintained/improved SOPs based on operational reality, not just followed them.

Nice-to-have experience

- Listing creation and optimization ( ---------- ).

- Pricing/availability monitoring and familiarity with revenue management tools (e.g., PriceLabs).

- Property management operations or refurb coordination admin.

Personality traits we’re looking for

- Conscientious and detail-accurate.

- Proactive follow-up and ownership mindset.

- Structured and process-driven (lives in checklists/trackers).

- Calm, professional, and solution-oriented with guests and vendors.

- Improves systems continuously rather than firefighting repeatedly.

- Well organised with multiple task and able to prioritise



Hiring process:

Step 1: Answer the Google link below (required) and follow the instructions after.

Step 2: Answer scenario based questions

Step 3: Join 20-minute screening call

Step 4: Paid trial task

Step 5: Final interview + references



HOW TO APPLY:



Click the link ----------

I’ll be in touch with you in 3-5 working days.



Please note, we ONLY accept applications through this application process. PLEASE DO NOT use the website’s message board as we don’t monitor this.

title: Video Marketing & Ads Growth Specialist (Real Estate Focus)
description:
The Role

I am looking for a marketing partner to turn raw video footage into lead generation. You will not only edit video but also manage Custom Audience Targeting using skip-traced property lists to ensure our ads are seen by specific high-intent homeowners and out-of-state landlords.



Responsibilities

Video Editing: Take raw phone footage and edit it into engaging YouTube Shorts and long-form videos with captions, hooks, and branding.

Data & List Management: Handle CSV uploads of skip-traced property lists (Non-Owner Occupied, Probate, etc.) into Google and
 Ads.

Custom Audience Targeting: Set up and manage Google Customer Match and
 Custom Audiences to retarget specific individuals from our lead lists.

Omni-Channel Retargeting: Ensure anyone who visits our website or appears on our "high-potential" lists sees our video ads across YouTube and social media.

YouTube SEO: Optimize video metadata to ensure we rank for local "Sell my house fast" keywords in the Salt Lake Valley.



Required Skills & Qualifications

Proficient in Video Editing: Expert in CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or DaVinci Resolve.

Ad Tech Mastery: Proven experience with Google Ads Manager, Customer Match, and Retargeting Pixels.

Data Handling: Comfortable cleaning and formatting CSV files for ad platform uploads.

Real Estate Knowledge: (Highly Preferred) Experience working with PropStream, BatchLeads, or similar REI data tools.

Language: Excellent written and verbal English skills.

Work Ethic: A "self-starter" attitude. I am looking for someone who works hard and takes ownership of the lead-gen results.



Why Work with Us?

Long-Term Growth: This is a permanent position for the right person as we scale our Salt Lake operations.

Direct Access: You will work directly with the owner, Eric.

Professional Impact: Your work will directly help local families solve difficult property problems.

title: Online Arbitrage VA
description:
About Us:

We are a new but fast-growing Amazon business specializing in online arbitrage. Although we're still in the early stages, we’re scaling quickly and building a team of highly skilled professionals who are serious about long-term success. Our goal is to create a results-driven, supportive, and collaborative environment where tea
mbers grow with us.



Job Description:

We are looking for a highly skilled and experienced Amazon Online Arbitrage Virtual Assistant (OA VA) to join our team! If you’re already familiar with sourcing profitable products for Amazon FBA/FBM using online arbitrage methods, this is the perfect opportunity for you.



You must be comfortable working independently, managing time effectively, and using proven sourcing tools and techniques to find winning products that meet our criteria.



Responsibilities:

- Daily sourcing of profitable products.

- Analyze products.

- Maintain and update sourcing spreadsheets

- Communicate progress daily and meet sourcing targets



Requirements:

- At least 2 years of hands-on experience in Amazon Online Arbitrage sourcing

- Strong knowledge of tools like Keepa, SAS, Google Sheets, and Amazon Seller Central

- Excellent attention to detail and analytical skills

- Ability to adapt based on direct feedback

- Strong communication skills in English

- A quiet work environment with a stable internet connection

- Self-motivated and reliable



When Applying:

Please answer the following questions in your application or send me a message with your responses:



- How long have you worked in Amazon Online Arbitrage?

- Which sourcing techniques have you used?

- Which tools do you currently use and feel confident with?

- What Keepa and SellerAmp criteria make a product profitable?

- How many profitable leads can you find per day on average?



Starting Pay:

$3/hr is the starting pay. We believe in rewarding performance and loyalty. If you are meeting sourced product criteria, noticeably improving with feedback, and maintaining a 3 lead per day pace in profitable leads, then you can expect a monthly raise.



If you’re looking for a stable, full-time opportunity with room to grow and contribute to a fast-moving environment, we’d love to hear from you and have you as part of our team!

title: Direct Response Copywriter — E-Commerce (Facebook Ads)
description:
???? About Us

We are Vertofix, a fast-growing German e-commerce brand in the back pain / sciatica relief niche. We sell a physical health product to customers aged 55-68 in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. We scale with
 Ads — long-form native image ads, VSL scripts, and advertorials. Our ads are direct response — every word must sell, not just sound nice.

We already have winning ads and proven angles. We need a copywriter who can take our winning frameworks and produce high volumes of new ad concepts, hook variations, and scripts that convert.

???? Position Details

Position: Direct Response Copywriter

Type: Remote

Start: ASAP

Workload: 15-25 hours per week

Daily Work: Write 1-3 new ad scripts or variations per day

???? Compensation

Starting Rate: $4/hour (depending on experience and skill level)

Growth:

Higher pay for consistent winners

Bonus structure for ads that scale (negotiable)

More creative ownership over time

???? Your Role

Your job is to:

Write long-form
 ad copy (
words) for native image ads

Write VSL scripts (2-6 minutes) based on creative briefs

Write hook variations and lead variations for existing winning ads

Write advertorial-style landing page copy

Research customer language, pain points, and objections to use in copy

Follow our proven frameworks and adapt them to new angles and spokespersons

???? Responsibilities

Receive creative briefs with angle, spokesperson, emotion, and lead type specified

Write complete ad scripts ready for design or video production

Produce 5-10 hook variations per winning ad concept

Study our existing winners and understand WHY they work

Use customer research (survey responses, reviews, forum posts) as copy ingredients

Write in a conversational, emotional tone — NOT corporate, NOT academic

Deliver on time — deadlines are non-negotiable

? Requirements (IMPORTANT)

You MUST have:

At least 6 months experience writing direct response copy for paid ads 
, Instagram, YouTube — NOT blog posts, NOT SEO articles, NOT social media captions)

Understanding of direct response concepts: hooks, leads, unique mechanism, objection handling, CTA, awareness levels

Experience writing long-form ad copy (500+ words) that has actually been tested and run as paid ads

Ability to write in different voices (patient perspective, doctor perspective, spouse perspective, etc.)

Understanding of health/pain niche is a BIG plus

English is required — German is a bonus but not required (we can translate)

???? This job is NOT for you if:

You write "brand copy" that sounds pretty but doesn't sell

You have never had your copy tested as a paid ad

You don't know what a "hook" or "lead type" is

You cannot write from different spokesperson perspectives

You need a week to write one ad — we need daily output

???? FILTER QUESTIONS (VERY IMPORTANT)

You MUST answer ALL questions to be considered.

If you don't answer properly, your application will be ignored.



Direct Response Experience

How long have you been writing direct response copy for paid ads?

???? Be specific — months + what types of copy 
 ads, VSLs, advertorials,
s, etc.)

Results

What is the best result a piece of your copy has achieved?

???? Be specific — ROAS, revenue generated, number of sales, or any metric you can share

Frameworks

Name 3 different "lead types" you know and briefly explain each one.

???? If you don't know what a lead type is, this role is not for you.

Health Niche

Have you written copy in the health, pain relief, or wellness niche before?

???? If yes, describe what product and what angle. If no, explain why you can still do it.

Speed

If I give you a creative brief at 9am with angle, spokesperson, emotion, and target audience defined — how fast can you deliver a finished 800-word ad script?

???? Be honest

Voice Switching

I need one ad from the perspective of a frustrated patient, and another from the perspective of a guilty doctor who regrets recommending surgery. Can you write both?

???? Explain how you approach writing from different perspectives

Trial Task

Are you willing to complete a paid trial task where you write 2 ad scripts based on our creative brief, competing against other applicants?

???? Yes / No

Portfolio

Send 2-3 examples of direct response ad copy you have written.

????
 ads, VSL scripts, advertorials, landing pages — anything that was used as a PAID AD. Screenshots of live ads are best.

Attention Test (IMPORTANT)

Write the word: MECHANISM at the BEGINNING of your application.

(If missing ? instant rejection)

Availability

How many hours per week can you dedicate?

???? Specify hours and timezone

Long-Term Interest

Are you looking for a long-term position or just a quick project?

???? Yes / No + explain



???? How to Apply

Send:

The word MECHANISM as first word

Short introduction

Answers to ALL 11 questions

2-3 portfolio examples of direct response copy

Your hourly rate expectation

???? Final Note

Copy is the foundation of everything we do. Our winning ads have generated thousands of sales. We need a copywriter who understands WHY they work and can produce more of them — faster and at higher volume. If you eat, sleep, and breathe direct response copy, this is your role. But it starts with your application. Show us you actually read this.



?? MINIMUM REQUIREMENT — READ BEFORE APPLYING

If you have not worked for at least 3 different e-commerce stores or brands in this role, DO NOT apply. We are not looking for beginners. We are not looking for people who "want to learn." We need someone who has done this before, multiple times, for real businesses with real revenue.

title: Social Media Manager- Music & Entertainment
description:
## Job Description: Music & Artist Brand Social Media Manager



**Role:** Social Media Manager, Music & Artist Brand

**Type:** Freelance, part-time, or contract-to-hire

**Location:** Remote

**Reports to:** Artist / Management / Creative Director



### Overview



We are seeking a music and artist brand Social Media Manager to oversee, grow, and engage an established artist’s online community across social platforms, streaming channels, ecommerce, and fan touchpoints.



The core of this role is **writing**. The right candidate must be able to write in the voice and tone of the artist with nuance, restraint, emotional intelligence, and consistency. This person should understand how to translate an artist’s world into captions, replies, product copy, fan messages, campaign posts, release language, and platform-specific storytelling without making it feel generic, over-marketed, or detached from the artist’s identity.



This role requires someone who understands music culture, fan communities, artist mythology, and the care required to represent a highly personal creative voice online.



### Key Responsibilities



#### Voice, Tone & Copywriting



Write social captions, community replies, campaign copy, merch descriptions, ecommerce blurbs, streaming posts,
 snippets, and short-form scripts in the artist’s established voice.



Develop and maintain a clear voice and tone guide for the artist across social, streaming, ecommerce, and fan communications.



Capture the artist’s emotional register, humor, mystery, intelligence, vulnerability, and cadence without over-explaining or diluting the brand.



Adapt writing for each platform while keeping the artist’s voice consistent.



Avoid generic music marketing language, forced trends, corporate phrasing, or copy that feels disconnected from the artist.



Help turn lyrics, archival materials, visual assets, fan comments, cultural references, and behind-the-scenes 
nts into compelling written content.



#### Social Media Strategy & Management



Develop and manage the artist’s social media presence across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
, X, Threads, 
, Reddit, and other relevant platforms.



Create and maintain a content calendar for releases, merch drops, streaming campaigns, fan engagement, archival storytelling, live 
nts, and cultural opportunities.



Translate the artist’s creative world into social content that feels personal, intelligent, emotional, and fan-aware.



Identify trends and platform behaviors that can be used thoughtfully without compromising the artist’s voice.



#### Community & Fan Engagement



Monitor and engage with fans across comments, DMs, tags, shares, posts, and fan communities.



Respond in a tone that feels human, intimate, smart, and aligned with the artist’s voice.



Track fan sentiment, recurring questions, collectible interest, merch demand, and release feedback.



Identify superfans, creators, collectors, remixers, gamers, and community voices who can help amplify the brand.



#### Streaming & Music Platform Support



Support growth and engagement across Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, Amazon Music, Bandcamp, SoundCloud, and related music platforms.



Coordinate social campaigns around streaming links, playlists, pre-saves, video premieres, lyric content, live recordings, vinyl releases, and catalog discovery.



Help optimize artist profiles, platform descriptions, visual assets, links, and messaging where applicable.



Track streaming 
nts, playlist adds, fan-generated spikes, and relevant data signals.



#### Ecommerce & Merchandise Promotion



Support social promotion for the artist’s ecommerce store, vinyl releases, limited editions, apparel, collectibles, and special drops.



Write product and campaign copy that gives merchandise context, story, scarcity, and emotional value.



Connect product pages, social posts,
 campaigns, and fan engagement into a cohesive sales funnel.



Monitor customer questions related to products, shipping, availability, sizing, editions, and collectible value, escalating as needed.



#### Content Development



Source and organize visual assets, video clips, lyrics, archival materials, press quotes, fan content, and release assets.



Collaborate with editors, designers, ecommerce managers, and the artist team to produce platform-specific content.



Help shape posts around the artist’s music, story, creative process, collaborations, vinyl culture, gaming connections, and fan mythology.



#### Analytics & Reporting



Track growth, engagement, reach, clicks, saves, shares, follower quality, ecommerce referrals, streaming conversions, and fan sentiment.



Provide weekly or bi-weekly reports with clear insights and recommendations.



Identify which posts, platforms, content types, copy approaches, and fan conversations are driving the most value.



Recommend testing strategies for posting frequency, creative formats, paid boosts, ecommerce CTAs, and streaming campaigns.



### Ideal Experience



3+ years managing social media, copywriting, or community engagement for an artist, music brand, label, entertainment property, ecommerce brand, or fan-driven cultural brand.



Exceptional writing ability is required.



Strong understanding of artist voice, tone, cadence, subtext, and storytelling.



Ability to write emotionally resonant copy that can be poetic, restrained, mysterious, funny, direct, intimate, or promotional as needed.



Experience writing captions, fan replies, product copy, launch copy,
 snippets, short-form video scripts, and campaign language.



Strong understanding of music marketing, artist storytelling, fandoms, streaming behavior, and merch culture.



Experience with Instagram, TikTok, YouTube,
, X, Threads, 
, Reddit, Shopify, Spotify for Artists, Apple Music for Artists, YouTube Studio, Bandcamp, and
/social campaign tools.



Comfortable engaging with passionate fans and protecting the artist’s voice.



Interest in alternative music, legacy artists, gaming culture, ARG-style storytelling, vinyl, fan collectibles, and immersive artist worlds is a major plus.



### Core Skills



Artist voice copywriting

Social media writing

Community management

Music marketing

Fan engagement

Tone of voice development

Caption writing

Ecommerce copywriting

Streaming campaign support

Short-form video copy

Content calendars

Analytics and reporting

Shopify and merch campaign support

Platform trend awareness

Brand storytelling



### Success Metrics



Consistent, high-quality writing in the artist’s voice

Growth in engaged followers across priority platforms

Increased fan interaction, comments, shares, saves, and DMs

Higher traffic from social to streaming and ecommerce

Improved merch drop performance and product awareness

Stronger fan sentiment and community participation

Consistent content cadence across channels

Clear reporting and actionable insights

Authentic preservation of the artist’s voice, tone, mythology, and creative identity



### Personality Fit



The right person is first and foremost a writer: someone who can listen closely, absorb a voice, and write from inside the artist’s world without imitating it badly or reducing it to marketing language.



They should be strategic but not corporate, organized but not rigid, culturally fluent but not trend-chasing, and emotionally intelligent enough to represent an artist with a deep, loyal, and highly invested fan base.



This is not just a music act. It is a world, a history, a voice, a mystery, a community, and a living creative system. This role is about helping that world speak clearly, consistently, and powerfully online.

 management

title: Shopify Manager & Web Developer — E-Commerce Brand
description:
:

???? About Us

We are Vertofix, a fast-growing German e-commerce brand in the back pain / sciatica relief niche. We sell via Shopify to customers aged 55-68 in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland. We are scaling aggressively and need someone who keeps our Shopify store optimized, implements funnel changes, and makes sure nothing breaks while we grow.

This is a technical execution role with strategic impact. Every change you make on the store directly affects our conversion rate and revenue.

???? Position Details

Position: Shopify Manager & Web Developer

Type: Remote

Start: ASAP

Workload: 10-20 hours per week

Daily Work: Implement store changes, build landing pages, set up upsells, fix bugs, optimize for conversions

???? Compensation

Starting Rate: $4/hour (depending on skill level)

Growth:

More hours as we add products and funnels

Higher pay based on performance and complexity of work

Long-term position with increasing responsibility

???? Your Role

Your job is to:

Manage and maintain our Shopify store daily

Build and edit landing pages and advertorial pages

Implement and optimize post-purchase upsells (OTOs)

Set up order bumps and in-cart upsells

A/B test product pages, pricing, and page layouts

Install and configure Shopify apps

Fix bugs and broken elements quickly

Ensure mobile optimization (80%+ of our traffic is mobile)

Implement tracking pixels and conversion scripts when needed

???? Responsibilities

Build new landing pages based on designs or wireframes we provide

Set up and optimize post-purchase upsell flows (using apps like ReConvert, AfterSell, or similar)

Create and manage order bump offers on checkout

Edit product pages (copy, images, layout, trust badges, social proof sections)

Monitor site speed and fix anything that slows it down

Set up and manage discount codes and promotions

Implement Zigpoll post-purchase surveys

Manage Klaviyo integration with Shopify

Add fake comment sections or social proof elements to advertorial pages when needed

Ensure all pages work perfectly on mobile devices

? Requirements (IMPORTANT)

You MUST have:

At least 6 months experience managing a live Shopify store that was actively selling and running paid traffic

Experience with Shopify Liquid (basic code editing — not just drag and drop)

Experience setting up post-purchase upsells / OTOs

Experience building custom landing pages on Shopify

Understanding of conversion rate optimization (CRO) — you know what makes people buy

Experience with at least 3 of these apps: ReConvert, AfterSell, PageFly, GemPages, Zipify, Vitals, Loox, 

Mobile-first mindset — everything you build must look perfect on phone

???? This job is NOT for you if:

You only know WordPress or WooCommerce

You have never worked on a store doing real revenue with paid traffic

You only use drag-and-drop and cannot touch Liquid code

You take 3 days to make a small page edit

You don't test your work on mobile before delivering

???? FILTER QUESTIONS (VERY IMPORTANT)

You MUST answer ALL questions to be considered.

If you don't answer properly, your application will be ignored.



Shopify Experience

How long have you been working with Shopify?

???? Be specific — months + what stores you managed + approximate monthly revenue of those stores

Liquid Code

Rate your Shopify Liquid coding skills from 1-10 and give one example of something you built or fixed using Liquid.

???? Be specific

Post-Purchase Upsells

Have you set up post-purchase upsell flows (OTOs) before?

???? Which app did you use? What was the upsell take rate?

Landing Pages

Have you built custom landing pages on Shopify for paid traffic?

???? Describe one you built and what conversion rate it achieved

CRO Understanding

We have a product page with 30 Add-to-Carts per day but only 3 purchases. What would you investigate and test?

???? Explain your diagnosis process

Mobile Optimization

What specific things do you check and fix when optimizing a Shopify page for mobile?

???? List at least 4 things

Speed

If I send you a wireframe for a new landing page at 10am, how fast can you have it live on the store?

???? Be honest

Apps

Which Shopify apps have you installed and configured before?

???? List all of them

Portfolio

Send 2-3 links to live Shopify stores you have worked on, or screenshots of pages you built.

???? Blur sensitive data if needed

Attention Test (IMPORTANT)

Write the word: CONVERSION at the BEGINNING of your application.

(If missing ? instant rejection)

Availability

How many hours per week can you work?

???? Specify hours and timezone

Long-Term Interest

Are you looking for a long-term position?

???? Yes / No + explain



???? How to Apply

Send:

The word CONVERSION as first word

Short introduction

Answers to ALL 12 questions

2-3 portfolio examples

Your hourly rate expectation

???? Final Note

Our store is the foundation of our entire business. Every percentage point of conversion rate improvement means thousands of euros in additional revenue. If you understand Shopify deeply and know how to make stores convert, this is a high-impact role with real growth. But it starts with your application. Show us you actually read this.

?? MINIMUM REQUIREMENT — READ BEFORE APPLYING

If you have worked for only 1 or 2 stores, you are not ready for this role. No exceptions. We will ask for proof during the interview process.

title: Instagram DM Outreach Specialist — UK Fitness Niche (Part-Time, Long-Term)
description:
Hi! I run a video editing agency for UK fitness coaches and I'm hiring a reliable Virtual Assistant to handle cold DM outreach on Instagram across two of my brand accounts.

English requirement (read first):

You MUST be able to write fluent, natural-sounding English. This role involves writing a personalized opening line for each prospect, and the message has to read like a real native English speaker wrote it. Generic copy-paste DMs will not work. If your written English is not excellent, please do not apply.

What you'll do:

Each morning I'll send you 1–3 source Instagram accounts (other UK fitness coaches with big followings). Your job is to:



Open those accounts and scroll through their followers (and/or who they follow)

Find UK-based fitness coaches who match the criteria below

DM each prospect using my template, with a personalized opening line referencing their content



How to pick good prospects from the source accounts:



UK-based (check bio/location/content references)

1,000–50,000 followers

Posts regularly (active in the last 2 weeks)

Personal brand/coach (not a gym, brand, or company page)

Fitness/coaching niche (not nutritionist, physio, yoga unless they coach)



Daily flow:



3 sessions per day, ~45 mins each, working UK time, Monday–Friday only

Sessions: 8am UK / 1pm UK / 8pm UK (= 3pm / 8pm / 3am Manila)

Volume: starts at ~15 DMs/day in week 1, ramps to 100–120 DMs/day across both accounts by week 4

Log every DM in a Google Sheet (provided) so we don't double-message anyone

WhatsApp summary at end of each day (numbers sent, any issues)

Pause and notify me immediately if any IG warning or restriction appears



Important — what you will NOT do:



You will NOT open or read any incoming DMs/replies. I handle ALL replies myself.

If you a
 open a reply, mark it as unread immediately.

You will not book sales calls or message anyone outside the daily brief.



Personalization example:

Look at the prospect's last 2–3 posts and reference one specifically.

GOOD:



"Hey [name], loved your recent reel on macro tracking — solid breakdown. Quick question — are you editing your videos yourself?"



BAD:



"Hey, love your content!"



If you can't write the GOOD example in fluent English, this role isn't for you.

What I'm looking for:



Excellent written English (essential)

Stable internet

Phone or laptop (phone preferred — safer for IG accounts)

Reliable schedule — Mon–Fri, UK hours including the late evening session

Previous IG outreach or social media VA experience preferred

Follows a written brief without going off-script



Pay:

$320/month flat, paid weekly via Wise every Friday ($80/week)

Hours:

~12 hours per week (3 sessions/day × ~45 mins × 5 days)

Trial:

2-week paid trial. If it's a good fit, ongoing long-term role.

To apply, send a 2-minute Loom video (
 — free) answering:



Have you done Instagram outreach for a client before? Tell me about it.

Imagine you're DMing a UK fitness coach with 5k followers whose last reel was about post-workout nutrition. Write me an actual personalized opening line you'd send them.

Confirm you can work UK hours (8am / 1pm / 8pm UK), Mon–Fri.



Applications without a Loom will not be considered.

Looking to hire this week.

title: Reddit Client Manager
description:
Novantro is a Reddit Marketing Agency helping B2B companies and agencies generate revenue from Reddit. We are a lean, founder-led team currently doing $50K in monthly revenue and growing fast. That means two things for you: your work has direct, visible impact on the business, and there is real room to grow into bigger roles as we scale.



You'll own day-to-day Reddit execution for our clients: creating posts and threads that rank in Google and get cited by ChatGPT, plus running client onboarding and review calls. You'll work directly under our Head of Reddit / Operations Manager and focus on shipping work, not setting strategy.



What you'll do



Write and publish Reddit content (posts, comments, threads) for client campaigns

Optimize that content to rank in Google and earn citations in ChatGPT / AI Overviews

Research subreddits, transactional keywords, and ranking opportunities before publishing

Run client onboarding calls set expectations, get inputs, kick off the engagement

Run recurring client review calls walk clients through rankings, traffic, wins, and next steps

Track performance and report results back to clients in a clean, repeatable format

Flag risks (removals, mod actions, account issues) to the Head of Reddit



What we're looking for



Active Reddit user who understands subreddit culture, rules, and the difference between content that gets upvoted vs. removed

Strong written English you can write like a real Redditor, not a marketer

Comfortable on video calls with B2B clients (onboardings and reviews)

Working knowledge of how Google ranks Reddit threads and what makes content quotable by ChatGPT



Bonus: experience with Reddit account warm-up, removal recovery, or keyword-ranking projects



Where this role can go

This is a high-leverage seat on a fast-growing team. Strong performers here have a clear path into senior roles as we scale for example:



Senior Reddit Manager owning strategy across a portfolio of clients and mentoring content producers

Account Lead owning the full client relationship, retention, and expansion revenue

Sales Lead moving into pitching and closing new B2B accounts



We promote from within. The ceiling is set by your output, not your start date.



Application Priority



To be considered first, fill out this application form with your Reddit experience and examples:




/forms/vrqta62g

title: Lead Nurture & Admin Assistant for Martial Arts Gym
description:
Job Title:

Lead Nurture & Admin Assistant for Martial Arts Gym (Part-Time, EST, GHL Experience Required)



About Us:

We’re Total Revolution Training Facility — a fast-growing, family-friendly martial arts gym in Lima, Ohio. We’re looking for a skilled, friendly virtual assistant to help us stay organized, follow up with leads, and grow our member base. Our typical members are families with children ages 4 to 12, so we value a warm, upbeat, and helpful communication style.



We need someone experienced in GoHighLevel (GHL) who’s ready to assist with day-to-day CRM tasks, social media posting, and lead nurturing. If you’re organized, proactive, and enjoy helping a small business grow, we’d love to meet you.



Key Responsibilities:



Respond to new leads using our pre-written SMS scripts inside GoHighLevel



Move leads through CRM stages (New > Booked > No Show > Trial > Enrolled)



Book trial appointments based on program type and parent availability



Follow up with no-shows and trials via text



Create and schedule basic
 and Instagram posts



Handle simple member tasks such as holds and cancellations (training provided for Spark and ZenPlanner)



Complete small admin tasks assigned via WhatsApp (example: send praise messages to parents)



Submit a short daily report summarizing tasks completed



Tools You'll Be Using:



GoHighLevel (required)



Google Sheets



 / Instagram



Spark Software (we will train)



ZenPlanner (we will train)



WhatsApp (for task communication)



Schedule & Availability:



Part-time to start: 3 to 4 hours per day, Monday through Friday



Working hours must be during 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST (we are flexible on the exact time)



This role may grow into full-time in the future if your performance supports the gym’s growth and helps us transition from our current ad agency



Please note: full-time is not guaranteed upfront, but it is possible based on results



Compensation:



$3 to $5 USD per hour depending on experience



Performance bonuses available for achieving goals or completing special projects



Examples include copying our website into GoDaddy or helping us reduce ad agency costs



Long-term raise potential based on contribution and reliability



What We’re Looking For:



Strong written English and friendly tone when messaging leads and parents



Neutral or very light accent preferred for occasional voice tasks



GoHighLevel CRM experience (must-have)



Reliable, detail-oriented, and eager to follow clear processes



Able to work during U.S. daytime hours consistently



Excited to grow with a positive, community-based business



To Apply:



Please include the following when applying:



A short introduction explaining why you’d be a great fit



A brief summary of your GoHighLevel experience or a screenshot



Your desired hourly rate and the EST hours you are available to work



We’re excited to work with someone who wants to grow with us long-term. Thank you for applying!

title: Lead Generation, Cold Calling & Appointment Setter
description:
Company: New World Digital Agency

Position: Lead Generation & Appointment Setter

Location: Remote

Trial Period: 2 months

Language: English required. French is an asset.



About the Role



New World Digital Agency is looking for a motivated and results-driven person to handle lead generation, cold calling, and appointment setting.



Your role will be to find potential business leads, contact them, qualify them, and book appointments with interested prospects.



Main Responsibilities

Generate new business leads

Research and qualify prospects

Make outbound cold calls

Contact business owners and decision-makers

Ask qualification questions

Book qualified appointments

Follow up with interested prospects

Update lead status and notes clearly

Compensation



For the first 2-month trial period, the compensation is performance-based:



500 CAD/month base pay

The base pay is activated once the agent reaches 20 qualified appointments per month

10 CAD per qualified appointment booked

15 CAD bonus if the deal is closed.



After the 2-month trial period, if the performance is good, the compensation becomes:



750 CAD/month fixed base pay

Plus commissions

Plus monthly performance bonuses

Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who is:



Comfortable with lead generation and cold calling

Confident speaking in English

Professional and polite with prospects

Organized and consistent

Able to follow a script

Good at updating lead notes and status

Motivated by results and commissions



Experience in lead generation, cold calling, appointment setting, sales, BPO, or call center work is a strong asset.

title: Skilled DM Appointment Setter (no script)
description:
***ONLY apply if you DON"T need a script***



Hey Everyone! I'm a Sleep and life coach specializing in sleep with a growing Instagram presence. I'm looking for a confident, empathetic communicator to help manage and convert incoming DMs into booked discovery calls. Definitely want someone with EXPERIENCE! 



What you'll be doing:

I already have someone doing initial reach out but I need someone who can continue the conversation and move them towards a booked call. This is not an easy task and you will be helping to continue to perfect the script to get people on calls with me. 



This will be a part time position based mostly on commission. $3/hr + $80 for every call that I close. This should only require 2-3hrs/day. Checking in 2x's per day to keep conversations moving. What this means is you can make $7-10/hr.



But again this will require someone with experience!

title: US Construction Estimator - Commercial Painting (Division 9)
description:
We are a US-based commercial paint contractor looking for a dedicated Estimator/Quantity Surveyor to handle our bidding pipeline. We aim to submit at least 10 high-quality commercial bids per month. You will be responsible for the full takeoff process and preparing the final bid summary.



Key Responsibilities:



Perform detailed digital takeoffs using Bluebeam Revu (required).



Review architectural plans, finish schedules, and project specifications (Division 09).



Calculate square footage for walls, ceilings, and linear footage for trim/base.



Identify substrates (drywall, CMU, metal deck) and special coating requirements.



Populate our Excel bid templates with quantities, labor hours, and material costs.



Maintain a "Bid Tracker" to ensure we never miss a deadline.



Requirements:



Preferred Degree in Civil Engineering or Architecture.



Minimum 2 years experience estimating for US/North American commercial projects.



Expertise in Bluebeam Revu (Tool sets, overlays, and legends).



Strong understanding of "Inclusions/Exclusions" in commercial contracts.



Ability to work [Your Time Zone] hours for at least 3 hours of overlap.



How to Apply:



Please start your application with the phrase "READY TO BID."



Attach a Sample Takeoff (Color-coded Bluebeam markup) and the matching Excel summary.



Briefly describe your experience with Division 9 (Finishes) projects.

title: Sales and Operations Coordinator
description:
About the Role

?We are a growing painting contracting business looking for a proactive, organized, and tech-savvy Virtual Assistant. You will be the "glue" that holds our sales and administrative processes together—ensuring our customers feel valued and our field team is ready to work.

?Key Responsibilities

?Customer Retention & Follow-up: Reach out to past clients for seasonal check-ins and follow up on sent estimates to close more deals.

?Proposal Preparation: Draft professional painting bids using our software [Insert Software name like PaintScout, Joist, or Houzz] based on measurements provided by the owner.

?Outbound
 Marketing: Execute
 campaigns to our database to generate new leads and maintain brand awareness.

?Feedback Management: Send out "Thank You" surveys after job completion and encourage happy clients to leave 5-star Google reviews.

?Team Onboarding: Assist in the administrative setup for new employees or 1099 subcontractors (collecting W-9s, signing agreements, and sharing project folders).

title: Meta Video Ad Editor for DTC Brand (3 Full-Time Positions)
description:
We're a profitable, growing DTC health & wellness brand operating across 7 European markets. We're scaling our creative output and hiring 3 video editors to join our creative team.



You'll work with a Creative Strategist on producing high-converting video ads for Meta.



The role:

- Edit Meta video ads in multiple formats: UGC, VSL, MiniVSL, etc.

- Receive briefs from your Creative Strategist and execute

- Iterate based on performance data, we test, we learn, we re-cut

- Weekly tea
etings to review performance, share learnings and improve as a team

- Full time role



What you'll get:

- $2,000 USD/month base salary

- $500 USD bonus per winning ad (no cap, the more winners you produce, the more you earn)

- Real ownership of your work, we credit editors on winning ads

- Long-term role with growth potential



You're a fit if:

- 2+ years editing Meta video ads

- Strong understanding of ad flow, hooks, retention curves and how DTC video ads convert

title: Full Stack Java Developer - Night Shift
description:
Our client is a premier, US-based fleet services powerhouse dedicated to keeping the wheels of American commerce turning. In an industry where every minute of downtime translates directly to lost revenue, they serve as a critical partner for businesses that rely on mobile assets. By blending technical expertise with a customer-first philosophy, they have established themselves as a leader in comprehensive fleet health management.

About the Role



We are seeking a Mid-to-Senior Full-Stack Java Developer to take full ownership of a suite of critical internal applications. This is a foundational role intended to offload development from company leadership to a dedicated, full-time engineering resource. You will be the architect and primary builder of proprietary tools that streamline national fleet operations, meaning your code will have a direct, daily impact on the efficiency of a major American industry leader.

Responsibilities





Application Development: Lead the development and maintenance of internal business applications using the Vaadin framework, ensuring a seamless integration of backend and frontend logic.

System Architecture: Design and manage robust backend services and relational database structures using Java and Postgres.

Cloud Infrastructure: Deploy, monitor, and scale applications within a cloud environment, ensuring high availability and performance.

Lifecycle Management: Maintain complete codebase integrity through GitHub, implementing modern CI/CD best practices to ensure rapid but stable deployment cycles.

Product Ownership: Collaborate directly with leadership to translate business needs into technical requirements, acting as both a developer and a strategic technical advisor.

Internal Tooling: Focus on building "internal app suites" that simplify complex business logic, reducing the need for manual intervention in fleet management.







Competencies and Qualifications





Must-Haves





Extensive professional software development experience (typically 5+ years) with a history of building enterprise-grade applications.

Deep, expert-level knowledge of Java and associated backend ecosystems.

Proficiency in relational database design and management using Postgres.

Proven familiarity with cloud infrastructure (Google/Azure), GitHub version control, and automated testing environments.

Ability to manage the full software development lifecycle independently and align with Mountain Time business hours for collaboration.



Nice-to-Haves





Prior experience with Vaadin Flow or Hilla.

Previous experience building internal business tools, ERP systems, or logistics/fleet management software.

Advanced familiarity with Postgres optimization and cloud scaling strategies.



What We Offer



100% Remote Work

13th Month Pay

Healthcare (HMO)

Comprehensive Fringe Benefits package

Paid Service Incentive Lead (SIL)

Paid Philippines Holidays

Free Learning and Development Programs



Application Process

We understand that searching for a new job can be challenging, and we’re here to support you every step of the way. Our goal is to make the process as transparent and respectful as possible.

Typically, the interview process includes a Recruiter Interview, Client Interview, and Practical Test, but this may vary depending on the role. Throughout each stage, we’ll keep you informed and provide feedback as quickly as we can, ensuring you feel valued and supported throughout your journey with us.

title: Customer Engagement Specialist — Remote
description:
BampsMediaMarketing is hiring Customer Engagement Specialists to join our remote team. We're a talent management agency, and this role sits at the heart of how we keep our clients' communities engaged, supported, and coming back.

The role

You'll be the voice behind the inbox. Day-to-day, you'll be replying to incoming messages from a client's customer base — building rapport, answering questions, recommending the right products or content for each person, and turning casual conversations into long-term loyalty. Think of it as part customer support, part relationship-building, part light sales.

This is a high-volume messaging role, so you'll need to type fast, switch tone naturally between different client accounts, and keep dozens of conversations moving without ever sounding copy-pasted.

Earnings

This role is built for people who want their effort to translate directly into income. Pay structure:



$3/hour base — guaranteed, regardless of performance

3% commission on every conversion — uncapped, paid out regularly

Performance bonuses on top for hitting weekly and monthly targets



Realistic monthly earnings for someone working consistent shifts and converting at team average sit well above the base alone. Top performers on the team earn multiples of that. The harder you work the inbox, the more you take home — there's no ceiling.

What you'll do



Respond to inbound messages quickly and in the personal voice of the client you're representing

Build genuine rapport with returning customers and remember the details that matter to them

Recommend relevant products, bundles, or premium options based on what each customer is looking for

Keep notes on customer preferences so the next conversation picks up where the last one left off

Hit daily engagement and conversion targets

Flag anything unusual to your team lead



What we're looking for



Excellent written English, with a natural, human, non-robotic tone

Fast, accurate typing (60+ wpm preferred)

Confidence with light sales conversations — you can read a customer and know when to suggest, when to listen, and when to back off

Reliable internet and a quiet space to work

Available to work shifts, including some evenings and weekends (the inbox doesn't sleep)

Discretion and professionalism — you'll be representing someone else's brand voice

Previous experience in customer service, sales, community management, or messaging-based roles is a plus but not essential



What else we offer



Fully remote — work from anywhere

Ongoing coaching and support from your team lead

Clear progression path into senior specialist, team lead, and account manager roles

A supportive team that actually responds when you message them



To apply

Send a short message telling us why you'd be good at this, along with your availability and any relevant experience. Applications without a personal note won't be reviewed.
