title: Real Estate Media Virtual Assistant (Photo/Video Editing + Operations Support)
description:
We’re a growing real estate media company based in Asheville, North Carolina, looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help manage and process daily media.



This role is a mix of photo and video editing, file organization, social media and operational support. You’ll play a key role in making sure our media is processed efficiently and delivered at a high standard to our clients.



?



Core Responsibilities



1. Daily Media Organization



* Organize incoming media files in Dropbox

* Separate interior and exterior images

* Maintain a clean and consistent file structure



2. Photo Editing Workflow



* Upload interior images to Fotello for processing

* Apply preset styles and perform quality control (QC)

* Edit exterior images using Adobe Camera Raw + Photoshop

* Perform advanced edits on interiors, including:

    * Item removal

    * Vertical corrections

    * Lighting adjustments

    * Adding fireplace flames

    * General image cleanup and polish



3. Special Media Creation



* Handle tasks such as:

    * Virtual staging using Collov.ai

    * Select best exterior for Day-to-dusk (DTD) edits

    * Photo-to-video tools



4. Content Creation



* Produce daily social media content using media captured during the week. Working knowledge of Canva and Adobe Premiere. 



5. Floor Plans



* Process and edit floor plans using CubiCasa

* (Adobe Illustrator experience is a strong plus)



6. Client Communication & Request Handling



* Monitor and respond to incoming client requests via company
 and phone (or messaging apps) during working hours

* Handle common requests such as:

    * Photo and video revision requests

    * Scheduling questions

    * Order updates and delivery inquiries

* Communicate clearly, professionally, and promptly with agents

* Gather necessary details and ensure requests are accurately executed

* Triage incoming messages:

    * Handle straightforward requests independently

    * Escalate more complex or sensitive issues when needed

* Maintain a high level of responsiveness and organization across all client communication

* Ensure no requests are missed and all follow-ups are completed



7. Project Coordination



* Stay aware of the team’s daily shoot schedule

* Understand what deliverables are required for each project



8. Delivery & Platforms



* Upload and deliver completed jobs through Aryeo

* Manage and edit:

    * Matterport tours

    * Zillow 3D tours



?



Required Skills & Experience



* Strong experience with:

    * Adobe Photoshop

    * Adobe Camera Raw

* High attention to detail (this is critical)

* Ability to follow structured workflows consistently

* Strong organizational skills (Dropbox/file management)

* Reliable internet and ability to work weekends (both days as needed)

* Strong written and spoken English communication skills

* Comfortable handling client communication via
 and phone



?



Bonus Skills (Not Required, but Valuable)



* WordPress + Elementor

* Google Business Profile optimization

* SEO knowledge

* Adobe Illustrator

* Experience with real estate media editing workflows



?



What We’re Looking For



* Someone dependable and responsive

* A problem-solver who can work independently

* Detail-oriented to the point where small mistakes bother you

* Comfortable working with repeatable systems and improving them over time



What Sets You Apart



* You communicate clearly and professionally with clients

* You are responsive and reliable—messages don’t sit unanswered

* You take ownership of requests and follow through to completion

* You stay organized even when handling multiple conversations and tasks



?



Final Application Step (Required Video Submission)



To be considered for this role, please submit a short video recording (2–4 minutes) answering the questions below.



This helps us understand how you communicate and think through real scenarios.



Please include:



1. Introduction

Tell us about your background and your experience with real estate media or photo/video editing workflows.



2. Client Communication Scenario

A real estate agent messages:

“The photos look great, but the living room feels dark and one image looks slightly tilted.”

How would you respond, and what actions would you take?



3. Prioritization Scenario

You have:



* A full batch of photos to process

* 2 urgent revision requests

* New messages coming into



How do you prioritize your work?



4. Weekend Availability Confirmation

Confirm your availability to work both Saturdays and Sundays consistently



?



Submission Instructions



* Record using Loom, Google Drive, or similar

* Ensure clear audio and good lighting

* Share the link along with your application



Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: Construction Estimator / Quantity Takeoff Specialist (Part-Time, Project-Based)
description:
Construction Estimator / Quantity Takeoff Specialist (Part-Time, Project-Based)



We are a growing commercial construction company based in Canada looking for a reliable and detail-oriented estimator to support our pre-construction team. This is a part-time, project-by-project role with flexible hours, ideal for someone experienced in construction takeoffs who can deliver accurate work quickly.

You will be responsible for reviewing drawings and extracting quantities (BOQs) for scopes such as drywall, painting, ceilings, rough carpentry, and general interior commercial work.

We are specifically looking for someone who is responsive, organized, and able to meet deadlines consistently. Communication speed is just as important as technical skill.

The ideal candidate has experience with commercial (not just residential) projects, can read architectural drawings and specifications, and is comfortable identifying scope gaps or inconsistencies. Experience with tools such as Bluebeam Revu, PlanSwift, or similar takeoff software is strongly preferred. Please confirm what tools you currently use and have access to.

Typical responsibilities include reviewing drawings, performing quantity takeoffs, providing clean and organized breakdowns for pricing, and flagging any missing scope or unclear information.

To apply, please include:





1-A short description of your experience with commercial construction projects

2-The tools you currently use for takeoffs

3-Your typical turnaround time for a small project

4-The word “BLUEPRINT” at the top of your application (this helps us filter for attention to detail)



We are building a long-term relationship with the right person and will have ongoing work available as our pipeline grows.

title: Book Keeper
description:
****YOU MUST SUBMIT A RESUME AND VOICE RECORDING IN ORDER TO BE CONSIDERED FOR A POSITION****





Position Overview:



We are looking for a dependable and detail-oriented Bookkeeper to join our team and take ownership of our day-to-day financial operations. This role is essential to maintaining the accuracy, organization, and integrity of our financial records. The ideal candidate is someone who enjoys working with numbers, has a strong sense of accountability, and can manage multiple financial tasks with precision and consistency.



As a Bookkeeper, you will play a key role in supporting the financial health of the organization by ensuring that all transactions are recorded properly and that accounts are kept up to date. You will work closely with management to provide clear visibility into financial performance and help ensure that all financial processes run smoothly.



Key Responsibilities:



In this role, you will be responsible for maintaining and updating financial records, including tracking daily transactions such as income, expenses, and payments. You will handle accounts payable and receivable, ensuring invoices are issued accurately and payments are collected and recorded in a timely manner. Regular reconciliation of bank and credit card statements will be part of your routine to ensure all records align correctly.



You will also assist with payroll processing, maintain organized financial documentation, and prepare periodic financial reports that provide insight into the company’s financial position. Attention to detail is critical, as you will be expected to identify discrepancies and resolve them efficiently. Additionally, you will help ensure compliance with applicable financial regulations and internal procedures.



Qualifications and Experience:



The successful candidate will have prior experience in bookkeeping or a similar accounting role, along with a solid understanding of basic accounting principles. Familiarity with accounting software such as QuickBooks, Xero, or similar platforms is important, as well as comfort working with spreadsheets and digital financial tools.



Strong organizational skills and the ability to prioritize tasks are essential in this role, as you will be handling multiple responsibilities at once. You should also demonstrate a high level of discretion and professionalism when working with sensitive financial information.



While not required, a degree in accounting, finance, or a related field, as well as any bookkeeping certifications, would be considered an asset.



Work Environment and Compensation:



This position offers the opportunity to work in a collaborative and supportive environment where accuracy and reliability are highly valued. Compensation will be based on experience and qualifications, and additional benefits may be available depending on employment type.



How to Apply:



If you are a motivated and detail-focused professional looking to contribute to a growing organization, we encourage you to apply. Please submit your resume along with a brief cover letter describing your relevant experience and interest in the rol

title: Web Developer / Support Engineer
description:
## About the Role



We're looking for a dedicated, full-time Web Developer and Support Engineer to join our team on a long-term basis. You'll build, maintain, and support our WordPress websites and platforms — from crafting custom theme functionality to managing the cloud infrastructure that keeps everything running. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys both writing code and solving problems, and who's comfortable switching between development work and hands-on customer support. You don't need to know everything on day one — we provide paid training and have senior technicians on hand to help you grow into the role.



## Position Details



- **Type:** Full-time, long-term position

- **Hours:** Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT)

- **Salary:** ~$1,500 USD/month

- **Location:** Remote — must be available to work during Australian business hours

- **Requirements:** Willingness to sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) and Non-Compete Agreement

- **Leave:** Australian public holidays off, plus leave over Easter and Christmas/New Year periods

- **Training:** Paid training provided to get you up to speed where there are knowledge gaps

- **Support:** You'll be backed by senior technicians who are available to guide, mentor, and support you



## Responsibilities



- Develop and maintain WordPress sites, including custom theme modifications, plugin configuration, and performance optimisation.

- Build and manage page layouts and content structures using Elementor and Advanced Custom Fields (ACF).

- Configure and support LearnDash-powered learning environments, including course setup, user management, and troubleshooting.

- Write custom PHP functions to extend WordPress themes and plugin behaviour as needed.

- Manage and monitor hosting infrastructure on Amazon EC2, including instance configuration and scaling.

- Configure and maintain Amazon Elastic Load Balancers to ensure high availability and reliable traffic distribution.

- Respond to support requests, diagnose issues, and implement fixes across the web stack.

- Communicate directly with clients via phone and
 — explaining technical issues clearly, providing updates, and guiding customers through solutions.

- Document technical processes, configurations, and solutions for the team's knowledge base.



## Required Skills & Experience



- **Exceptional written and spoken English** — you will be communicating directly with Australian clients via phone and
, so clear, professional, and confident English is essential.

- Solid working knowledge of **PHP** in the context of WordPress development.

- Experience building and customising sites with **WordPress**, including theme and plugin development.

- Proficiency with **Elementor** page builder for layout creation and management, using Hello Elementor as a theme base.

- Hands-on experience writing custom functions for **WordPress theme modifications** (functions.php, child themes, hooks, and filters).

- Familiarity with **Advanced Custom Fields (ACF)** for building flexible content structures.

- Willingness to receive and make phone calls to assist customers directly.

## Nice to Have



- Experience with **Cloudflare** — particularly security configuration, DNS management, and Cloudflare Stream.

- Experience with **LearnDash** LMS configuration, course building, and user management.

- Familiarity with other AWS services (RDS, S3, CloudFront, Route 53).

- Understanding of web security best practices (SSL, firewalls, WordPress hardening).

- Familiarity with caching strategies (object caching, CDN configuration, page caching plugins).

- Experience with site migration and DNS management.



## What We Value



- A problem-solving mindset — you're resourceful and enjoy figuring things out.

- Clear, confident communication — you're comfortable picking up the phone and talking a client through an issue.

- A willingness to learn new tools and technologies as the role evolves.

- Ownership and reliability — you follow through and keep things running smoothly.

- Long-term commitment — we're looking to build a lasting working relationship, not fill a short-term gap.

title: Remote Project Manager Support – Low Voltage & Fire Alarm Construction
description:
About Us

Industrial Electronic Systems, Inc. (IES) is a U.S.-based fire alarm and life safety systems company serving commercial customers in Northern California. We specialize in fire alarm design, installation, inspections, and low voltage systems integration.



About the Role

We are hiring a Remote Project Manager Support specialist to work directly with our U.S. project managers on commercial low voltage and fire alarm construction projects. This is not an admin-only role. You will help drive projects from kickoff through closeout — tracking submittals, coordinating drawings, supporting RFIs, and keeping documentation tight across multiple active jobs.



We need someone who is:

• A strong communicator with U.S. PMs, engineers, and subcontractors

• Highly organized with contracts, drawings, submittals, and as-builts

• Comfortable in CAD and BIM environments (you'll review and mark up drawings, not just file them)

• Familiar with low voltage systems — fire alarm experience is a big plus

• A self-starter who can solve problems independently

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities



Project Coordination

• Functional knowledge of contracts, drawings, estimates, and specifications to ensure compliance with project requirements.

• Obtain, maintain, and administer the data, information, communications, and approvals required between owners, architects, engineers, and subcontractors.

• Support coordination and monitoring of contractors, subcontractors, engineers, and architects.

• Participate in project meetings — document action items, track statuses, and follow up on deliverables.



Documentation & Controls

• Manage submittals, RFIs, change orders, and as-built drawings.

• Provide project controls, cost tracking, and performance reporting support.

• Maintain organized project files and consistent document standards across all active jobs.

• Help ensure project closeout — guarantees, warranties, and final deliverables to the owner.



CAD/BIM Drawing Support

• Review architectural, electrical, and mechanical drawings for impact on low voltage and fire alarm scope.

• Mark up drawings, coordinate redlines with the design team, and route updates through CAD/BIM.

• Track drawing revisions and submittal versions across the project lifecycle.



Communication

• Coordinate daily with U.S. project managers, engineers, and field staff.

• Communicate clearly in writing and verbally — ask the right questions, escalate the right issues.

• Work independently across U.S. business hours overlap.

________________________________________

Required Qualifications

• Minimum 3 years of project management or PM support experience in construction.

• Strong working knowledge of CAD (AutoCAD 2D) and BIM (Revit or Navisworks).

• Solid understanding of low voltage systems (fire alarm, access control, security, structured cabling).

• Fire alarm experience is a big plus — NFPA 72, NEC, AHJ familiarity preferred.

• Ability to read and interpret architectural, electrical, and mechanical blueprints.

• Familiar with Bluebeam, MS Project or similar PM tools, and submittal/RFI workflows.

• Excellent written and spoken English.

• Reliable workstation, stable internet, and willingness to overlap with U.S. Pacific Time.

title: Shortform Video Editor (TikTok / Reels)
description:
We are a fast-growing social media management agency looking for a talented Shortform Video Editor to join our remote team.



You will be editing around 3-4x unique videos a day splitted onto multiple accounts (21 accounts in total) which will result in 63-84+ short-form videos per day (TikTok & Instagram Reels) using CapCut. This is a high-volume, fast-paced role that requires precision, consistency, and attention to detail. 



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Edit 63-84+ videos daily (4x per day × 21 accounts; Instagram Reels may be added)

- Apply retention-optimized cuts with a hook every ~3 seconds

- Maintain natural skin tones, whiten teeth, and optimize audio levels

- Cut engaging hooks and captions that stop the scroll and drive retention

- Correctly apply provided sounds, effects, and overlays per brief

- Work with German-language content - you are responsible for translations and must proactively ask when unclear

- Implement feedback precisely and deliver on time every day



REQUIREMENTS:

- Proven experience in shortform video editing (TikTok/Reels) - MANDATORY

- Expert-level CapCut skills

- Strong understanding of retention-based cutting (pacing, hooks, keeping viewers engaged)

- Reliable internet, own device, and ability to meet daily deadlines

- Detail-oriented and able to handle high volume without quality drops

- Good communication - flag issues early, not after the deadline



NOTE: We evaluate quality, speed, and ability to follow instructions.



HOW TO APPLY:

To be considered, your application MUST include:



1. Start your message with exactly: "I'm a human"

2. Your portfolio or 3+ examples of shortform edits you have done

3. A short intro (2-3 sentences) about your editing experience

4. Your availability and expected monthly rate



Applications that do not start with "I'm a human" will not be considered.

title: Shopify Product Lister and Moderator
description:
We are an agency that helps eCommerce brands stay active on Google Merchant Center (GMC) so they can keep running Google Ads. We’re hiring a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant (VA) to review and approve Shopify product listings before submission to Google. Your main goal is to ensure a consistent number of listings are submitted daily for each store, with every listing reviewed in around 4.5 minutes or less, while maintaining GMC compliance. Focus on spotting high-risk issues such as misleading claims, image/logo problems, or prohibited content across your assigned stores.



This role is ideal for someone with strong English comprehension and the ability to quickly skim product descriptions while identifying potential compliance issues. It suits candidates who have experience creating Shopify product listings, especially those familiar with GMC requirements.



Responsibilities:

**Moderate and adjust client product listings across assigned Shopify stores for GMC compliance issues (e.g., image logos, misleading claims, prohibited content); if unable to fix, log findings in the client’s Google Sheet, leave comments on issues, confirm fixes, and submit approved products to GMC.

**Report compliance risks with clear, actionable notes.

**Review and update product images (remove logos, improve main image appeal, source high-quality alternatives if needed).

**Refine and update clients' product listings when needed



Requirements:

**Ability to quickly skim product descriptions while identifying potential compliance issues, this requires excellent English reading comprehension (to recognize compliance-sensitive wording).

**Proven experience as a product lister for Shopify

**Strong command of English with excellent written and verbal communication skills.

**Ability to manage multiple tasks with attention to detail and deadlines

**Self-motivated with a strong work ethic and the ability to work independently.

**Attention to detail: include the word “ORANGES” when you apply to this role AND tell us how many questions are listed at the end of this job post

**Basic understanding of on-page SEO practices (incorporating provided keywords into descriptions)

**Use our automated listing tool to create listings on our new stores

**Image editing such as text removal, image resizing and resolution upscaling



Nice to Have:

**Any Google Merchant Center experience/You’ve created product listings for Google



KPI: Audit and submit XY client product listings to Google Merchant Center per day on each store



How to Apply:



Please submit your resume along with samples of your previous work or portfolio. In your application please answer the following questions:



1) Do you have experience with Shopify?

2) Do you have experience with Simprosys?

3) Have you created product listings with GMC compliance in mind?

4) Do you have image editing experience (e.g., removing logos, text overlays, or improving image quality)? If yes, let us know what tools you use

5) Can you commit to 40 hours per week, Mon–Fri?

6) What is your WPM (words per minute) typing speed? Please obtain it from here:

title: Remote Engineering Support – CAD/BIM, Low Voltage & Fire Alarm Systems
description:
About Us

Industrial Electronic Systems, Inc. (IES) is a U.S.-based fire alarm and life safety systems company serving commercial customers in Northern California. We specialize in fire alarm design, installation, inspections, and low voltage systems integration.



About the Role

We are hiring a Remote Engineering Support specialist to help our U.S. engineering team design and document low voltage and fire alarm systems for commercial buildings. This is a hands-on engineering role — you'll model in BIM, draft in CAD, research code, and produce real deliverables for active construction projects.



We need someone who is:

• A strong CAD and BIM modeler (this is non-negotiable)

• Experienced with low voltage system design

• Comfortable with NFPA 72 / NEC code research (fire alarm experience is a big plus)

• A self-starter who can solve design challenges independently

• Detail-obsessed — drawings, layers, sheet sets, and revisions all done right

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities



CAD & BIM Engineering

• Produce 2D AutoCAD drawings — device layouts, risers, wiring diagrams, system details, and submittal sets.

• Build and maintain 3D BIM models (Revit / Navisworks) for low voltage and fire alarm systems.

• Set up sheets, viewports, title blocks, layers, and XREFs to company CAD standards.

• Coordinate clash detection and drawing updates with the broader project model.



Low Voltage & Fire Alarm Design Support

• Assist in designing NFPA-compliant fire alarm systems (device layout, spacing, placement).

• Support design of access control, intrusion, structured cabling, and other low voltage systems.

• Identify code-driven requirements — smoke/heat detector spacing, notification coverage, strobe candela placement, circuit routing and survivability.

• Review architectural and electrical drawings for design impact and coordination.



Research & Problem Solving

• Look up AHJ requirements (city/state fire department standards).

• Compare NFPA 72 / NEC requirements against local code amendments.

• Document findings and communicate design impacts to U.S. engineers.

• Identify missing information in plans and propose solutions before they become RFIs.



Submittals & Closeout

• Create submittal drawings, cut sheets, and product data packages.

• Update as-built drawings from field markups.

• Maintain version control and clean project files throughout the job lifecycle.

________________________________________

Required Qualifications

• Strong AutoCAD 2D skills (layers, XREFs, sheet sets, scaling) — required.

• Strong BIM skills in Revit and/or Navisworks — required.

• Solid understanding of low voltage systems (fire alarm, access control, security, structured cabling).

• Fire alarm experience is a big plus — NFPA 72, NEC, AHJ familiarity preferred.

• Ability to read and interpret architectural, mechanical, and electrical plans.

• Strong analytical skills and willingness to research code/AHJ requirements.

• Excellent written and spoken English.

• Reliable workstation, stable internet, and willingness to overlap with U.S. Pacific Time.

title: SEO + WordPress Integrator (Junior, Remote, $350 to $550 USD/month)
description:
OVERVIEW

RMD is a digital agency with clients in 20+ countries. We're hiring a Junior SEO + WordPress Integrator to take content briefs from our team and ship them as live, SEO-clean pages.

This is a junior role. We will teach you the advanced parts. What we need from you on day one is solid hands on WordPress (or HTML/CSS), care for detail, and the ability to read a page and notice when something is off.

If you're early in your career and you want to learn SEO properly inside a working agency, this is for you. We don't gatekeep. If you do the work, you grow fast.

Compensation: $350 to $550 USD per month based on experience, paid via PayPal.

Hours: 40 hours per week, Manila time. We need 4 hours of overlap with Morocco/Dubai (so a 1pm to 9pm or 2pm to 10pm Manila shift is ideal).



WHAT YOU WILL DO

Take content briefs from our senior writer (blog posts, landing pages, service pages) and build the page in WordPress + Elementor (or hand-coded HTML/CSS, your choice)

Set up the on-page SEO basics on every page you build: meta title, meta description, H1, image alt text, internal links, schema where relevant. Yoast or RankMath

Run weekly site-health checks: broken links, slow pages, missing meta data, indexing issues. Flag what you find

Submit sitemaps, request indexing in Google Search Console, monitor for crawl errors

Help with simple on-page audits: open a page, list what's wrong, suggest fixes

Make small content updates: typo fixes, link swaps, image replacements, schedule blog posts

Read Google Analytics and Google Search Console at a basic level. We'll teach you the rest



WHAT YOU NEED ON DAY ONE

This is a junior role and we will teach you the advanced parts. But you walk in with these or you don't walk in.

Strong WordPress + Elementor. You can build a clean landing page from a brief. You know your way around Elementor templates, global colors, mobile responsive view

OR strong hand-coded HTML/CSS. If you prefer to code pages by hand, we accept that. Show us the work

Basic on-page SEO knowledge. You know what a meta title is, why H1 matters, what alt text is for, how internal links help

Yoast or RankMath setup experience on at least one real WordPress site. Configured the basics: meta title template, sitemap, breadcrumbs, redirects. Not the install-and-leave-default version

Basic image work in Photoshop, Figma, or equivalent. Resize, crop, export at correct dimensions, compress for web (no 5MB hero images)

Hosting + Cloudflare basics. You can log into a cPanel / hosting dashboard, find files, change DNS records, clear a cache. You don't need to be a sysadmin, just not afraid of the back-end

At least one of Ahrefs, Semrush, or Google Search Console used on a real project. Even at a beginner level. You've opened the tool, run a query, and used the output for something real

1+ year of digital agency, freelance, or in-house web/SEO work. Hobby projects don't count. We need someone who has shipped under deadline pressure

You can read a page and spot what's broken or sloppy. Missing alt text, broken links, walls of text with no headings, slow images. You notice

You can read English well. Our briefs are in English. Some clients are French (we translate the brief, you don't need French)

Honesty about what you don't know. "I haven't done schema before, but I can learn" beats "yes I know schema" followed by a mess



BONUS (NOT REQUIRED, BUT MOVES YOU UP THE LIST)

1+ live URL you built or wrote that ranks on page 1 of Google for any commercial keyword. Send: URL + target keyword + screenshot from Ahrefs / Semrush / live SERP. This is a strong plus

1 URL where you can show conversion data (CVR%, leads/month, GA4 or GSC screenshot, redacted is fine). Most juniors don't have this; if you do, it puts you ahead

Schema markup deployment (FAQPage, Article, Product) in production

Shopify (we have e-commerce clients)

2+ years of agency or freelance work

French (we have clients in France and North Africa)

Comfortable recording Loom walkthroughs for async comms



WHO WE ARE

A small team distributed across Morocco and Dubai. We work in writing, async-first, and we trust people to ship.

We use AI in the daily work. We expect you to use it too, after onboarding. The test for this role does not allow AI, because we need to see what YOU can do.



WHY THIS ROLE IS WORTH IT (read this part carefully)

This is a junior seat, not a junior career. Here's what that means:

You will get to do more, fast. Inside 90 days, if you can build clean pages and read a brief, we start handing you content briefs to write yourself, basic keyword research in Ahrefs, and small SEO audit work. Inside 6 months, you can be writing landing pages alongside our senior writer. Inside 12 months, ownership of small clients is on the table.

We teach the advanced parts. Schema, technical SEO, GA4 + GSC diagnostics, Yoast/RankMath setup at a real level, AI-assisted content workflow, internal linking architecture, topic clusters. We don't gatekeep. If you want to learn it, we'll teach it.

We reward progress. Learn a new skill, ship a harder deliverable, hit a result we didn't expect. When that happens, we adjust your pay and scope to match. We don't make people wait 2 years for a real raise. A-players see significant pay growth (50% to 80%+) inside the first year.

The ceiling is what you make of it. We don't have a "you're a junior, stay in your lane" culture. The people who grow inside RMD become senior writers, content leads, and SEO specialists. You d
 how fast.

Who this is NOT for: people who want to stay junior forever and improve very slowly. We hire people who want to move forward. If "comfortable, low-pressure, no growth" is the goal, this isn't the seat. Apply somewhere else, no hard feelings.



HOW TO APPLY

Reply to this post with your CV

Include a portfolio link (Google Drive folder, personal site, GitHub, anything). We need to see at least 2 WordPress pages or HTML pages you built. Screenshots are fine, live URLs are better

Start your
 body with the line: RMD RMD. (Yes, exactly those two words on the first line. This is how we know you actually read the post.)

Tell us in 2 to 3 sentences: what's the most recent page you built or content you integrated? What did you do, what tools did you use?

If your application makes our shortlist, we will
 you 3 quick screening questions. Reply to those, and if you pass, we send a free 45-minute practical test. The test is small and clear. You'll see the scoring before you start.

We reply within 5 business days if we want to move you forward. We are a small team and don't have a dedicated recruiter. If you don't hear from us in that window, your application wasn't a fit this round. Don't take it personally and please don't chase. We respect your time enough to be honest about that.



WHAT NOT TO SEND

Generic CVs with no portfolio

"I am hardworking and loyal" cover letters with no specifics

Promises you can do everything (we know nobody can)

We're hiring one person for this role. We're patient. We will wait for the right fit.



Apply on OnlineJobs.ph or
 
 with subject "SEO Integrator PH, [Your Full Name]"

description:

Although we handle many traditional home loans, I often work on complex and non-conventional financing deals (e.g., construction loans, investor loans, and All-In-One offset mortgages, etc.). .

I am looking for an energetic, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who will become my right hand and a long-term partner in a growing business.

Your responsibilities will span five areas: 1. Communication triage across both business lines, 2. Calendar and appointment management in Microsoft Outlook, 3. CRM and database management (4,000 contacts), 4. Follow-up sequence execution, and 5, Coordination of our 
 booking platform.

title: Google Ads Specialist (100% Remote / Work From Anywhere)
description:
We are not looking for someone to just set up campaigns and let them run.

We are looking for someone who thinks in systems, diagnoses fast, and takes full ownership of performance.

Adnovara is a performance-driven digital marketing team operating across Asia and Europe. We manage high-budget Google Ads accounts for clients who expect measurable outcomes — not just traffic. As we scale, we are adding a Google Ads Specialist who can hit the ground running and grow with us.

You Are a Strong Fit If You:

Have 2 or more years of hands-on experience in Google Ads Manager — not just running basic search campaigns. Can diagnose a declining account without being told where to look. Understand the full funnel — from search intent to landing page conversion signals. Are fluent in GA4, GTM, and conversion tracking — setup and troubleshooting, not just reporting. Write clearly in English and communicate proactively in a remote environment. Deliver without hand-holding. You manage your time, hit your deadlines, and flag blockers early.

What We Offer

100% Remote — work from anywhere in the world. Results-first culture — we measure output, not hours. Real accounts, real budgets, real impact. A lean, high-trust team that moves fast and communicates well. Room to grow into a senior or lead role as the team scales.

The Master Your Mix Podcast is a weekly show focused on helping rock musicians, producers, and audio engineers create professional-quality recordings from their home studios. The podcast breaks down real-world recording, mixing, and production techniques in a practical way, with a strong focus on workflow, decision-making, and getting consistent results.



Episodes feature conversations with top-level engineers and producers, designed to help listeners improve their mixes and recordings. Past guests include engineers and producers such as Andrew Scheps, Sylvia Massy, David Bendeth, and Barrett Jones (bonus points if you include his episode number in your application).



We release 1 episode per week (4–5 per month, approximately 1 hour long each), and each episode is repurposed into multiple pieces of content across
, social, and video platforms.

 

Who We Are:

MasterYourMix is a music education business built around helping home studio musicians and producers get professional results from their recordings and mixes. The core belief is that great results don't require an expensive studio — they require the right process.



The business includes educational courses, a coaching program (Amplitude), and a line of audio plugins under the Carve Audio brand. The podcast is the primary content channel that drives awareness, builds trust with the audience, and feeds into the broader product ecosystem.



The host, Mike Indovina, is a mixing and mastering engineer with major label credits (Sony, Universal, Roadrunner, Republic, and others), a two-time #1 bestselling Amazon author, and a drummer. The show has featured some of the most respected engineers and producers in the industry.



This role exists to keep that content engine running and growing.

 

Compensation & Hours:

• $400 USD/month

This is a part-time role averaging approximately 10 hours per week. That said, someone who builds smart systems and uses AI tools effectively may find the workload becomes lighter over time — that efficiency is encouraged, not penalized.

 

What You'll Be Responsible For:



Guest Pipeline & Outreach

• Identify and research potential guests in music production, mixing, and audio engineering

• Conduct outreach and manage communication

• Handle scheduling and follow-ups

• Maintain a pipeline of upcoming guests to ensure consistent weekly releases

The goal is to always have a steady flow of strong, relevant guests lined up.



Episode Research & Prep

• Research confirmed guests (credits, past interviews, workflows, etc.)

• Identify interesting angles and topics for the conversation

• Prepare simple briefing notes and talking points

The goal is to make each episode focused, engaging, and useful for listeners.



Episode Production

• Edit episodes (currently we edit in Descript, though I'm open to alternate options as long as the quality is good). The podcast is available in both video and audio formats.

• Clean up audio (leveling, basic EQ/compression, removing distractions)

• Insert intro/outro and promotional segments

• Export final episodes



Publishing & Distribution

• Upload and schedule episodes in Captivate

• Publish episodes on the website using WordPress

• Upload episodes and clips to YouTube

• Ensure formatting, links, and presentation are consistent across all platforms

• Preparing/publishing social media posts



Content Repurposing

• Identify strong 
nts from each episode

• Create short-form clips (audiograms and/or video clips)

• Write captions tailored to musicians and producers

• Help turn each episode into multiple pieces of content

Each episode should generate multiple content assets, not just a single upload.



 Marketing

• Write weekly
s promoting each episode that address common issues home studio musicians experience and how the episode will help listeners solve them

• Schedule
s inside Drip

• Ensure each episode gets proper visibility with the audience



Analytics & Optimization

• Track performance of episodes,
s, and content

• Identify what topics and clips perform best

• Suggest improvements over time



Monetization & Growth Opportunities

• Identify potential monetization opportunities: 

•  Sponsors

•  Partnerships

•  Affiliate opportunities



• Help integrate existing offers into the podcast: 

•  Coaching program (Amplitude)

•  Courses

•  Plugins



• Suggest ways to improve how the podcast contributes to overall business growth

 

What I'm Looking For:

• Understanding of music production, mixing, or audio engineering: You need to know what will resonate with this audience. You don't have to be a professional engineer, but you should be able to speak the language.

• Strong content instincts: You can identify what makes a great clip, hook, or angle. You think about content from the audience's perspective, not just the logistics of publishing.

• AI fluency: You're already using AI tools as part of your workflow — for research, writing, repurposing content, or speeding up repetitive tasks. You don't need to be an expert, but this should be a natural part of how you work.

• Clear, natural writing ability: Strong written and spoken English is required.
s, captions, and show notes should feel human and direct — not corporate or generic.

• Organized and reliable: Deadlines matter. A weekly podcast means a real weekly schedule. Things need to get done on time without being chased.

• Ownership mentality: You'll have full autonomy over your workflow. What matters is that work gets done on time and to a consistent standard. I'm not going to check in on you daily — you'll be expected to manage your own schedule, stay ahead of the pipeline, and flag issues before they become problems.

 

Bonus (Nice to Have)

• Experience editing podcasts or working in Descript

• Experience with WordPress

• Experience creating short-form video content (Reels, Shorts, etc.)

• Experience with
 marketing platforms like Drip

• Familiarity with YouTube publishing and basic optimization

• Familiarity with graphic design tools like Canva

 

How Success Is Measured

• A consistent pipeline of upcoming guests (no scheduling gaps)

• Weekly episodes released on time

• Each episode produces multiple pieces of content across
, social, and video

•
s are sent consistently and drive engagement

• Ongoing improvement in content performance over time

• The podcast fuels monetary goals

 

What This Role Is NOT

• Not just a podcast editing role

• Not just a virtual assistant checking boxes

• Not a position where you wait to be told what to do

You'll be expected to think, contribute ideas, and improve the process over time.

 

To Apply:

Please include:

1. Examples of content you've worked on — podcasts, clips,
s, social posts, anything relevant

2. A brief introduction about your experience and why this role interests you



Applications that show genuine familiarity with the show and audience will stand out. You don't need to listen to a full episode, but it should be clear you took a few minutes to actually look.

title: Real Estate Content Video Editor
description:
Job Posting: Real Estate Video Editor (Long-Form + Short-Form)



Gig / Part-Time 



IMPORTANT: If you have ZERO experience creating content for real estate, and/or experience working with real estate clients, please do NOT apply. Thank you**



We’re looking for a dedicated, skilled, creative Video Editor with experience editing content in the real estate industry** who can turn raw footage into clean, polished, engaging videos designed to educate home buyers and sellers, build trust, and drive lead generation for real estate agents.



If you can skillfully edit both long-form (YouTube) and short-form vertical videos (Reels/Shorts/TikTok) with clean captions, strong pacing, and a modern style, at a quick turnaround time — you’ll be a great fit.



About the Role:

- You will edit video content for real estate agents, including:

           - Property Walkthrough Tours

           - Educational YouTube videos

           - Market update videos

           - Buyer/seller tips

           - Short-form vertical videos

           - Video ads for
, Instagram, and YouTube

           - Listing or neighborhood b-roll overlays when needed

We will provide raw clips, brand guidelines, examples, and clear notes for each project.



What We’re Looking For / Required Skills:

- Experience editing different styles of real estate videos catered to different avatars (luxury, first time buyers, home owners, sellers, motivated sellers, downsizers, etc

- Strong short-form editing skills: hooks, pacing, pattern interrupts

- Clean, modern captioning (not overly stylized)

- Ability to edit for multiple platforms:

         - 9:16 Reels/Shorts

         - 16:9 YouTube

         - 1:1
 feed (optional but preferred)

- Strong audio cleanup (noise reduction, clarity, leveling)

- Basic color correction

- Familiarity with real estate content (buyer/seller education, listing videos, etc.)

- Reliable turnaround time and communication



Qualifications:

      - Proven Video Editing Expertise: proficiency in video editing with a keen eye for creativity, storytelling, and detail.

      - Creative Vision: Ability to exhibit creative, innovative flair and storytelling to projects

      - Adaptability: Flexibility to adjust to changing creative directions and project requirements.

      - Ability to adjust editing style and messaging for distinct audiences—such as luxury buyers, first-time home buyers, distressed home sellers

      - Has the drive, hunger, and ability to do whatever it takes to materialize the creative vision and make deadlines



Bonus Skills (Preferred):

- Thumbnail creation

- Motion graphics

- Understanding of real estate compliance (no guarantees, no misleading claims)

- Experience with YouTube retention-focused editing



Responsibilities:

        - Edit long-form and short-form videos in a clean, modern style

        - Add captions using on-brand styling

        - Add b-roll, graphics, and minimal effects where appropriate

        - Maintain consistent pacing and high retention

        - Export in the correct aspect ratios and file formats

        - Deliver revisions in a timely manner

        - excellent/reliable communication

        - reliable internet/power connections

        - Organize files properly within Drive/Dropbox



Tools You Should Be Comfortable With:

         - Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Pro

         - Google Drive / Dropbox

         - Basic audio enhancement tools

         - Canva or Photoshop for thumbnails



Turnaround Expectations:

       - Short-form videos: 24–48 hours

       - Long-form videos: 3–5 days

Batch projects: timelines provided per batch



Reliability and communication is very important.



Compensation:

         - Rates will depend on experience and skills.

Please provide:

           - Your rate per short-form video

           - Your rate for long-form edits (
+ minutes)

           - Your monthly retainer options (optional)



How to Apply:

Please submit:

        - Your real estate editing portfolio

        - (Reels/Shorts + YouTube long-form examples required)

        - A brief note about your experience with real estate content

        - resume

        - The tools/software you use

        - Availability (hours/week)

        - upload 2–3 of your best short-form reels

        - upload 2-3 of your best long form videos

        - Your rates and typical turnaround time



What Happens Next:

        - Shortlisted candidates will be given a paid test edit to evaluate creativity, style, pacing, captions, and delivery.



P.S., if you have ZERO experience in any of these fields, no portfolio of past real estate works, or cannot fulfill requirements-------please do NOT apply.  Thank you!

title: Senior Bookkeeper (Australian Accounting)
description:
We are Roger, a specialist hospitality and restaurant accounting firm. We support restaurants, cafes, bars and hospitality operators with bookkeeping, payroll, supplier administration, accounts payable, reconciliations and reporting. We also provide clients with weekly P&L dashboards, budget vs actual reporting, expense breakdowns, KPI trends and GST visibility.



We are looking for a Senior Bookkeeper with at least 5 years of Australian bookkeeping or accounting experience. You must be very strong in Xero and comfortable using (or learning) Hubdoc daily.



This is not a junior role. We need someone accurate, reliable, responsive and confident working across multiple clients in a high-volume environment.



Key responsibilities



Reconcile bank feeds, credit cards, merchant facilities and payment platforms in Xero

Process supplier invoices daily through Hubdoc

Match bills, payments and receipts accurately

Investigate unreconciled items, duplicate entries and missing documents

Maintain accurate accounts payable records and supplier balances

Prepare clean, up-to-date Xero files for weekly reporting, BAS and month-end review

Prepare weekly accounts payable batch files

Complete weekly supplier statement reconciliations

Process payroll and complete payroll checks

Support weekly reporting and month-end close

Creating workflows which will be followed by future bookkeepers



Must-have requirements



Minimum 5 years of Australian bookkeeping or accounting experience

Strong Xero experience

BAS-ready bookkeeping experience

High attention to detail

Strong written English

Able to clean up messy files and identify errors quickly



Role details



Part-time role, currently 20 hours per week

Working hours: 10:00am to 2:00pm Philippines time

As we win additional clients, hours will increase by 5 hours per week per client

We expect this role to become full-time by July 2026

This role is intended to grow into a Bookkeeping Team Leader position managing junior bookkeepers



Who would suit this role

You have worked in Australian bookkeeping for several years, know Xero very well, understand reconciliations and accounts payable deeply, and can take ownership of your work without being micromanaged.



To apply, please answer the following



How many years of Australian bookkeeping experience do you have?

How many years have you used Xero?

Have you prepared BAS-ready files before?

Have you worked with hospitality, restaurant or cafe clients?

List your previous employers with contactable
s or Australian phone numbers to verify you experience

 marketing (e.g., Mailchimp or ConvertKit).

Anny Sanchez-Rossetto

title: Appointment Setter – Music Industry (Night Shift)
description:
Appointment Setter – Music Industry (Night Shift | Philippines)

Iconent Group — US-Based Artist Management & Distribution



We work with independent hip-hop/rap artists in the US market. We're hiring one Appointment Setter to call warm inbound leads, qualify them, and book strategy calls with our Artist Development Manager.

High-performance sales qualification role. Strict script, daily KPIs, no improvising. Serious applicants only.



What You'll Do



Call warm US inbound leads (no cold calling)

Qualify using a structured script and scoring system

Book qualified artists for a 30-min Zoom with our ADM

Confirm appointments the morning of each closer call

Update CRM, Sheets tracker, and call evaluation after every call





Schedule

01:00 AM – 09:00 AM Manila Time | Mon–Fri (Sat optional)

Fixed night shift. Long-term commitment only.



Non-Negotiable Requirements

English: Near-native spoken English, neutral accent, confident and natural on the phone — not robotic.

Experience: 1+ year calling US leads in a setter, qualifier, or inside sales role. Chat support,
 support, and VA backgrounds do not qualify.

Technical: 25 Mbps down / 10 Mbps up · Quiet private workspace · Backup internet · Noise-cancelling headset.



Preferred



Experience in music, entertainment, or artist management

Background in urban/hip-hop industry

High-ticket sales experience ($500–$5,000 range)

Familiarity with CRM tools and Google Sheets





KPIs (Daily)

80–100 call attempts · 15–25 reached · 3–5 booked · 70%+ show-rate · CRM updated within 5 min of every call



Compensation

Base: $300–$450/month · 



How to Apply

Start your message with: "Night Shift – Ready"



2–3 sentences: who you are, where you're based, why this role

Calling experience: how long, what industry, what role, what tools

Voice recording (60–90 sec): "An artist says he's been making music for 10 years, spent $5,000 on promotion with nothing to show for it, and says he's ready to invest but needs to figure out his finances first. How do you respond?" — Vocaroo or Google Drive link.

Speed test screenshot from speedtest.net

Written confirmation: "I confirm I can work 01:00 AM – 09:00 AM Manila Time, Monday to Saturday, long-term."



We review voice recordings first. If your English isn't clear and confident, your application ends there.

title: Expert Shopify Product Lister

title: Looking for Remote Workers
description:
We are a California-based eCommerce company with over 10 years of experience, currently looking to hire a few high-quality remote tea
mbers from the Philippines.



To streamline our hiring process, we are offering candidates the opportunity to skip the interview stage by submitting a short Loom video.



How to Apply:

Please record a Loom video (
/

) answering the following questions honestly and in detail:

title: Long Form Faceless Video Editor
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled long-form video editor to join our team and help produce engaging, high-retention YouTube content.



This role is perfect for someone who understands storytelling, pacing, and viewer psychology, and can turn a script + voiceover into a compelling visual experience. The videos will be documentary and/or motivational style with the use of fast-paced edits and motion graphics.



You will need advanced skills in:

-Adobe Premiere Pro

-After Effects (or similar for motion graphics)

-Understands retention editing (pattern interrupts, pacing, visual hooks)

-Has a good eye for storytelling and emotional beats

-Able to work independently and meet deadlines consistently

This will start as a short-term opportunity (trial basis), with the potential to turn into a long-term role if the quality of work is a strong fit.

title: AI Video Production VA
description:
We Are Hiring!

AI Video Production Assistant

Full-Time | Serious Applicants Only



We operate a growing network of YouTube channels and publish content daily across multiple niches. To keep up with demand, we're adding a dedicated production assistant to our team — someone who wants to stick around, master a workflow, and build something long-term with us.



You won't be creating content from scratch. You'll be following a clear, repeatable process — handling scripting, video production, and publishing using a set of AI tools we'll train you on from day one. It takes time to learn. It takes discipline to execute daily. But for the right person, it's a stable, rewarding role with real room to grow.



This is not for people looking for a side gig or a quick paycheck. This is for someone ready to dedicate themselves fully.



What We Need

• Full-time availability — 8 hours a day

• Patience and commitment during the learning phase

• Obsessive attention to detail

• Ability to work independently and stay on track without supervision

• Comfortable picking up new AI tools quickly

• Stable internet connection, always reachable during work hours

• Solid written English skills

• Long-term only — we invest in people who invest in us



Bonus Points

• Familiarity with YouTube or content workflows

• Hands-on experience with AI tools

• Background in VA or operations work



Compensation

Base: $300 USD/month + performance bonuses

2-month review with potential pay increase

All tools provided and paid for — nothing comes out of your pocket



To Apply

Send a DM starting with the word 'COMMITTED' (so we know you read everything). Include: a quick intro and your location, your hours and timezone, any relevant experience, and what makes you the right fit for a demanding, long-term role.



Only apply if this is your primary focus. We're building a team — not a roster of side hustlers.

title: High-Volume Recruiter- Construction, Engineering, Mining  Sectors
description:
Role: High-Volume Recruitment Specialist- for Construction, Engineering,  Heavy Industry, Mining /Oil and Gas roles. 

Location: 100% Remote - WFH

Hours: 40 hrs per week. - 9am - 5pm AEST> 

Region: Perth, WA - Australia 

Monthly Salary: 55 - 60k PHP + Generous Bonus + Perks + Paid Leave

Contract: Independent Contractor - Ongoing



Our Client

Our Client is a specialist recruitment and workforce solutions provider, supporting clients across heavy industry sectors including construction, engineering, mining, and oil & gas. With a strong reputation for delivering quality talent at scale, supporting critical projects, shutdowns, and ongoing workforce needs.





The Role

We are seeking an experienced Talent Acquisition Specialist to join our team, focused on delivering high-volume recruitment across multiple heavy industry sectors. This role will play a key part in sourcing, mobilising, and managing large workforces for major projects, including FIFO assignments and shutdown campaigns.



This is a fast-paced, delivery-focused position suited to someone agile who thrives in high-volume environments and understands the complexities of workforce mobilisation.



Key Responsibilities. 



- Manage end-to-end recruitment across high-volume roles within construction, engineering, mining, and oil & gas

- Deliver bulk hiring campaigns for project-based and shutdown requirements

- Source and engage candidates through multiple channels, including job boards, databases, referrals, and direct outreach

- Screen and assess candidates efficiently while maintaining quality standards

- Coordinate workforce mobilisation, including compliance, documentation, and onboarding requirements. 

- Build and manage a pipeline of compliant and "site ready" candidates. 

- Manage FIFO recruitment processes, including logistics and candidate readiness

- Partner with internal stakeholders to understand workforce needs and timelines

- Maintain accurate candidate records and reporting within ATS/CRM systems. Bullhorn. 

- Ensure a strong candidate experience throughout the recruitment lifecycle

- Support workforce planning and pipeline development for upcoming projects



Requirements To Apply. 

- 3+ years proven experience in high volume recruitment, in heavy industry sectors (construction/engineering/mining/oil and gas). 

- 2 + years previous experience with International Recruitment (Clients and Candidates outside of PH). 

- Excellent communication skills in English both written and verbal. 

- High degree of confidence talking to candidates via phone. 

- Experience using recruitment tools ATS/CRM systems such as Bullhorn or similar. 



Ideal Candidates. 

- Have previous experience with an Australian recruitment and workforce solutions company. 

- Strong understanding of construction, engineering, mining, and/or oil & gas recruitment

- Experience recruiting for FIFO roles and managing workforce mobilisation

- Demonstrated experience supporting shutdowns or project-based hiring campaigns

- Ability to manage multiple roles and tight deadlines in a fast-paced environment

- Strong stakeholder management and communication skills

- Highly organised with strong attention to detail



Why Apply?

Opportunity to work with a well-established and growing recruitment business. 

Long-term stable role. 

Exposure to major projects across key industry sectors.

Collaborative and supportive team environment.

Competitive salary and performance incentives.

Career growth within a specialist recruitment environment.



How to Apply. 

- Please link your most updated CV. 

- Please provide a brief overview of your most relevant experience for the client and role. 

- Please highlight Australian experience. 

- Provide an overview of your complete WFH Set-Up including device/internet speed test/ back-up internet options and back-up power options. 

- Please provide a brief intro video- 3 minutes Max.

title: Appointment Setter / Cold Caller – Agricultural Services (Part-Time)
description:
We are looking for a reliable, professional cold caller with excellent English skills to help us book appointments with farm owners on the East Coast.

About the Role

You will make outbound calls to farm owners who use the H-2A program. Your goal is to introduce our H-2A paperwork and recruitment compliance services and set 15-minute discovery calls for the owner.

Agent Duties:

•  Make 40–60 outbound cold calls per day

•  Follow the provided script and objection handlers

•  Qualify leads and book appointments

•  Leave professional voi
s

•  Log all calls and outcomes in Google Sheets

•  All calls are recorded for quality and training

Schedule:

•  Part-time and flexible (on and off – not full-time every week)

•  Monday to Thursday only (No Fridays, weekends, or holidays)

•  Core hours: 8:00 AM – 1:00 PM Eastern Time (US)

•  Some days may start at 7:30 AM or go until 2:00 PM depending on the week

Requirements (Must Have):

•  Excellent, near-perfect English — very clear pronunciation, neutral or light accent, and a professional phone voice

•  Previous cold calling or appointment setting experience is a big plus

•  Comfortable speaking with business owners

•  Quiet workspace with good internet and headset

•  Reliable, self-motivated, and punctual

What We Provide:

•  Full call script + objection handling guide

•  Targeted lead list (East Coast farms)

•  Cloud phone system with US numbers + automatic call recording

•  Google Sheet for tracking

Pay:

$5.00 – $7.50 per hour depending on experience and performance.

We are fair and will increase pay after 2–4 weeks for strong performers (based on appointments set).

title: Amazon Growth Operator for Amazon FBA Brand
description:
We are hiring an Amazon Growth Operator for our Amazon FBA brand.



This is not a basic PPC role.



You will help manage Amazon PPC, organic keyword ranking, product launches, product relaunches, conversion rate, TACOS, keyword tracking, and coordination with our creator/inbox VA.



We need someone who understands that PPC is not just about lowering ACOS. PPC should help drive profitable growth, improve organic ranking, and support the overall product strategy.



You will be responsible for:



Managing Sponsored Products campaigns.

Tracking organic keyword rankings.

Choosing which keywords should be pushed for ranking.

Monitoring CTR, CVR, CPC, ACOS, TACOS, sessions, and unit session percentage.

Creating weekly action plans for each product.

Identifying when a product has a traffic problem, conversion problem, or ranking problem.

Coordinating with our creator/inbox VA so they know which products and keywords need support.

Helping execute launch and relaunch plans.

Search term harvesting and negative keyword management.

Flagging listing issues that hurt conversion, including price, reviews, main image, coupon, title, images, and A+ content.



Requirements:



Experience with Amazon Seller Central.

Experience with Amazon Campaign Manager.

Experience with Helium 10 or similar keyword tools.

Strong spreadsheet skills.

Good English.

Strong analytical thinking.

Ability to manage tasks and communicate clearly with another VA.

Ability to follow SOPs and improve them over time.



To apply, please answer:





If we want to rank for 1 keyword, how would you set up the Sponsored Products campaign?



How would you d
 which keyword deserves external support?



Have you ever managed or coordinated with another VA? Give an example.



Please send C.V!!



Experience with Amazon Seller Central, Campaign Manager, Helium 10, keyword research, and PPC reports is required.

title: Events Administrator/Lead generation
description:
Hours: 38 hours/week (full-time)



Rate: $200/week (~$5.26/hour), with pay review after 3 months for strong performers



Schedule: Monday–Friday, 1pm–8pm Manila time. Planning calls Monday & Friday.



Bonuses: 13th month pay (paid in December, pro-rated for time worked)



Start: Two-week paid trial, then ongoing if it's a good fit



About us

The Design Forums connects architects & interior designers across the UK and Ireland through a portfolio of industry events including The Architects Forums, The Design Forums and Design Soiree. We organise RIBA-accredited CPD seminars, product showcases and networking events in over 12 cities. We're looking for a full-time VA to support our growing events calendar with LinkedIn outreach, event logistics and invoice management.



Our Websites: 









The role



LinkedIn outreach — Sending connection requests and follow-up messages to a defined list of target prospects using approved templates. You'll work from our LinkedIn account via a shared browser setup. Must understand LinkedIn's weekly limits and how to keep an account in good standing.

Event logistics coordination — Supporting the planning and delivery of events including liaising with attendees, collecting requirements (dietary needs, accessibility, timings), chasing confirmations, and keeping our CRM up to date.

Invoice chasing — Polite, professional follow-ups with clients on overdue invoices. You'll work from a weekly aged debtors report we provide.





Working pattern



38 hours per week, Monday to Friday



Core hours: 1pm–8pm Manila time (= 6am–1pm Dublin during Irish summer; 5am–12pm Dublin during Irish winter)



Planning calls every Monday and Friday at 5pm Manila / 10am Dublin — Monday to plan the week ahead, Friday to review

Additional check-in calls as and when required throughout the week

Short daily update
 (3 bullet points: what I did today / what I'm doing tomorrow / anything blocking me)

Most of your day is async — you'll work through the task list independently between calls





Tools & systems



You'll use our VOIP phone system for all outbound calls (we provide access)

You'll use our CRM for logging activity, tracking contacts, and managing follow-ups

Training will be provided on both systems, but the expectation is that you can hit the ground running — you should be comfortable learning new software quickly and working independently from day one





Equipment & setup required



Dedicated home office or quiet workspace (no background noise on calls)

Professional headset with clear microphone

Stable, reliable internet connection 

Backup internet option (mobile hotspot) in case of outages

Working computer with webcam for video calls





Who we're looking for



2+ years' VA experience, ideally with a Western client

Strong written and spoken English — your messages and calls represent our business

Confident on outbound calls — friendly, professional, not timid

Detail-oriented; events work means small mistakes have real consequences

Self-starter who can manage their own workload without constant supervision



Bonus if you have:



Experience in events, hospitality, or B2B sales support

Experience with 
, or another CRM





Pay & progression



$200/week during the two-week paid trial

Continued at $200/week after a successful trial

Pay review at 3 months with a rise for excellent performance



13th month bonus paid in December (pro-rated for time worked) — yours from your first month

Paid via Wise or PayPal, weekly or fortnightly





To apply, please send a WhatsApp message to 
mentioning my name (Mike) and the company (The Design Forums), along with:



A short intro (text or 1-min voice note/video — voice or video preferred)



Applications  that don't mention my name and the company, won't be reviewed — it's how I filter for people who actually read job posts.



If your reply looks like a good fit, the next step will be a short video interview. We arte hoping for an immediete start.



Looking forward to hearing from you.



Mike

The Design Forums

title: Character Illustrator-Animator / AI Visual Producer — Short-Form Videos
description:
Prismiera is building an identity forward jewelry brand using AI influencers. We're hiring a remote creative-production specialist to create, curate, and refine expressive character segments of varying styles for short-form social video. 



We can train and provide guidance on the AI pipeline relatively quickly, but the artistic talent and execution ceiling we're looking for is not something we can teach. Bring the character literacy and taste, strong character judgment matters more than existing AI tool fluency. You do not need to hand-draw or animate every asset from scratch, but you do need enough character-art vocabulary to judge expression, gesture, silhouette, emotional clarity, and consistency.



This is not a generic AI prompt-operator role and not a traditional frame-by-frame animation role. You'll create, curate, and refine expressive characters using AI tools, reference pools, and light manual edits where needed. You'll generate motion from curated stills using AI video tools, time clips to narration, and deliver finished 20–60 second segments.



Emphasis on Character-focused visual segments where the character's expression, pose, gesture, and motion carry the emotional beat of the narration.



The actual job is visual judgment under abundant AI output — repeatedly steering, selecting, rejecting, refining, and sequencing AI-generated visual output so it matches our visual style, emotional tone, and character identity. In practice, this means you'll often be choosing the right image or motion take from many AI outputs. 



What you'll do



Create, curate, and refine expressive character and environment stills using AI image tools and reference pools

Make corrections or light hand edits where AI output misses (gesture, expression, silhouette)

Generate motion from selected stills using AI video tools (Seedance2, Kling — training provided)

Curate ElevenLabs voiceover. - Guidance provided.

Sequence and time motion clips against narration audio

Deliver finished segments for short-form social video

Keep recurring characters consistent across many pieces

Help build reference systems, style notes, and visual judgment language over time

Document what worked, what failed, and why — so the system improves



The style we want

We like character work with high emotional expressiveness — diverse emotional grammar from shoujo to shonen - virality native illustrated character storytelling.

The work should feel alive and artist-directed, not randomly generated.



You might be a fit if you



Have some visual substrate in character work — illustration, comics, animation, storyboards, VTuber assets, visual novels, AI character work, or another medium where expression and character consistency matter

Have work that shows strong character taste

Can recognize and articulate why a character expression, gesture, or pose works (or doesn't)

Can keep one character feeling like the same person across multiple pieces

Have strong judgment under abundant AI output.

Demonstrate execution discipline — you finish work, you iterate cleanly, you ship completed videos autonomously under pressure and shifting artistic demand.

Are curious about AI image and motion tools, even if you haven't used them extensively yet

Can time visual beats to narration rhythm

Understand short-form social videos and virality sense

Communicate clearly and work well async

Have audience-validated work (YouTube, ArtStation, webcomic, Patreon, indie projects, etc.) — bonus, not required



Note on AI-assisted portfolios: AI-assisted work is welcome, but we will evaluate your taste/execution of scenes, character motion and overall aesthetics.



You're probably not a fit if you



Are mainly a prompt operator with no character art vocabulary or judgment

Pick the flashiest AI output rather than the most emotionally accurate one

Cannot diagnose why a character feels off (eyes wrong, gesture stiff, expression cold)

Are a video editor without character personality literacy

Are a pure animator looking for traditional frame-by-frame work

Work mainly in hyperrealistic or cool-detached styles - we are looking for someone who has the capacity to adapt quickly to different styles and artistic mediums, not just hyperrealism or hyper stylized.

Want a one-off gig rather than a stable long-term creative partnership



Compensation

$800–$1100 USD/month full-time depending on portfolio, taste calibration, and trial performance. Higher long-term compensation available for candidates who can own the full character ? motion ? timing workflow with autonomous brand judgment.

Trial period prior to confirmed engagement. Tool access or tool allowance provided — you won't need to use your own AI video credits for production work.

Proactive raises as you prove out and scope expands. We're not looking for a one-off gig relationship — we're looking for a long-term creative partner who grows with the brand.

Hiring process

Portfolio screen. Send:



Portfolio link - your best work

Pieces that show expressive acting or emotional range (illustration, animation, AI work, comics, VTuber, etc.)

Motion or sequence sample if available — animatic, short edit, Live2D/VTuber motion, AI motion, storyboard sequence, or simple timed visual piece

Short note on your current visual workflow and how you'd approach learning AI image and motion tools

Audience metrics or self-published projects, if any (optional but useful signal)

Include the phrase "character-first" in your application so we know you read the full post

Use at least 7 apply points



Shortlisted candidates move into a paid two-week trial that may convert to a confirmed monthly retainer.

title: Design my backyard
description:
Hello,



I'd like to redesign my backyard to be nice, with paving, flowers, etc. It's very important that the budget for materials / labor is kept low, and if possible, suggest things that we can do ourselves even. Therefore, it's necessary that you research Amazon, home depot, and other stores to see what we can buy for cheap.



It's strongly preferred to be someone with a strong sense of aesthetic design, particularly with outdoors, and also has a good intuitive sense / can research the cost of materials, etc. An architect would even be best.



You can use AI to generate the concept images, and if you have design skills to do 2D layout and 3D design, that will be even better.



I'll pay for different parts completed, the first initial brainstorming and generic design, detailed breakdown of cost and materials, etc.

title: Content Marketing & E-commerce Optimization Lead (SEO, AEO and GEO)
description:
Role Overview



Jomingo is a leading Singaporean natural personal care brand dedicated to sustainable, high-performance skincare. We are looking for a forward-thinking Content Marketing & E-commerce Optimization Lead to take our digital presence into the next generation of search.



You will be responsible for driving Search Engine Optimization (SEO), Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) strategies. Your goal is to improve Jomingo's visibility and authority across traditional search engines and AI-driven discovery platforms (like Gemini, Perplexity, and ChatGPT), ensuring our brand surfaces in conversational interfaces and AI-generated answers globally.



Key Responsibilities



1. Strategy & Planning



Define and execute a holistic SEO, AEO, and GEO strategy aligned with Jomingo’s brand and content priorities.



Anticipate shifts in the AI discovery ecosystem (generative search, AI assistants, voice search) and translate them into actionable growth approaches.



Partner with the founder and creative teams to embed optimization best practices from planning through execution.



2. SEO & Technical Optimization



Lead on-page, off-page, and technical SEO improvements, including site structure, metadata, internal linking, and schema markup on Shopify.



Monitor crawlability, indexation, and site health, proactively resolving technical issues.



Ensure SEO requirements are incorporated into CMS updates and new feature releases.



3. AEO & GEO Enablement



Optimize content and data structures to improve visibility in AI-generated answers, featured snippets, and voice responses.



Develop frameworks for structuring content to support entity recognition, topical authority, and trusted source signals.



Adapt content formats, tone, and structure specifically for AI-driven discovery engines.



4. Content & Editorial Optimization



Provide guidance for content creation, including keyword intent mapping, topic clustering, and semantic optimization.



Ensure evergreen and campaign content is optimized for discoverability and relevance across all digital channels.



Support scalable optimization frameworks for localized market efforts.



5. Performance & Analytics



Define KPIs and measurement frameworks for SEO, AEO, and GEO performance.



Track rankings, visibility, and AI-surface performance, translating data into clear, actionable recommendations.



Produce regular reports highlighting opportunities, risks, and impact on brand acquisition.



Role Requirements



Shopify Expertise: Proven experience optimizing E-commerce stores specifically on the Shopify platform.



AI Search Fluency: Deep understanding of how LLMs and Generative Search Engines (GEO) rank and cite brands.



Technical Proficiency: Strong grasp of Schema Markup (JSON-LD), site architecture, and Core Web Vitals.



Analytical Mindset: Ability to translate complex data from GA4, Search Console, and AI tracking tools into business growth.



Why Join Jomingo?



Work with Impact: Work directly with the Founder of the brand; your voice and strategy will directly shape the company’s future.



Flexible Autonomy: Enjoy flexible working hours—we value results and target achievement over "clock-in" times.



Timezone Alignment: We operate on the same timezone (Singapore/Philippines), ensuring seamless communication and no late-night meetings.



Agile Environment: No complex organizational structures or red tape; we move fast and value innovation.

We are now building the next phase of our growth — and we’re looking for a Senior Creative Strategist who can take full ownership of our creative direction and lead our team to 8-figure scale.

• Develop, test, and scale winning creative strategies and ad angles

• Create detailed, conversion-focused briefs for the editing team

• Take initiative without waiting for instructions

• Creative strategy for Meta Ads

• Understanding of hooks, angles, positioning, and scaling creatives

• Portfolio of creative briefs, ads, or strategy work



We hire for drive and potential.

What We Offer:

• Full-time, long-term role

• Opportunity to lead and scale a creative department

• Performance-based bonuses

If you're ready to take ownership, lead a team, and build something significant — we’re ready to meet you.
