title: Client Accounting Manager
description:
Client Accounting Manager



***To apply you must read the entire post and follow the directions at the bottom***



Location: Remote

Type: Full-time (40 hours/week, 6am–2pm CST)

Reports To: CEO



About Us

Out of Site Bookkeeping is a fast-growing, client-focused bookkeeping firm dedicated to helping small businesses succeed. We pride ourselves on our collaborative, supportive culture and our commitment to continuous improvement. Join a team where your expertise and leadership will be valued!



Position Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Client Accounting Manager to provide high level client support and project management, as well as train and manage our bookkeeping team. The ideal candidate is a natural leader with exceptional communication skills, a continuous improvement mindset, and a passion for delivering outstanding client experiences. You’ll thrive under deadlines, support your team, and ensure the highest standards of service for our clients.



Key Responsibilities

1. Team Training & Development:

   Mentor, train, and support the bookkeeping team to foster skill development, accountability, and a collaborative culture. Provide regular feedback and training to help team members reach their full potential and keep up on new bookkeeping best practices.

2. Quality Control & Process Optimization:

   Oversee the accuracy and compliance of all client bookkeeping work. Conduct regular quality checks, update and maintain SOPs and best practices, and lead process improvements to enhance efficiency and minimize errors.

3. Client Project Management:

   Guide client projects from onboarding to completion by outlining project tasks and milestones for the team to fulfill. Assist bookkeepers with high level entries (and provide training) to keep projects on track. Follow up with clients to obtain documents or other information necessary to keep on track. 



Qualifications

- Degree in accounting or a related field

- Strong knowledge of accounting principles and practices

- Excellent attention to detail, analytical, and problem-solving skills

- Excellent verbal and written English; must be easily understood by US-based clients

- Strong teamwork and independent work abilities

- Proficiency with Microsoft Office Suite and Google GSuite, especially Excel/Sheets

- Flexible and adaptable to changing guidelines and bookkeeping practices



Experience

- Minimum 5 years of bookkeeping experience

- At least 2 years of leadership or management experience

- Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online



Compensation & Benefits

- Training pay: $5/hr for the first ~90 days, pay rate increase based on performance during training

- 13th month pay or holiday bonuses

- Professional growth and development opportunities

- Collaborative, supportive team environment



How to Apply:

1. Reply to this job post with “World’s Best Leader” in the subject line.

2. In your response, state how many:

- years of leadership or supervisory experience you have

- years of bookkeeping experience you have

- years of hands-on experience with QuickBooks Online you have

3. Tell us one thing that sets you apart from other applicants.



***Applications that do NOT follow these instructions will be automatically disqualified without opening.



Ready to lead, inspire, and make a difference? We’d love to hear from you!

title: Accounting Manager
description:
Role Overview

We are seeking a Senior Accounting Manager to lead and orchestrate the financial operations of a large-scale, global enterprise. This is not a "hands-on" role for a generalist; it is a strategic leadership position requiring a candidate who has mastered the complexities of high-volume transactions and multi-national entity management.



The successful candidate will oversee a sophisticated accounting department, providing high-level coordination across specialized functions including AP, AR, Cost Accounting, and FP&A. You will be responsible for the integrity of the group’s financial health, specifically focusing on the consolidation of multiple overseas sub-entities and ensuring seamless financial reporting at scale.



Key Responsibilities

1. Strategic Leadership & Team Management

-Directly manage and mentor a team of functional managers (AP Manager, AR Manager, Cost Manager, and FP&A Manager).

-Standardize accounting workflows across departments to ensure maximum efficiency and accuracy.

-Act as the primary bridge between technical accounting and strategic financial planning.



2. Global Consolidation & Reporting

-Lead the month-end and year-end closing process for the parent company and 3+ international sub-entities.

-Prepare and review Consolidated Financial Statements in accordance with IFRS/GAAP, ensuring all intercompany eliminations and foreign currency translations are flawlessly executed.

-Oversee global audit coordination and ensure compliance with international statutory requirements.



3. Operational Excellence & Oversight

-Supervise the Cost Management function to ensure manufacturing/operational costs are optimized and accurately reflected.

-Collaborate with the FP&A Manager to align historical accounting data with forward-looking budgets and forecasts.

-Ensure the AR and AP functions are operating at scale, maintaining healthy cash flow and vendor/client relationships.



4. Systems & Internal Controls

-Maintain and improve internal control frameworks (SOX or equivalent) within a large-scale ERP environment (SAP, Oracle, etc.).

-Drive continuous process improvement to handle increasing transaction volumes and organizational complexity.



Qualifications & Requirements

-Experience: Minimum of 10+ years of progressive accounting experience, with at least 3 years in a Senior Management role within a large corporate environment or a Big 4 accounting firm.



-Scale Mastery: Proven track record of managing accounting for organizations with significant revenue and complex departmental structures. Experience in small-to-mid-sized firms alone will not be sufficient for this role.



-Technical Expertise: Expert-level knowledge of Consolidated Financial Statements and multi-currency reporting.



-Education: Bachelor’s degree in Accounting or Finance; CPA or CMA certification is highly preferred.



-Systems: Advanced proficiency in Tier-1 ERP systems (SAP S/4HANA, Oracle EBS) and consolidation software.



-Leadership: Demonstrated ability to manage other managers and influence stakeholders at the executive level.

title: Virtual Finance Manager (Property Management) UK
description:
Job Title: Accounts & KPI Manager (Property Management)

Job Overview



We are a UK-based property management and lettings company looking for a highly organised and detail-driven Accounts & KPI Manager to take full ownership of our financial processes.



This role is not just bookkeeping — you will be responsible for ensuring all financial data is accurate, reconciled across multiple systems, and that the business has clear visibility on performance through KPI reporting.



Key Responsibilities

Full reconciliation of accounts across Xero and our internal property management CRM

Ensuring all income and expenditure is correctly recorded, allocated, and matched across systems

Identifying and resolving discrepancies quickly and efficiently

Chasing internal team members for missing information, invoices, or supporting documents

Making sure all costs are correctly allocated and cross-charged to the correct properties, landlords, or projects

Monitoring rent payments, contractor invoices, and management fees

Producing regular financial reports and KPI dashboards for management

Highlighting issues, trends, or inefficiencies within the business

Assisting in improving internal financial processes and accountability

Key Skills & Experience

Strong experience using Xero (essential)

Proven experience in account reconciliation across multiple systems

High level of attention to detail — accuracy is critical in this role

Confident in chasing teams and holding people accountable for missing information

Strong understanding of financial reporting and KPIs

Experience in property management or real estate (preferred but not essential)

Excellent organisational and communication skills

Ability to work independently and take ownership of tasks

What We’re Looking For

Someone who takes full ownership of the accounts function

A problem-solver who can identify and fix issues, not just report them

A proactive individual who will improve systems and processes over time

Someone who is comfortable working with multiple systems and large volumes of transactions

Important



This role requires someone who is highly detail-oriented and persistent. You will be expected to follow up with team members to ensure all financial information is complete and accurate — no loose ends.



Bonus Skills (Not Essential)

Experience with property management software

KPI dashboard creation (Excel, Google Sheets, or reporting tools)

Understanding of UK property accounting (rent, deposits, contractor costs)

title: Looking for freelancers to create short how-to videos on online tools/software
description:
Hi everyone,



I’m currently looking for multiple freelancers to create short how-to / explainer videos for YouTube. I’m already working with a small team and looking to bring on several more people to increase output.



This is a simple screen-recording role where you explain how to do something step by step throughout the entire video.



We work with many different tools and software, some examples of tools and topics other freelancers have covered are:

- Canva: How to add a shadow to an image in Canva

- Shopify: How to add products in Shopify

- Mailchimp: How to find campaign ID in Mailchimp



There are thousands of topics available, and this is intended to be long-term, ongoing work.



How the workflow works:

- You will be assigned one software at a time (e.g. 
, Airtable, Asana, Klaviyo, etc.)

- You may need to spend some time familiarising yourself with that software before creating tutorials

- Each software includes a list of approximately 100 to 500 tutorial topics

- Your role is to work through as many topics as possible, ideally completing the full list

- Once finished, you will be assigned a new software and repeat the process



What the work involves:

- Recording short tutorials (usually 1–4 minutes, sometimes longer)

- Explaining clearly while navigating the software

- Basic editing (cutting mistakes, trimming pauses)

- Creating a simple thumbnail using a provided template I've created in Canva (quick and easy, mostly adding text)



Requirements:

- English fluency (minimum intermediate level) - this role is not suitable for freelancers with broken or difficult-to-understand English

- Clear audio quality

- A decent microphone with minimal background noise (noise reduction tools are fine, I recommend Krisp, SteelseriesGG, or Nvidia Broadcast for background noise removal)

- Ability to explain clearly and naturally (sounding confident is great!)

- Reliable and consistent, able to meet deadlines and communicate properly



Pay:

- $1 per approved video

- No cap on output

- You can produce 30 videos or 300 videos per week, completely up to you how many videos you want to create

- Please include how many videos you think you can produce weekly in your application



Time expectations (for transparency):

These are simple videos. Once you are familiar with the process, it is realistic to produce around 8-10 completed videos per hour (approximately $8-10 per hour), depending on tutorial lenght and complexity.



How to apply:

Please send a short sample how-to video created by you.



- It can be simple (e.g. how to change your desktop background)

- A more complex tutorial is preferred if possible

- Attach the file or send a Google Drive link (make sure it is set to public)



This will be used to evaluate:

- Your English level

- Your clarity when explaining

- Your on-screen presentation



Please do not apply with irrelevant video samples. I am not looking for a video editor, I am looking for freelancers to create screen recorded how-to tutorials, so please refrain from sending your video editing portfolio as this is not what I am looking for.

description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company selling health and wellness products across Europe. We're looking for a sharp, detail-obsessed funnel builder with experience in Funnelish to join us long-term.

This is not a short gig — we're building a team for the long haul. The starting pay reflects the trial period only. After that, you can expect:



Regular pay raises based on performance and contribution

Paid holidays and vacation days

Performance-based bonuses

Real growth opportunities as the company scales — the people who prove themselves early grow with us



We invest in our team, and we expect commitment in return.

WE NEED SOMEONE WHO IS:



Hardworking, smart, dedicated, and a perfectionist

Able to work with MINIMAL supervision

Detail-obsessed (a misplaced comma in a price like "€24,95" is a mistake we notice immediately)

Fast learner who can follow a template and SOP precisely

Reliable internet connection (50+ Mbps) with a backup option

Able to overlap at least 4 hours with European business hours (CET/CEST)



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING:



Building advertorials,  product pages, checkouts and full funnels in Funnelish



Following our existing template and SOP exactly



Implementing copy in multiple European languages (Dutch, German, French, Spanish, Swedish, etc.) — you don't need to speak any of them, but you need to copy-paste accurately and respect language-specific formatting (e.g. "€24,95" with comma for NL/DE, "29,95kr" for SE, "29,95€" for DE)



Working independently with AI tools to produce images, videos, and copy — you should be comfortable with tools like ChatGPT, Gemini, Canva, ElevenLabs, VEED, etc., and able to generate creative assets without us holding your hand



Adding GIFs, product images, FB-style comment blocks, scoring cards, review sections



Setting up Shopify product pages with correct SKU structure



Installing tracking (we use wetracked) and creating automations



Mobile-first QA — every funnel must look perfect on mobile before going live



SKILL REQUIREMENTS:



Funnelish



Shopify (basic product setup, variants, SKUs)



Web design & page layout (clean, minimal, conversion-focused)



Confident using AI tools to create product photos, videos, and write/refine copy independently



English: B2 or higher (clear written communication is essential)



BONUS SKILLS (not required, but a big plus):



Experience with health/wellness or supplement dropshipping



Familiarity with Meta Ads compliance (knowing what claims trigger ad rejections)



Basic Canva or Photoshop for quick image edits



Experience working with multi-language European stores



HOW TO APPLY:

To filter out generic applications, please reply with:



Your full name and timezone

3 funnels you've built — links to live URLs (not screenshots, not "I built for a client and can't share"). Any language is fine.

Which page builders you've used and how many funnels you've built in each

Your fastest internet speed test result (screenshot from 
 or speedtest.net)

The answer to this question: What is the biggest mistake you see beginner funnel builders make?

Start your message with the word "PERFECTIONIST" so we know you read this entire post



Applications without all 6 items will be ignored. We're looking to hire within 1 week.

title: Aesthetic Social Media Manager – Plastic Surgery (Before/After + Paid Ads + High-End Branding)
description:
We are a Beverly Hills plastic surgery practice seeking a high-level Social Media Manager with experience in aesthetic medicine, before/after organization, and paid marketing (PPC). This role includes content creation, before/after photo management, and paid advertising. This is NOT a basic posting job. We are looking for someone who understands luxury branding and patient conversion.



Responsibilities: Create and manage Instagram, TikTok, and
 content. Produce high-end reels and posts that attract real patients. Maintain a clean, luxury aesthetic appropriate for a Beverly Hills plastic surgery practice. Organize before and after photos systematically. Ensure proper lighting consistency, cropping, alignment, labeling, and categorization. Distribute before and after content across Instagram, TikTok,
, RealSelf, and provide to our website management team. Manage and run paid advertising campaigns on Instagram,
, and Google Ads for medspa and aesthetic services. Optimize campaigns for leads and conversions, not just clicks. Track and report performance.



Requirements: Please include a list of your previous employment, including dates of employment, exact duties and responsibilities, company name, and your supervisor’s name and company contact information.



Experience with plastic surgery or medspa marketing. Strong understanding of before and after presentation. Experience running paid ads on Meta (Instagram/Facebook) and Google. Skilled in tools such as CapCut, Adobe, Photoshop or equivalent. Not Canva-only.



Do not apply if: You only use Canva templates. You have no before and after experience. You have never run paid ads. You cannot show real accounts you personally managed.



Required test: Create one Instagram post for a Beverly Hills plastic surgeon. 1) Before and after post using any sample images, must look real, clean, and high-end. 2) Write a professional caption including a call to action. 3) Provide one reel idea that would attract patients.



Required submission format: 1) Three Instagram accounts you personally managed. 2) One example of organized before and after work (folder system or samples). 3) One paid ad campaign you ran (results or screenshots preferred). 4) The test assignment. 5) List of tools you use.

title: Social media manager/Sales closer
description: We are a youth mentorship organization currently seeking a professional to manage our social media page and respond to all dm’s who inquire about services. The goal is to utilize the leads to enroll clients in our services. We receive multiple inquiries daily and have nearly 30,000 who follow our page and over 400,000 average viewers.

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter
description:
We are looking for a confident and results-driven Cold Caller to join our team. Your main responsibility will be reaching out to potential leads, introducing our services, and setting appointments for our team.



Responsibilities:



Make outbound calls to prospective clients using provided leads

Introduce services clearly and professionally

Qualify leads and identify potential opportunities

Schedule appointments for the sales team

Maintain accurate notes and updates in the system



Requirements:



Proven experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or sales

Strong English communication skills with a clear speaking voice

Confident, persuasive, and professional on the phone

Ability to handle objections and rejections

Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment



Nice to Have:



Experience with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce)

Background in real estate, healthcare, or service-based industries

title: Operations & creative - Beauty salon & Education
description:
Hi! I’m Alex, founder of Face of Brows 

Australian based brow studio + education academy.



We run a busy studio, in person trainings, and have just launched our online course Brows & Biz. We’re scaling fast and I’m looking for a sharp, proactive VA to step in and help run the business at a high level.



This is not a basic admin role you’ll be the operational backbone across bookings, student experience, content, and lead flow.



If you’re switched on, take initiative, and want to grow with a fast-moving brand this is for you!



ROLE DETAILS



* 20–25 hrs/week ? path to full-time

* $750–800 USD/month

* Long-term role

* Min. 4 hrs overlap with Sydney 



WHAT YOU’LL OWN



Bookings & Admin



* Manage bookings, confirmations + calendar

* Fill last-minute slots + reschedules and pop onto Instagram. 

* Confirm studio bookings (48hrs prior)

* Inbox management (in my voice, triage, general admin)



Students & Community



* Onboard new students 
s + packs)

* organise Training days with vendors 

* Release Training dates on Shopify website 

* Follow-ups 

* Flag inactive students

* Help Manage Skool (welcome, content, engagement)



 Marketing (Flodesk)



* Build + send campaigns from my strategy

* Tag + segment

* Weekly reporting



Social Media 



* Confidently create Reels, stories, and carousels

* Edit videos (captions, cuts, effects)

* Design in Canva

* Maintain brand aesthetic + suggest improvements



Leads & Outreach



NICE TO HAVE



* Meta ads experience (otherwise provided)

* ManyChat

* KPI/dashboard experience

* Beauty industry knowledge 

* Shopify experience 



DEAL BREAKERS



* Can’t match my tone

* Needs constant direction

* Slow / unreliable

* No proof of past work



WHY THIS ROLE



We’re scaling Face of Brows into a leading education brand.



Your work will directly impact leads, enrolments, and growth and you’ll be part of building something big.



HOW TO APPLY



 subject: FACEOFBROWS VA



Include:



1. Short intro

2. Past VA work

3. Content examples

4. Answer:

    “What’s one process improvement you’d implement in your first month?”



(No subject line or answer = not considered)

title: Disaster Documentary  (Script Writer)
description:
We are looking for script writers to create long-form disaster documentary videos for our YouTube channel.

Scripts typically range between 4,000–10,000 words depending on the topic. Writers will research real-world disasters (natural and man-made) and craft emotionally engaging, well-structured narratives designed for YouTube storytelling.

AI tools such as ChatGPT or Claude may be used to assist with research and drafting, but the final script must be factually accurate, compelling, and humanized.

Prior YouTube or documentary-style writing experience is preferred but not required. Writers who consistently deliver high-quality scripts can expect steady monthly work.



Channel

 



Type of Work

 Flexible / Project-Based



Responsibilities

Write long-form disaster documentary scripts (4,000–10,000 words)

Research real-world disasters and verify factual accuracy

Structure scripts with strong storytelling (hook ~buildup ~ impact ~ aftermath)

Present events in an engaging, emotional, and respectful tone

Use AI tools to assist with drafting and research

Deliver scripts on schedule

 

Requirements

Strong English writing skills

Good research and fact-checking ability

Ability to structure long-form narrative content

Comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT / Claude)

Interest in storytelling, history, and real-world events

title: Senior Video Editor (Direct Response / Social Ads / E-commerce)
description:
We are looking for a Senior Video Editor who understands more than just editing.



We need someone who knows how to turn raw footage into high-converting ad creatives for social media.

This is not a basic editing role. We are looking for someone who understands pacing, hooks, retention, direct response, and performance-driven creative.



You should know how to create videos that are made to sell, not just look nice.



What you’ll do:

 • Edit high-converting video ads for Meta, TikTok, and other social platforms

 • Turn raw footage into strong direct-response creatives

 • Create different variations of winning concepts

 • Improve hooks, pacing, subtitles, structure, and retention

 • Work with briefs, references, and feedback from the team

 • Help turn ideas into polished, performance-focused ads

 • Spot weak 
nts in footage and make the final video stronger



You must have:

	•	strong editing skills

	•	experience with e-commerce ads

	•	understanding of direct response marketing

	•	good English

	•	fast turnaround

	•	strong attention to detail



Bonus if you have experience in beauty or wellness.



To apply, send:

	•	your portfolio

	•	winning ad examples



Start your response with the word strawberry.

title: AI Creative Editor
description:
We provide the vision; you provide the magic. We are looking for an AI Visual Editor whose sole focus is taking our finalized scripts and executing them perfectly using generative AI. Your job is to ensure the output matches the requested "vibe"—whether that’s the soft-lighting of a Pixar film, the thumb-print textures of Claymation, or the sharp line-work of Modern Anime.



Style Execution: Take provided scripts and reference Videos to generate high-quality AI assets that strictly adhere to the requested aesthetic.



Consistency Management: Ensuring characters and environments remain identical across different shots within the same script.



Qualifications: 



A portfolio showing diverse styles (show us you can do "Cute 3D" as well as "Gritty Anime").



High technical speed—you know the shortcuts to get the look we want without endless trial and error.



An obsession with visual detail and "style accuracy."



Technical Upscaling: Delivering high-resolution, "clean" final files ready for production or social media.

title: Remote Sales Operator | PHP100K-PHP300K+/pm| Paid Weekly
description:
100% Remote | Base $3.10/hr + Uncapped Commission | Realistic earnings: PHP100,000 - PHP300,000+/month | 48+ hrs/week, US time zones | Apply: 
/apply



Read this before you scroll past.



Last quarter, our top closer earned more in one month than most Filipino software engineers earn in a year. She didn't take a single call. She didn't cold message anyone. She sat at her desk, ran 3 live chats at once, and closed inbound leads through writing.



That's the job. That's it.



We're hiring 10 more like her.



WHO THIS IS FOR:

You've already closed sales in your life. You've hit a target, watched a leaderboard, felt the pressure of a number you had to put up by Friday. You write English like a native, you type fast, and you're tired of being paid the same as people who do half your work.



WHO THIS IS NOT FOR:

Skip this if you've never personally closed a deal. Skip it if you want a comfortable salary with no upside. Skip it if you want a side hustle. Skip it if a leaderboard scares you. We hire like a real sales floor, which means underperformers don't stay.



THE PAY (LET'S GET THIS OUT OF THE WAY):

- Base: $3.10/hr (~PHP177/hr), paid weekly from day one

- Commission: Uncapped, scaled by your leaderboard position that week

- Live earnings tracker so you always know your number

- No hold-back, no clawback, no agency cut



What our team actually clears:

- 94% of operators clear PHP100,000/month after the 90-day ramp

- Senior tier: PHP200,000 - PHP300,000+/month

- Top closer last quarter: equivalent of a US engineering salary



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Inbound messages land all shift. You respond, build rapport, and close.

- You'll run 3+ live conversations at once without dropping quality

- You'll hit daily revenue targets that roll into weekly leaderboard standings

- You'll take coaching from your shift manager and apply it the same shift



WHAT WE'RE HIRING FOR:

- Native-level written English (American casual, slang, emoji fluency, zero stiffness)

- 70+ WPM typing

- Reliable high-speed internet and a real workspace (not a coffee shop)

- 48+ hours/week, US time zones

- A coachable ego: you treat feedback as data and adjust faster than the people next to you

- Competitive drive: you want to win the leaderboard, not just hit base



Bonus points for:

- Prior remote sales experience

- Background in copywriting, persuasion, or behavioral psychology



THE PROCESS (FAST):

1. Written test: real sales scenarios scored on tone, instinct, close ability

2. Paid trial shift: 4-8 hours running live conversations next to a senior closer

3. Offer or pass within 48 hours of your trial



If you're the right fit, you're earning base + commission within one week of applying.



APPLY


/apply



All applications go through the portal. No DMs, no
. The portal is the test.

title: Customer Service/Operations Assistant
description:
**Customer Support & Operations Assistant — E-commerce Brand**



We're hiring a sharp, reliable Customer Support & Operations Assistant for our DTC e-commerce brand. This is a long-term role with a clear path from CS into ops — but only for someone who proves they can nail the fundamentals first.



**The role**



You'll own day-to-day customer support and gradually take on operations work as you prove yourself. Customer support is the foundation — we won't expand your scope until that's bulletproof.



**What you'll do**



- Handle customer tickets via Gmail at first then Commslayer 
 + chat) with fast, friendly, on-brand responses

- Coordinate with our US fulfillment partner and international fulfillment on order issues, delays, returns, and refunds

- Process Shopify orders, refunds, exchanges, and inventory adjustments accurately

- Keep tracking sheets in Google Sheets clean and updated daily

- Document recurring issues so we can build SOPs and improve processes over time

- Eventually: inventory reorder coordination, supplier follow-ups, fulfillment audits



**Hard requirements**



- 2+ years experience with Shopify (orders, refunds, fulfillment workflows)

- Prior experience with a 3PL or dropshipping fulfillment partner

- Excellent written English — customers will read your replies, no AI-generated tone

- Reliable internet, quiet workspace, backup power if outages are common in your area



**Responsiveness expectations (read carefully)**



This role requires active monitoring during your scheduled hours — not batch-checking every 1-2 hours. Specifically:



- Response time SLA: under 30 minutes during your active work hours

- Work hours: 4-hour continuous blocks (not scattered check-ins)

- Schedule: We need coverage overlapping US business hours (Eastern Time). PH evening shift works well.

- You'll be measured on response time, resolution rate, and CSAT — metrics are visible in Commslayer



If you prefer to work in random pockets throughout the day, this role is not for you.



**Compensation & hours**



- $6–$9 USD/hour depending on experience

- 25–35 hours/week to start, with room to grow to full-time

- Performance bonuses and rate increases for A-players who hit 90-day milestones

- Paid on the 1st and 15th



**How to apply**



Start your message with the exact phrase **"Attention to Detail"** so we know you read this. Applications missing this will be ignored.



Then answer all four:



1. Your Shopify + fulfillment experience (which 3PLs, what tools, how long)

2. Your typical response time when working a CS shift, and how you structure your work hours

3. A short example of a tricky customer situation you handled — what was the issue and how did you resolve it?

4. What does our brand sell? (Hint: Google "Asoleo")



Attach your resume or links to relevant work if you have them.



We'll respond to serious applicants within 5 business days. Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a paid 2-hour test task before any commitment.

Develop multiple logo concepts based on client briefs

Refine and iterate designs based on feedback

Ensure logos are versatile across digital and print formats

Deliver final files in appropriate formats (AI, EPS, PNG, SVG, etc.)



Apply here:

Strong portfolio showcasing diverse logo styles

Ability to understand brand positioning and target audience

Apply here:

Apply here:

title: Social Media Manager/Content Creator/Content Writer
description:
Job Overview

We are looking for a creative, tech-savvy, and empathetic Social Media Manager & Content Creator to become the "voice" of a growing brand. The creator, Amy 
 is a talented deaf and mute artist specializing in makeup, crochet, nails, and modeling.



Because Amy communicates through ASL (American Sign Language), we need a partner who can bridge the gap between her visual storytelling and a global hearing audience. Your goal is to take her raw video content and transform it into a polished, multi-channel powerhouse using cutting-edge AI tools.



Key Responsibilities

Content Synthesis: Watch Amy’s ASL videos (with her captions) and rewrite her message into engaging, high-quality English scripts for captions, blogs, and scripts.



AI Implementation: Utilize tools like ElevenLabs to generate a natural, branded voice for her videos. Explore AI video tools (like HeyGen or similar) to create a cohesive "voice-to-video" experience for her tutorials. We're excited about the upcoming release of Google's "Sign Gemma" which will translate sign language into text.



Social Media Management: Manage and grow 8+ accounts: 4 Instagrams, 2
s, 1 YouTube 
 and TikTok.



Audio/Music Mastery: Add trending, high-vibe music to Reels, TikToks, and Shorts. Since Amy cannot hear the audio, you will be responsible for ensuring the beats align with her movements and the energy of the video.



Video Editing (Short-Form): Cut raw footage into high-engagement Shorts/Reels, ensuring captions are visually stunning and perfectly timed.



Shop Management: Assist in managing the online shop for her handmade crochet and clothing line.



What We Are Looking For

Visionary Thinking: You don't just follow instructions; you see the potential for a brand and suggest new ideas.



AI Proficiency: Experience with ElevenLabs and AI video/editing tools is a huge plus.



Excellent English: Strong writing skills are required to ensure her captions and scripts are professional and expressive.



Music/Rhythm Sensitivity: An ear for what sounds good and what is currently trending on social media.



Compassion & Patience: You are helping a creator overcome a communication barrier; a supportive and collaborative attitude is essential.



How to Apply

Check out Amy’s 
 (Raver Secrets).



Send us a brief cover letter explaining why you are the right fit to be her "voice."



Mandatory Task: In your application, tell us which ElevenLabs voice you think would best suit a creative, trendy makeup/crochet artist and why.



Include a link to your portfolio or social media accounts you have managed.

title: Executive Assistant / Event Coordinator Support
description:
Part-Time | Remote (with event day availability) | ~20 hrs/week



About the Role



We're seeking a full-service event production company looking for a sharp, proactive assistant to support our CEO and operations team. This is a fast-moving environment — you'll be trusted with real work from day one.



We are looking for someone to start on Monday, May 4th.



What You'll Do



- Manage CEO calendar, inbox, and communications

- Draft and send
s, follow-ups, and client-facing correspondence

- Research and source vendors and venues

- Assist with run of show creation and event documentation

- Support event day execution

- Handle scheduling, task tracking, and general administrative coordination



What We're Looking For



- Must be available during Eastern Time hours 

- Strong written communication — clear, professional, no fluff

- Highly organized with sharp attention to detail

- Experience in events, hospitality, or executive support preferred

- Comfortable in a fast-paced, self-directed environment

- Proficient with tools like Google Workspace, ClickUp, or similar platforms

- Available Wednesday, Thursday, and weekends when events require



This Role Is NOT For You If:



- You need heavy oversight or step-by-step direction

- You struggle with shifting priorities or tight turnarounds



To apply, complete our paid skills assessment. Compensation discussed upon selection.

title: Remote Video Editor (Full-Time)
description:
Real Estate Video Editor (Final Cut Pro Only)



We’re hiring 2 high-level video editors to join our real estate media team creating high-performing content.



Think:



Instagram Reels

Luxury property marketing

High-retention storytelling edits



If you don’t use Final Cut Pro — this role is not for you.



We edit exclusively in Final Cut.



What We’re Looking For



You understand:



• Hook-driven editing

• Fast pacing

• Retention-focused cuts

• Clean captions

• Sound design

• B-roll layering

• Visual rhythm



You know how to build tension.

You understand scroll psychology.

You make viewers stay past 3 seconds.



We don’t want slideshow editors.



We want storytellers.



IMPORTANT — Do NOT Apply Through OnlineJobs



Do NOT message us here.



 your application to:







Subject line:



FCP Editor Application — (Your Skill Level)



Applications sent through OnlineJobs will not be reviewed.



Attention to detail matters.



Skill-Level Test Edits



We’ve created multiple test edits based on different skill levels.



Choose ONE:



Beginner

Intermediate

Advanced



Download files here:





Include in Your
:



Your finished video



Screenshot or screen recording of your Final Cut timeline



Estimated edit time



Your computer specs



Links to past work

title: JOB POSTING — SHOPIFY STORE MANAGER Hearth Goodwill Group Full-Time | Remote | $1,000/month
description:
WHO WE ARE

We are a fast-moving ecommerce group operating multiple DTC brands across different niches. Our brands are mission-driven, product-focused, and built to scale. We move fast, we test constantly, and we expect the people we work with to keep up. We are looking for someone who can own the Shopify side of multiple stores completely — without needing to be managed at every step.



THE ROLE

A full-time Shopify Store Manager who takes complete ownership of store building, product listing, copywriting, and technical maintenance across multiple ecommerce brands. You will work directly with the founders and be the person who makes the stores look sharp, load fast, and convert consistently.



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Find, source, and list new products with complete descriptions, pricing, and optimized images

Build and maintain storefront design across multiple brands — homepages, collection pages, product pages, and landing pages

Write conversion-focused copy for all product pages, collection pages, banners, and
 opt-ins

Build reusable product page templates and collection page templates that can be adapted across brands

Write, edit, and maintain Liquid code for custom sections, functionality, and design elements

Implement and manage Shopify apps, integrations, and third-party tools

Use AI tools daily to speed up copy production, image editing, product research, and store optimization

Keep every store technically clean — fast loading, fully mobile optimized, zero broken elements

Work directly with leadership on product launches, seasonal campaigns, and brand updates

Identify opportunities to improve conversion rate, page speed, and user experience without being asked





REQUIREMENTS — NON-NEGOTIABLE:



Minimum 2 years experience building and managing Shopify stores — not just editing existing stores, building from scratch

Able to write and edit Liquid code — this is a hard requirement, not a nice to have

Expert level with AI tools — ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, or equivalent — you use AI daily and your output is faster and better because of it

Strong conversion copywriting skills — you can write a product description or collection page that sells without being briefed on every word

Experience building custom section templates inside Shopify

Available full-time — this is a dedicated full-time role, not a freelance side project

Clean professional written English — all copy and communication must be sharp

Detail-oriented and self-directed — broken links, slow pages, and sloppy copy are not things you let through



NICE TO HAVE:



Experience managing multiple Shopify stores simultaneously

Experience with DTC brands at meaningful ad spend levels

Knowledge of how product pages and store design connect to paid Meta or TikTok traffic

Experience with Funnelish, ClickFunnels, or other funnel builders

Familiarity with Shopify apps — reviews, upsells, subscriptions, bundles, loyalty programs

Basic graphic design skills — Canva, Figma, or equivalent





WHAT WE OFFER:



$1,000 per month — paid monthly

Full-time remote — work from anywhere in the world

Direct access to founders — no corporate layers, no slow approvals, no bureaucracy

Multiple active brands to work across — variety, pace, and real ownership of your work

Room to grow in responsibility and compensation as the brands scale





HOW TO APPLY:

Send the following to [INSERT
]:



Links to at least two Shopify stores you have built or managed — not stores you helped with, stores you owned

One example of custom Liquid code you have written — paste it directly or link to it

Your answer to this question in three sentences or less — "You are listing a new product for a DTC brand. The product is a handcrafted beaded bracelet. Write a one-sentence product description that makes someone want to buy it."

List the AI tools you use daily and give one specific example of how you use them to produce better work faster



Applications without all four items will not be reviewed. No exceptions.



We run lean. We move fast. We build brands that people actually care about. If you want a slow corporate environment this is not the right fit. If you want real ownership of real work across real brands — send your application.

title: 2D Animation SIMPLE Stick cartoon
description:
Looking for AI 2D Cartoon Video Editor youtube Channel (4 Videos/Week)



Hey!



I'm looking for a skilled 2e editor to create AI 2D cartoon-style YouTube videos for my channel. The channel covers explainer video.





reverence video :











Each video should be a minimum of 15 minutes long and we need 4 videos delivered per week. Pay is $15 per video.



I will provide the script and voiceover. You will not need to do any research  your job is to create engaging AI 2D cartoon visuals, find background music, and bring the script to life visually in a style that fits the military niche.



I am Looking for Someone Who:



Has proven experience creating AI 2D cartoon YouTube videos.



Can deliver a minimum of 15 minutes of finished content per video.



Has experience with video editing software (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, CapCut Pro, or similar)

Is fluent in English.



Can meet deadlines consistently — 4 videos per week, every week.



Understands how to pace long-form YouTube content to keep viewers engaged.



Style & Creative Direction

The visual style should feel cinematic and serious — this is not a kids' cartoon channel. Think gritty,  2D animation that matches the weight of the stories we tell. You have creative freedom to make it engaging, but it must stay within our brand style (full guidelines provided).



 If you have read the middle of this job posting, please type your favorite military unit at the beginning or end of your proposal.



To Apply, Please Answer the Following Questions:



Share the best AI 2D cartoon video you have made, YouTube or Google Drive links only

Have you ever made a long-form cartoon video (20+ minutes) for a YouTube channel? If yes, share the link

Can you consistently deliver 4 videos per week? What does your current workload look like?



Only share Google Drive or YouTube links, no other file types will be reviewed.



I look forward to working with you!

title: Join Our Team! Full-Time GDS Specialist (Sabre) – Communications & Ticketing
description:
Are you a Sabre expert looking for a positive, growth-oriented place to call your professional home?

We are looking for a detail-oriented and confident GDS Specialist to join our team full-time. We truly value a positive attitude, proactive problem-solving, and a supportive team environment. If you love travel tech, communicating with clients, and crushing backend tasks, we’d love to meet you!



What You’ll Be Doing:

Sabre Magic: Handle ticketing, including issuance, reissuance, and complex exchanges.

Client Care: Communicate warmly and professionally with clients via WhatsApp,
, and phone.

Industry Outreach: Reach out to vendors and call airlines to advocate for our clients as needed.

Backend Support: Keep things running smoothly with proactive, detail-oriented behind-the-scenes work.



What We’re Looking For:

 Strong, hands-on Sabre GDS ticketing experience.

 Excellent written and spoken English.

 A positive attitude, a proactive mindset, and a sharp eye for detail.



How to Apply 

We know video applications can feel a little intimidating, but please don't stress about this! We aren't looking for a Hollywood production, perfect lighting, or editing. A casual, unscripted selfie-video taken right from your phone is exactly what we want.

Stumble over your words? Dog barks in the background? No problem at all! We just want to get to know the real human behind the application.

In a quick 2 to 3-minute video, just say hi and tell us:

 1. Your Journey: Walk us quickly through your recent workplaces, how long were you there and what were your main responsibilities?

 2. Your Skills: How would you rate your Sabre skills from 1 to 10, and what kind of Sabre tasks do you handle most often?

 3. Your Style: How would you rate your English skills (written and verbal) from 1 to 10? Also, let us know what you enjoy more: talking with people, or putting your head down and focusing on backend tasks?

 4. Your Setup: Where in the world are you working from? Give us a quick description of your workspace (will you be working solo in a quiet area?). Finally, please name the specific equipment you'll be using tell us about your computer/laptop model, how many monitors you have, your internet connection, and your phone setup.

Submit your video here, and if we feel you’re a great fit, we’ll reach out to schedule a friendly interview!

title: Personal Assistant / SMM
description:
Are you a proactive, creative, and organized professional ready to help scale a fast-growing personal brand?



We are looking for a powerhouse Personal/Brand Assistant to support a high-volume entrepreneur in the Whatnot and reseller space. We aren't just selling products; we are supplying the next generation of resellers. If you know how to turn raw energy into a streamlined digital presence, we want you.



Role Overview

Status: Part-Time (20 hours/week)



Schedule: Monday – Friday, 11 AM – 3 PM EST (Strict)



Focus: Social Media Growth, Brand Organization, and Executive Admin Support



What You’ll Be Doing

The mission is simple: Take the noise and turn it into a brand. You will be the engine behind a presence across TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X 
), and
.



Content Management: Post, schedule, and organize content across all platforms.



Brand Voice: Write engaging captions, draft
s, and assist with professional outreach.



Creative Strategy: Brainstorm content ideas that resonate with the reseller community.



Digital Housekeeping: Update websites/profiles and keep projects on track.



Executive Support: Act as a high-level PA—anticipating needs before they arise and working closely with the CEO.



Who You Are

You aren't just a "task-taker"—you are a problem solver.



Socially Savvy: You understand the nuances of different platforms.



Tech Fluent: Proficient in Canva, social scheduling tools, and basic website updates.



Proactive: You don’t wait for a to-do list; you see a gap and fill it.



Reliable: You are comfortable working Eastern Standard Time (EST) to ensure real-time collaboration with leadership.



Requirements

Proven experience in Social Media Management or as a High-Level VA.



Strong English (written and verbal) is non-negotiable.



Ability to work quickly in a fast-paced, "always-on" environment.



Basic understanding of the reseller market or Whatnot ecosystem is a massive plus.





How to Apply

We value attention to detail above all else. Applicants who do not follow these instructions exactly AND INCOMPLETE ATTACHMENT  will be automatically disqualified. Please send your application to 
 with the following:



Subject Line: High-Level Virtual Assistant (Personal Brand & Operations) - [Your Name]



Resume & Cover Letter: Combined in one file/message.



Portfolio: Show us your best work (Social media feeds, graphics, or case studies).



Video Introduction: A brief video introducing yourself and your experience.



EST Confirmation: Explicitly confirm you are available to work 11 AM - 3 PM EST.



Note: We are looking for a long-term partner who can bring ideas to the table. If you're ready to help run the show, we want to hear from you!

title: Freelance Video Editor (Long-Form Podcast Content)
description:
About Us

We are a growing real estate media company specializing in high-quality video content for real estate agents, teams, and brands. Our focus is on creating engaging, professional, and modern content that helps our clients stand out—especially in long-form podcast-style videos and social media.



Role Overview

We are looking for a skilled freelance video editor to handle long-form podcast-style video content (20–60+ minutes). This includes multi-camera editing, audio syncing, pacing, and light creative enhancements to maintain viewer engagement.

This is not basic cutting—we want someone who understands storytelling, retention, and clean, modern editing styles.



Key Responsibilities:

-Edit long-form podcast videos (20–60+ minutes)

-Sync multi-camera footage and audio

-Cut and pace conversations for clarity and engagement

-Remove filler words, dead space, and mistakes

-Add basic motion graphics (intro/outro, lower thirds, name tags)

-Incorporate light zooms, punch-ins, and visual interest techniques

-Clean and balance audio (levels, noise reduction, clarity)

-Add background music where appropriate

-Export in formats optimized for YouTube and other platforms

-Collaborate and revise based on feedback



Required Skills & Experience:

-Proven experience editing long-form content (podcasts, interviews, talking-head videos)

-Strong understanding of pacing and audience retention

-DaVinci Resolve software (preferred)

-Strong attention to detail

-Ability to follow brand guidelines and editing style references

-Reliable turnaround times and communication

-Reliable internet connection

-Must have your own Dropbox account (for file delivery and collaboration)



Experience with:

-Multi-camera editing workflows

-Audio editing and cleanup

-Motion graphics 

-Color correction and grading skills

-Thumbnail cover design and creation





Bonus (Nice to Have)

-Experience editing real estate content

-Ability to create short-form clips from long-form content

-Familiarity with YouTube optimization (cuts, hooks, pacing)



Compensation

-Competitive per-project or per-video rate (based on experience)

-Opportunity for consistent, ongoing work



How to Apply

Please include:

Links to your best 2–3 sample videos (long-form podcast/interview content multi camera/person preferred). ONLY 2-3 LINKS PLEASE. ANYTHING MORE AND YOUR APPLICATION WILL NOT BE REVIEWED!!!

Your typical turnaround time for a 30–60 minute video

Your rate (per video)

The video editing hardware and software you’re using



Important: Start your application with the word "MKREPodcastEditor" so we know you read the full job description.



What We’re Looking For

Someone reliable, detail-oriented, and easy to work with. We value editors who think beyond just cutting clips and can help improve the overall quality and flow of content.

If you’re looking for consistent work and want to grow with a media-focused real estate brand, we want to hear from you.

title: Transaction Coordinator
description:
Summary

We are a US land investment company looking for a Transaction Coordinator to work directly with the owner on due diligence for signed deals.



This is a new role. I need someone who has done real estate transaction work before, is highly organized, and flexible enough to help shape the role as we go.



Your Responsibilities:



- Reach out to title companies and coordinate title work

- Research and vet local realtors for each deal

- Research engineers, soil scientists, and surveyors for due diligence

- Contact county offices for zoning, planning, and permitting questions

- Follow up on signed deals and push them through to close

- Public records research and seller contact verification

- Occasional admin work (CRM updates, light data entry)



Requirements:



- Prior real estate transaction coordination experience

- Experience working with counties and public records

- Excellent English communication (written & verbal)

- Extremely high attention to detail

- Highly organized, self-starter, works independently with minimal supervision

- Coachable and flexible — this is a new role and will evolve



Bonus Experience (highly favorable):



- AI-forward — comfortable using AI tools day-to-day

- Land investing or land-specific real estate experience

- GIS mapping tools and county GIS systems

- Zoning and land development knowledge

- Real estate research, underwriting, or data analysis

- Public records research and lead-data enrichment



Application Requirements:



To apply, please submit:



- A 1–2 minute video introducing yourself & your experience

- Internet speed test screenshot

- Answer this question: "Why are you a strong fit for this role?"



Compensation:



- $4–$7 per hour, based on experience

- 60-day evaluation period. After 60 days, everything gets reevaluated with potential for commissions

- Starting at 30 hrs/week with the opportunity to move to 40 hrs (full-time) based on performance

- Long-term position with growth opportunities



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who wants to grow with our company and play a key role in our acquisitions and due diligence process.



—



Please include your favorite food at the start of your response.

title: Customer Service Manager

We are a fast-growing D2C e-commerce fashion business looking for an experienced Customer Service Manager. You’ll start hands-on (doing everything yourself) and then move into managing CS reps and supply chain. No management experience = please don’t apply.

s (primarily french for now, occasionally English)

Track refunds and returns in Google Sheets to keep everything organized

 When an order issue arises, you will raise it in the supplier group and help resolve it

Experience using translation tools (DeepL, Google Translate, etc.)

You do not rely solely on templates and adapt responses intelligently

Room for your own ideas and process improvements

title: On-Call / Project-Based IT & AI Automation Support
description:
If you love:



Solving technical problems

Working with AI tools and automations

Building systems that run smoothly behind the scenes

Fixing issues quickly and efficiently

Being the go-to person for backend support…



You might be exactly who we’re looking for.



???? Overview



We are looking for a reliable, solution-oriented IT & AI Automation Specialist to support our business on an on-call or project basis.



This role is essential in maintaining and improving our backend systems, especially our AI bots, automations, and web-based operations.



You will act as the technical backbone of the company—ensuring everything runs smoothly and stepping in quickly when support is needed.



?? Your Core Ownership



You will own the technical stability and functionality of our backend systems.



Your success is measured by:



Systems running smoothly with minimal issues

Fast resolution of technical problems

Clean, functional, and scalable automations



You are the person who makes sure:



The backend works without disruption

Problems are solved quickly and clearly

Systems are built to support growth



???? Key Responsibilities

???? AI Bots & Automation



Maintain and manage Google AI bots and related systems

Monitor performance and fix issues when needed

Support and improve automation workflows

Create and build new chatbots for future use



???? Web & System Operations



Support checkout systems and web-based operations

Troubleshoot errors and ensure smooth user experience

Handle integrations between tools and platforms



????? Technical Support (On-Call)



Be available for backend support when needed

Diagnose and resolve technical issues efficiently

Communicate problems and solutions clearly to the team



???? Integrations & Improvements



Set up and maintain system integrations

Identify gaps and suggest better technical solutions

Continuously improve backend processes and automation



???? Who You Are



Solution-Oriented: You focus on fixing, not just identifying problems

Technically Skilled: You are confident working with AI tools, bots, and integrations

Clear Communicator: You can explain technical issues in a simple, understandable way

Reliable: When something breaks, you step in and handle it

Independent: You can work with minimal supervision and take ownership

Detail-Oriented: You ensure systems are working correctly and efficiently

description:

title: Call Center Agent Team Lead 11pm-8am PHT
description:
Job Description



We are hiring a full-time phone agent to handle inbound sales qualification calls during 11pm-8am PHT for our law firm intake center

We already have two agents from the Philippines successfully working in this position

You will report directly to me, I am from Canada.



Main Responsibilities



Answer inbound calls quickly during your shift

Ask the four qualification questions provided in the script

Follow the script closely and consistently

Quickly transfer qualified leads to a manager

Fill out a short Google Form with the caller’s information

Record each call/lead in the daily report

Stay active and responsive on Slack during your shift



Requirements

- Must have at least 2 yrs of call center experience

- Must have a headset with clear audio quality

- Must have a quiet room with minimal background noise

- Must have a reliable internet connection

- Must be live on Slack and responsive during your shift

- Must maintain a call pickup time of under 10 seconds throughout the shift



Ideal Candidate

- Women candidates preferred from a vocal quality, and empathetic phone voice perspective

- If you have worked as a Call Support Team Lead in the past, this experience is highly valued, mention in your recording.

- Reliable, consistent, and detail-oriented

- Able to follow instructions and stick to a script

- Has a professional phone presence



DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE REQUIREMENTS ABOVE



Breaks

- Two unpaid 30-minute breaks during your shift

- Breaks are for personal matters, meals, or rest

- Break timing should be coordinated so live call coverage is not affected



Success Metrics



Your success will be measured by:

- Number of successful transfers

- Number of calls answered

- Number of missed calls

- Accuracy of call notes and Google Form submissions

- The goal is to avoid missing any calls during the shift.



Average handling time and first-call resolution are not relevant for this position. The priority is answering calls quickly, qualifying leads accurately, and transferring qualified leads to a manager.



Next Steps

- To apply, please send a voice recording using 
 speaking about your previous call center work experience in less than 60 seconds. Please ensure you have clear audio quality and speak quality as I will be evaluating based on that.

- Please attach google drive link to your resume

- Nothing else is required to include, maybe just 1-2 sentences if you wish. No need to write a long paragraph about yourself.



Work

- I am looking to hire ASAP and will conduct interviews this week

- First round interview is a 15min roleplay with a script

- First day I will train you how to do the job with our call center software

- First 5 days are a paid trial to ensure you are able to the job

- After that I will pay you monthly via wise

title: Everything Assistant
description:
Looking for the VA who never needs to be asked twice.



I run a large operation and I need a right-hand person someone organized, sharp, and self-directed enough that I can hand off a task with a Loom video and trust it'll get done correctly the first time. No babysitting. No chasing.

This is an "Everything VA" role, which means social media and 
 are the core of what you'll do, but on any given day I might also ask you to organize a Notion database, clean up a Google Drive, draft an
, schedule something, or research a vendor. If I can record a Loom explaining it, you can do it.



What you'll be doing day-to-day:



- Running point on 
 — moderation, member onboarding, organizing channels, managing roles, working with bots, handling community questions

- Owning Notion docs, dashboards, and SOPs

- Keeping Google Drive organized and accessible

- Executing one-off tasks I assign via Loom (research, outreach, data entry, scheduling, vendor coordination, etc.)

- Flagging issues before they become problems



You're a fit if:



- You've actively used 
 for 2+ years and know your way around roles, permissions, bots (MEE6, Carl-bot, Dyno, etc.), and community management

- You have real social media experience — not just "I have a personal Instagram." You've grown or managed accounts and can show me what you've worked on

- You're available during US business hours (specify your timezone in the application)

- You're fluent in Notion and Google Drive and pick up new tools quickly

- You're obsessively organized — if your own files and tasks are a mess, this role will eat you alive

- You communicate proactively. You don't wait to be asked for status updates

- You can watch a Loom once and execute, then build an SOP from it so you never need to be told again

- Your written English is sharp



You're NOT a fit if:

- You need step-by-step hand-holding

- You go silent for hours during your work block

- You've juggled 5 other clients and "fit them in"

- You need every task to be perfectly scoped before you can start



To apply:

Fill out the intake form here: 



Read this carefully: The Secret hidden word is "banana" (lowercase, no quotes). Applications that skip this step won't be reviewed. I do this because I'm hiring for attention to detail, and if you can't follow a one-line instruction in the job post, you can't follow my Looms.
